name: Rick Scott
subject: Did you see this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, **In case you missed it, I fully endorsed Donald Trump for President in 2024.** Now, the Democrats are coming after me even more than they were before. _**CNN has listed my seat as a top 10 most likely Senate Seat to flip in 2024, and my ultra-liberal, Democrat opponent even told her donors that if they can flip my seat, the Democrats will be “guaranteed” to keep their Senate majority.**_ If the Democrats are good at one thing, its raising money and spending money. They will have no problem spending upwards of 100 MILLION dollars to try and buy this race. We cannot let that happen. **President Trump needs a Republican Senate majority if we are going to fix the HORRIFIC disaster that Biden has left.** **We are calling for a MASSIVE surge in fundraising** so we can match the efforts of the Democrats and send them packing in 2024. **[Can President Trump and I count on you? Our future depends on it.](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=402debc40ea54fb798b5965f8bd44d64&_e=Jqjqj5tCl4iMUI58tnrgfwYbq48auuXl2LvH7VnXKiF42A4fqB6bjef0xYHSZOWP2COnJyyRXvZh2Tu-WUqHzN6igZHuDlNqMohI6nvyv0MAM_kMtoD65RXwQ-00ptN9vviQatAd5rwkP5Y3bY-fj3yO3kTiIvEARwPBln9CG0-kpra0pGDNpwrmIVOuP975Dwk7hiDUU3O61Bhvw-n_85azVtfJHxOzHeP-6mJDP-flBJrgZeo8Yhvnz0TP31SXddi1FUOxe5uNteJNf8KGK7w0T1QIcNeCAUZSG1aaL9IRq83ged5NvD_MVeKHGXmOEWAUDSKRy1o-r0JrTiqQTbEAI7Y6ExDApRxw5RNnuHbN1M7aPiFCPqo04c7APoDl)**

Did you see what Chris Hayes said on MSNBC? **Lauren Boebert is in serious trouble of losing her seat in 2024.**
Last year, Adam Frisch came just 546 votes short of defeating Boebert. It was the closest race in the _entire_ country – decided by a margin of just 0.17%.
Now, Adam is running again, and we have an historic opportunity to end Boebert’s political career in what’ll be the most closely-watched race on Election Night.
The latest poll shows Adam leading Lauren Boebert – 50% to 48% – but Boebert’s Super PACs are already on the attack. In 2022, we were heavily out-spent, and we cannot afford to fall behind again.

Thank you for everything you do, Team Frisch ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

body:
Will you join me, Peter? | Peter,

I’m proud to endorse my good friend [**Senator Deb Fischer**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4ffa245bea7d48b4816082ba6c45bf97&_e=kx_liQpbVh1eOTfx4mfoKCRhqKLZsNgR5UkvMAcz7iNy-VkzeUqko-KqB3_G_BwUuNm2k_CtIVmgv6GLY91vo_ltWhs_xej-dNUnIrkuO3Hpu1Bk5cQWDnrZztAN6bOCBiG9kPkpLmSk2ew9cFIPPT0EE1SyGNEPxiRzLZs06PrulcJT5ZjRdOhfE6qYwl5DKivQhMgpGbpk61Php997Z97aksPTTI9Qtbp1Tn4_khsplWlUMg4uUGRC6IFnetGbUhcH2RDFdxJvWG5V9ArnrnCBMAvjjQL2WRQuMonjYsVjrOxU6Ie9Etox3wRty3qZmgPLaDfjk3oivS9jY-vxNF1XN9OO619sU5SzsHk9dDf3gKhmhYMrZgih8K_FSaDGaBRYGlcw9jvl2cvcx6kURRjH5qeCljdz65vcB4Yt35fz3McwPPsS_pNNCWHAAmJXrJif2vIuIjhJz4eZbHc-0w%3D%3D) for re-election in 2024.

Senator Fischer is exactly the kind of leader our country needs in Washington today. She understands the challenges facing American families, and I have the utmost confidence she will continue to hold the Biden Administration accountable for its backward policies.

[**JOIN ME & ENDORSE DEB FISCHER**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4ffa245bea7d48b4816082ba6c45bf97&_e=kx_liQpbVh1eOTfx4mfoKCRhqKLZsNgR5UkvMAcz7iNy-VkzeUqko-KqB3_G_BwUuNm2k_CtIVmgv6GLY91vo_ltWhs_xej-dNUnIrkuO3Hpu1Bk5cQWDnrZztAN6bOCBiG9kPkpLmSk2ew9cFIPPT0EE1SyGNEPxiRzLZs06PrulcJT5ZjRdOhfE6qYwl5DKivQhMgpGbpk61Php997Z97aksPTTI9Qtbp1Tn4_khsplWlUMg4uUGRC6IFnetGbUhcH2RDFdxJvWG5V9ArnrnCBMAvjjQL2WRQuMonjYsVjrOxU6Ie9Etox3wRty3qZB_VKrZx-eUXbe-lGlvC1D0fxiugfWo1P6njFZPVib0MC8xtAuoy0xsXhdGWQJalk6NfOKBqzikvfLTWFDyTF4cUGY8sJAVIeQVZWiMVYAH6zUlxZu9zgpvSzGKVXUuiRVbeleCE_aAhTuX5R-LQcvQ%3D%3D)

Trust me — far-Left Democrats are going to be gunning for Deb’s seat, and she needs OUR HELP to fend them off.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Baugh?=
subject: Freedom Isn’t Free 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=3a7bb777fe&e=8a657725d1)
---
| Peter, Today’s Veterans Day is a reminder that the freedoms we enjoy here in America didn’t come free...

They were paid for through the blood, sweat, and sacrifice of generations of heroes who put their lives on the line to defend the greatest nation on Earth.

I hope you’ll join me in saying a prayer for those veterans today and thanking any in your life for their service.
---
| [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=464b756b33&e=8a657725d1)
---
| _To any veterans reading this message – thank you for being the reason we enjoy rights and liberties that are found nowhere else on the planet._ May you always receive the care and gratitude that you deserve. Our nation owes its very existence to your bravery.

For Our Heroes,
_Scott Baugh_

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: My team is growing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I have always known the importance of a good team. It’s why I married such a phenomenal woman and surround myself with God-fearing, hard-working, driven individuals every single day. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=d9630e49d26744a9ae957a55f878d1f9&_t=yS9CdcH6Gh6l-yjWdSHGOnkiGycok0HPApavSc6HXlF6LbXOMFmtZoAnNPlkmDIWIDuK3dcp0WzQ6Ib4f7AfExT0IxTObp6v7Sgy3fcaEBc%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=d9630e49d26744a9ae957a55f878d1f9&_t=yS9CdcH6Gh6l-yjWdSHGOnkiGycok0HPApavSc6HXlF6LbXOMFmtZoAnNPlkmDIWIDuK3dcp0WzQ6Ib4f7AfExT0IxTObp6v7Sgy3fcaEBc%3D)
[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d9630e49d26744a9ae957a55f878d1f9&_e=S0Q5ebV2Hkx6xfNh3pGtXAKXagezopH5xcdgB9MBtA73qYaLFmzzVOYpffD5rkJtGfQSfmdvoAYFpAaVIp3EcCI3Ob1O-eMaf4DkSQRZPulWgV6Cu4hczxTHDg94hkhI2LbcYMYZyd4wR1DETtPIUI0jF1waA6B6a0UGYm4LAJUO-tgtnIZAiOLo_NENLStOuVzodpfi_f-Qn8vdsumLn6Crp3ulPV1VnBU3Wz4ERIyokrkHJzbJ91-X0PuvTLbFMjGU6YqPM5HcwUUkgPfudbi63hf8jKVrbj4H67J8omYc-YQPYj9ahOnfY_rqCi0iGQc7WUm6blTfp4Y9uJIsaJfN38S-4veCXJH45Y5XZ6WJbob5QAV72xB6yezjBdvlodQAuzv-6P9d1J5u8p1cAIAR5wwlOTwuHTG4aL030Ml69dpAxs-RORia_Htt6ic4)
---
Fellow American -

**I have always known the importance of a good team.** _It’s why I married such a phenomenal woman and surround myself with God-fearing, hard-working, driven individuals every single day._

It is no secret that my team has grown exponentially in the last several weeks. As I sit in and out of meetings and interviews, I am astounded by the good people who are willing to serve our country. In fact, I am more hopeful than ever about the future of America.

**I am recruiting great American patriots who are determined to preserve the foundations this country was built on.** [**Today I am asking you to join my team. Let me explain why before you click out of this email.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d9630e49d26744a9ae957a55f878d1f9&_e=S0Q5ebV2Hkx6xfNh3pGtXAKXagezopH5xcdgB9MBtA73qYaLFmzzVOYpffD5rkJtGfQSfmdvoAYFpAaVIp3EcCI3Ob1O-eMaf4DkSQRZPulWgV6Cu4hczxTHDg94hkhI2LbcYMYZyd4wR1DETtPIUI0jF1waA6B6a0UGYm4LAJUO-tgtnIZAiOLo_NENLStOuVzodpfi_f-Qn8vdsumLn6Crp3ulPV1VnBU3Wz4ERIyokrkHJzbJ91-X0PuvTLbFMjGU6YqPM5HcwUUkgPfudfp_4a94YcB231QUWNZ5uEfULT0Ez2OpbIdUW1DdDKqkQ4zBG2KRqyOJOClz9Ba3d3Weg5OobHf51jhLXVkEfkJZiQi-ByQUw6dmX_AM9PXXS9stS39_XZZoT-i8RysX8at40nrsg1X9qyMi3ymN_6YmulUzq-8hUxGrRS7FSpoM)
[** JOIN SPEAKER JOHNSON’S TEAM > **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d9630e49d26744a9ae957a55f878d1f9&_e=S0Q5ebV2Hkx6xfNh3pGtXAKXagezopH5xcdgB9MBtA73qYaLFmzzVOYpffD5rkJtGfQSfmdvoAYFpAaVIp3EcCI3Ob1O-eMaf4DkSQRZPulWgV6Cu4hczxTHDg94hkhI2LbcYMYZyd4wR1DETtPIUI0jF1waA6B6a0UGYm4LAJUO-tgtnIZAiOLo_NENLStOuVzodpfi_f-Qn8vdsumLn6Crp3ulPV1VnBU3Wz4ERIyokrkHJzbJ91-X0PuvTLbFMjGU6YqPM5HcwUUkgPfudVDTS0miatYaghrL_F6C-ZvYhaZTboqfMJ0l1HHYGohGykGZQFiv_GC4i-EriMc2NMse6hKZkCWXL4bUpXEEl5e8E47SRQAZdiRKQ7-PKspVGIpZXLc9j_QSykF2LVkzlT1Ash6YMDrTZIdUMkz8M1_Y33k9r6ZyWh6AI4tjWnDn)
**Why I need your help:** _"Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction."_ As Ronald Reagan reminded us, we must always be on guard. This is especially true TODAY – as the Left is determined to dismantle the very foundations our great nation was founded upon.

Take a moment and consider what Democrats have pledged to _"re-engineer"_ – their new favorite buzzword: voting rights, gun rights, freedom of speech, education...the list goes on.

**The Left says they don't hate America, but they are working day and night to divide and destroy our country.**

Their actions speak louder than their words, [**and I need your help to fight back and protect our republic.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d9630e49d26744a9ae957a55f878d1f9&_e=S0Q5ebV2Hkx6xfNh3pGtXAKXagezopH5xcdgB9MBtA73qYaLFmzzVOYpffD5rkJtGfQSfmdvoAYFpAaVIp3EcCI3Ob1O-eMaf4DkSQRZPulWgV6Cu4hczxTHDg94hkhI2LbcYMYZyd4wR1DETtPIUI0jF1waA6B6a0UGYm4LAJUO-tgtnIZAiOLo_NENLStOuVzodpfi_f-Qn8vdsumLn6Crp3ulPV1VnBU3Wz4ERIyokrkHJzbJ91-X0PuvTLbFMjGU6YqPM5HcwUUkgPfudR3283cgXXQtjSaXMnzGLQfzZCIxLTWAaAypvRCg54pgFfrdqTLMPDztT9i_tYUlSq3a0_JIk2nSuAikPAbMDFBBYXIcAxvRQFtfiJ89gZe--FJpj4EepoiszFGOy0_xhVTHirySwy8Dv6EZOceyPdG5ALG66DsHFiC17HIAOwAL)

As Speaker of the House, I am the new boogeyman. Democrats are coming at me with everything they have, to try and take back the House, un-seat vulnerable Republicans, and take over FULL control of Washington.

I know that saving our country from the radical Democratic agenda extends far beyond what I can do as one man, [**which is why I am assembling a team of foot soldiers I can rely on. In fact, I am more hopeful than ever about the future of America. I am recruiting great American patriots who are determined to preserve the foundations this country was built on. Why I need your help: "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." As Ronald Reagan reminded us, we must always be on guard. body:
God bless those who have served | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billeigel/email-12661867?e=c00a6982d2)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | My fellow Patriots,

Today is Veterans Day.

Amanda and I both served because of the example of those who came before us. To all veterans, thank you for your service.

Thank you to my father for teaching me the power of service - and his father (my grandfather) before him. Thank you to my brother, uncles, cousins, nephew, and all the others who put on the uniform in defense of the greatest country in the history of the world.
---

name: Rep. Mike Soboleski
subject: Happy Veterans Day
body:
[](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xziyg-ddldgdkhd-r/) Peter,To all the veterans, thank you for your service.It doesn't matter what color the uniform is, what insignias are on it, or the chevrons. Everyone who put on a uniform swore an oath to serve and defend our country and I'm proud to be a part of that band of brothers.I hope you have a great Veterans Day today.Stay Safe,Representative Mike Soboleski
Marine Veteran [](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xziyg-ddldgdkhd-y/) [FACEBOOK: WATCH MY VETERANS DAY MESSAGE HERE](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xziyg-ddldgdkhd-i/) [YOUTUBE: WATCH MY VETERANS DAY MESSAGE HERE](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xziyg-ddldgdkhd-d/) [TWITTER: WATCH MY VETERANS DAY MESSAGE HERE](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xziyg-ddldgdkhd-h/) **FOLLOW MIKE ON SOCIAL MEDIA** [](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xziyg-ddldgdkhd-k/)[](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xziyg-ddldgdkhd-u/)[](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xziyg-ddldgdkhd-o/) | | **Mike Soboleski for Congress** PO Box 603Augusta, ME 04332 **Mike Soboleski** is a born and raised Mainer and a lifelong conservative with Maine values. He's running for Congress in Maine's Second Congressional District because he knows our state and country is going in the wrong direction. name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcaom5gru5kpgt7ea5nv898eoo8mgautaa4vi5g8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stjm9or1cjh2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zud8rdff3svi0t08cu2p2u7p8upehltugv11pf9g_rp22sh2s8i66p74stjm9or1cjh2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z47mt1sb6g9eqtelp2uo92ko2bai08hsc84enmko_rp22sh2s8i66p74stjm9or1cjh2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

American Action News

name: Constitutional Republic Party
subject: A Veteran's Day Message from the Chair
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yMzQ2MjA3Mzc0MjIzNjEyNjA0JmM9bzlpMCZlPTAmYj0xMjM4MDE2NjU0JmQ9ZjJsOHoybw==.a7zMD0qDvyytLIR6xWR5DwbMNqPCKJSZGVC_kZtdfpc)
| | | | [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yMzQ2MjA3Mzc0MjIzNjEyNjA0JmM9bzlpMCZlPTAmYj0xMjM4MDE2NjU1JmQ9djJlOG8yaw==.PyZ9_LKmbb9C0uS9CYvmsIsGt2wEd0TBIS4rI18gCpU)
---
| Veteran's Day 2023
---
Veteran's Day Message from the Chair
Today, we celebrate Veteran’s Day, a day where we honor those who have served in the defense of our great country. There are many reasons why people serve in the military, some are by choice but not all have been. For me it was a calling, I initially was denied entry due to a head injury a few years prior to my high school graduation, after the first Persian Gulf War started, they started getting a little more lenient on medial waivers and I was able to enlist, I jumped at the chance. Some join to get out of poverty and get a better life, and some do it for education or to pay off student loans. Others had no choice in the manner and were drafted to serve, yet serve they did. One interesting fact I saw today, Native Americans serve at 5 times the rate of other Americans in the armed service. I was always amazed by the number of Natives and those from the Asian Pacific who served with me. When we serve this country in the military, we do so with the knowledge that our lives are no longer truly our own but belong to the American people for her defense. With that gift, that we have given to the American people, the country accepts a certain responsibility to that service member, to not risk the life of that service person if it is not in defense of this country and to take responsibility for the care of that person if they are in injured while serving the country. These are responsibilities that our country has failed to live up to at times. I would like to think that the desire to address that failure is in the DNA of the Constitutional Republic Party. It is something we will be looking at with any of our candidates, either on a state level or national level. It is why we have taken a lead in projects such as Defend the Guard, and it is why we have been a strong advocate of a stay-at-home national defense policy. It is why I am sitting here tonight writing this. If we truly want to honor our veterans, we must ensure that we do not send them to fight in wars that have no direct impact on our national defense. There is a lot of truth in the saying that the best thing we can do for a Combat Veteran is to stop making them. If our service people are injured while doing their military duties, we must ensure that they are given proper treatment and compensation and that their care is not hampered by big government bureaucracy. We need to honor our commitment to them. This means more than a thank you for your service, a discount, or a free meal to them. This is how we really stand for our veterans, by electing people who will honor them with their actions, not their political promises. Thank you to all of you who have served, IGYS. Bull Chair, Constitutional Republic Party If you have not joined the Constitutional Republic Party yet, please click the button below and join our ranks! There really are strength in numbers.
| [Become a Member!](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yMzQ2MjA3Mzc0MjIzNjEyNjA0JmM9bzlpMCZlPTAmYj0xMjM4MDE2NjU3JmQ9ajBuMnQ4cA==.LUzsmiZWs7xjy61qgPRhrbwalu3Ft5_w6Xdu_IRP8Q8)

If our service people are injured while doing their military duties, we must ensure that they are given proper treatment and compensation and that their care is not hampered by big government bureaucracy. We need to honor our commitment to them. This means more than a thank you for your service, a discount, or a free meal to them. This is how we really stand for our veterans, by electing people who will honor them with their actions, not their political promises. Thank you to all of you who have served, IGYS. Bull Chair, Constitutional Republic Party If you have not joined the Constitutional Republic Party yet, please click the button below and join our ranks! There really are strength in numbers. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | Constitutional Republic Party 36167 STATE HIGHWAY 9 SW, BELTRAMI, MN 56517 United States You received this email because you signed up on our website or requested information.

body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt272fbb60vkjdo28o7uhsiv4vel4orp79b6tj70_rp22sh2s8i66p74stgecoj2chh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z07r537i7n0jdu5d0qecmebil07i3buldqdk7860_rp22sh2s8i66p74stgecoj2chh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpfojhrj2ttcl098udhhkscueott1l22dd1nnneo_rp22sh2s8i66p74stgecoj2chh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq8cd6d7d6olvtvcnia4vsdl6qn2qqbqcbqbm8mo_rp22sh2s8i66p74stgecoj2chh2bs)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn0jne1jfvkp1ajdi91oolbq10aa6ltr64n53us8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stgecoj2c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt4g2b093darp4cdkk3lf4e43f9id9o2ppjjnggo_rp22sh2s8i66p74stgecoj2c9h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za13c8g0vl3mbpjl2fooro07v43u3g84n4h3hkl8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stgecoj2c9h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za31vodupqnkqovkecir0ar63uv06mnijlpl3u80_rp22sh2s8i66p74stgecoj2c9h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Trump Train News
---

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: Biden’s favorite Republicans at it again
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

President Biden knows whenever a Republican Member of Congress is gutsy enough to fight the White House, _he can count on some other Swamp Republican to rush to the Biden administration’s aid_.

That’s exactly what U.S. Senators Dan Sullivan (R-AK), Lindsey Graham (R-SC), and Joni Ernst (R-IA) are doing right now to one of the most pro-life Members of the U.S. Senate!

**_So, with your help,_Students for Life Action_ is about to EXPOSE them_!**

I’ll tell you more about what we’re planning for **_MONDAY_** , but first let me give you the backstory . . .

_Pro-Life Friend, this all started when U.S. Senator Tommy Tuberville (R-AL) began using his power to hold up Biden's Pentagon appointments until the Biden Department of Defense changes its policy and stops illegally using U.S. taxpayer dollars to pay for abortions_.

_Instead of joining with Senator Tuberville, Senators Dan Sullivan, Lindsey Graham, and Joni Ernst are now working with the Biden administration to change Senate rules!_

If they succeed, not only will President Biden face zero consequences for forcing taxpayers to fund military abortions, it’ll also grease the skids for the Biden administration to start running roughshod over the U.S. Senate on any number of appointments.

And it’s all scheduled to go down this coming _TUESDAY_!

**That’s why _Students for Life Action_ is headed to Alaska for a MASSIVE protest of Senator Dan Sullivan’s office on Monday.**

And I’m counting on you to please:
1) **[_Chip in a generous contribution of $10 or $25_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjhkluk-duchtdja-y/)** to help pay for signs, coffee, and hot cocoa for our students who will be braving the Alaskan cold to EXPOSE Senator Dan Sullivan; and
2) Call your U.S. Senators on MONDAY and TUESDAY before the U.S. Senate’s rule-change vote and insist they stand with Senator Tommy Tuberville. You can call the Capitol Hill switchboard at (202) 224-3121.
Pro-Life Friend, I’m sick and tired of watching Republicans choose to do the “Swamp” thing over the right thing.

That’s exactly what Senator Dan Sullivan (R-AK) is doing. And other supposedly “pro-life” establishment groups in Washington, D.C. are literally saying nothing.

_If you want to know why people get disillusioned with politics – and why nothing ever changes in D.C. – here’s why_.

It's the fault of Swampy Republicans who knife anyone who dares to keep their promises.

**I’m mad.**

And I want to see how pro-lifers in Alaska, Iowa, and South Carolina react when they learn that their supposedly “pro-life” Senators are joining with President Biden to force them to pay for abortions.

But with time so short, please act at once.

Please **[_chip in a generous contribution of $10 or $25_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjhkluk-duchtdja-j/)** to help pay for signs, coffee, and hot cocoa for our students who will be braving the cold to EXPOSE Senator Dan Sullivan on MONDAY.

And then on MONDAY and TUESDAY, please call your U.S. Senators at (202) 224-3121 and insist they stand WITH Senator Tommy Tuberville and against this radical Biden rule change!

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

name: American Defense News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhjpthiradcbb9j8d9q8sv6is6oqo1rdjhi83dso_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl2lfrdi3d4chs6g1n1o1b2iqps8bt5mmsbo6ic8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcmg6m0jco6oe34bmrf03dkua689gr9sb690qkuo_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs8qr8g2ip3la1gt0adelb7c6ir36srfdoaf80m0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv76k7i37cs9emc1d95utc5f5a7k2themn4bb788_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5f79aa7up5gdelb6agrqk7nqp985fapfbfd5ul0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm7r2lle3m3ejk2e99q81l4cs469r3uh3ali90c8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

subject: Make THIS Bank Account ‘Switch’ to Protect Your Cash
body:

Very soon, you could wake up to discover your money has been frozen ... or even confiscated. It's happened to innocent people before, and I don't want you to be next. name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama's Revolution
body:
Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z285mjj6brp739e37cp127iocdq87k9p94eqespg_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zukdah3u7edmpn7fd3j5ig8vro5ambef7rn80shg_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrj8spr9f8an5687c1mls4p4nbqp91dgg0rge2t0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs)**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want you to know the truth
body:
Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6v3j0o4hunlvmmjk23prua8b0fgs1sm5gksokpg_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs)
---

Friend,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zej46ec6bb7rc0akfg4uo0fklugukhf4pihh8jc8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjmifj0makonucqvjt4tjioqmvn6d0nam1101ka8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _
---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6vd6bbp7ohm5idqjvek9b0ch99q43pm50bnlg6g_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2jj2v87o32tand3e9ehkfiqilm05jlfad44offg_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs)
---

Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

**[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8n882b7e82iqi3km52u7hphnmlur7ono61uki20_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

**[Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the of OUR movement?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr4offk1jknqrmpp0jnqj5rr8rjvtsjiq9kflk5g_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the of OUR movement?")**

---
| | [RUSH SUPPORT TODAY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeu61a5am02nrnfn0khshnrcjcc7uiiiq2s1u9a8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help- starting right now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z43dlut3hrdqdct89lb2q93p5nfukn92su28akng_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs "I need your help – starting right now. ")**

Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrq250vic6k5h9atiirl9u8ujbo46tn1001aoqjg_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9rdd2chiudlg0t2psq6gkilpf2rv9o0mhbuss10_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zevuqhm68ieo99mak9a2tmu3m7op2vkfnvup67s0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcf5u16001grqgs20dl7vl07ign3qbo9t5g11vf0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3tq5o43tv9jjj3nfjb8e7vekjmdbc5gnkg12e10_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zolrmbmqs4h7hk9s4lge52r321tdego9m2b0ag88_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs "DONATE")
---
| | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc.

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpla15uh8mgqi7n54n2ic6r6nk90qu20b7ftchh8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs)
---

**By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. [Terms and conditions](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdp7638g79pibd8lpgpjric9h83vcc94fq8a9fqg_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs) and [Privacy Policy](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5mvjrebl1nmh48najtqpgkmvlkv45na3f4f87no_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs).apply. You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. [Privacy Policy](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgv7ahq4479viprt3enfndar0uv6c8ekq84d7lv0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs). [Terms and conditions](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp3hbbm10uv067gu2hejg62cvrnircnl143l1mug_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs).

Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals.

[Privacy Policy](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7mmnpscai8lbpi2dq1ldn43136b2g80tjk5ebqo_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs)

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl37d8rkfe53dau3ckuuilkbb89k2l8o4r686i48_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z98ael6difls5e6ou09pdlo66bm6u00qthcfpc90_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zttes0qhkrcht2ivuhpsjoh1p1255hbv4ns8e0fg_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0e372ovq1nsvcu9j9eg37fcett0ub1uskahhm8g_rp22sh2s8i66p74stge6o71c5h2bs)

name: American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhfaudrbgsnuaakf9s6c4qfuvefrv7krh2jrv6gg_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie0ob2c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zstrn0q7uv6khn39h0odjn70vmoq7g65m5e0499g_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie0ob2c1h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8ngmqp4kv69ujdm9hgm7b5p6ps7kocr99cauaeo_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie0ob2c1h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zplen3dqnbjm0ql8fcl9157v4jds11rqjdcdh3v8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie0ob2c1h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Action News
---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuu6obr5tc74rqbmrkva9702jjoli7a4hfd35p1o_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie0ob4c1h2bs)
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7sb37ps2pc9pjjj8s4ahiqmu7oibiclbdamrs78_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie0ob4c1h2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4mkhmlh8rs799rv92d3e000eppc332u0h994mlg_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie0ob4c1h2bs) [NO](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zptbrbhg3lnoph1m0h26mi5hb9p49sop0rjf68d0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie0ob4c1h2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6lev2f6poepulo9eqam72241m7or99kijjpe9j8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie0ob4c1h2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbdsv5eag3uucp1o7hb30an6k7ig3t8a1l34h5mo_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie0ob4c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chiecpr1chh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zctn9rsjqg8r5538mii4u9jpjpfg9qd8op5jps10_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie0ob4c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmdl5o60mkhoaf336tgpm8cer3vs3hgt57f5sud0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or4sjjm9o31chg649fg)

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want you to know the truth
body:
Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z84s6s2meih9k4jsasf1rtqcp0qngcav7m14qhg8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie0ob2cth2bs)
---

Friend,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhipoaq42f35cjbrusq20r6u4286adaqqfmj0fbg_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie0ob2cth2bs "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsn0gfu5n29iin95r5ra8nkpdj8jgddooeks97ho_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie0ob2cth2bs)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _
---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**
---

---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkbl78b08kg7uiac92rucfost87qebg15ki19b4o_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie0ob2cth2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35338%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f8rOeOoNS9Y0Su432WmT8g&sysid=1). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35339%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KOVFzxmQYY1hkj1LPBihxA&sysid=1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35330%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZUYnGiuhaodp6gK%2bdIyyjA&sysid=1) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

name: Emily Hall
subject: Your invitation to impact lives through prayer
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzE2LTc2Y2M3ZTU5MjNlODRlYzViNzU4MmE2NGFhZmQ1NDRjIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3dlbGNvbWUuaW1iLm9yZy9wcmF5ZXJjYWxlbmRhcjIzLmh0bWw_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXByYXllcmNhbGVuZGFyMjMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWltYWdlX0FFX1NQTzQ0MTIxIn0/s4Ib8g6NoVZEBr-eSYzzeQ)
---
Dear Fellow Believer,

I’m sure I’m not only speaking for myself when I say that sometimes it’s easy to forget to pray –– especially for those we don’t see on a daily basis.

In fact, praying for the lost across the globe can sometimes be overwhelming. Where do we start?

That’s why I’m excited to introduce you to our latest resource: "Impacting Lostness Through Prayer Calendar" –– an 18-month prayer calendar crafted to empower you to pray for the least reached across the globe.

This calendar isn't just a piece of paper; it's a remarkable tool that:
* Enables you to impact the lives of individuals and communities who are in need of hearing the life-changing gospel;
* Allows you to develop a greater sense of empathy and humility for those who are lost;
* Structures a disciplined habit of prayer that can extend throughout a lifetime!

[](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzE2LTc2Y2M3ZTU5MjNlODRlYzViNzU4MmE2NGFhZmQ1NDRjIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3dlbGNvbWUuaW1iLm9yZy9wcmF5ZXJjYWxlbmRhcjIzLmh0bWw_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXByYXllcmNhbGVuZGFyMjMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWltYWdlX0FFX1NQTzQ0MTIxIn0/AWLNMVpaFE7HLGpFs1ZrXw)Through this calendar, you'll receive a prayer prompt each month, guiding your prayers for those longing to hear the message of hope and salvation.

To receive your free copy of this powerful prayer tool, simply click on the link below to request it. We'll take care of the rest and mail the calendar to your doorstep.

Click on this link to secure your copy: [https://welcome.imb.org/prayercalendar23.html](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzE2LTc2Y2M3ZTU5MjNlODRlYzViNzU4MmE2NGFhZmQ1NDRjIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3dlbGNvbWUuaW1iLm9yZy9wcmF5ZXJjYWxlbmRhcjIzLmh0bWw_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXByYXllcmNhbGVuZGFyMjMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWltYWdlX0FFX1NQTzQ0MTIxIn0/XhORHM2n6rNlxJO-DKeOQg)

Thank you for partnering with us in this essential mission of spreading hope and love to those who need it the most. Your involvement is crucial in making a lasting impact on lostness through prayer.

With heartfelt gratitude,

Emily Hall
Prayer Content Specialist
IMB Prayer Office

To receive your free copy of this powerful prayer tool, simply click on the link below to request it. We'll take care of the rest and mail the calendar to your doorstep. Click on this link to secure your copy: Thank you for partnering with us in this essential mission of spreading hope and love to those who need it the most. Your involvement is crucial in making a lasting impact on lostness through prayer.
