name: SmartAsset
subject: Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
body:
*|MC:SUBJECT|*
It's no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firm.

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0muduse7vjbihru1upt5pm48pljipb56tht8du8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie2o36c5h2bs)
---
|
## Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7a8msb9mm1ngfj37f7mjul75tnej1afslo06n5g_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie2o36c5h2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| Find up to three advisors that serve your area, free!
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv1cnb8s7ivscdmj574k3ucu6e8j8kn6bq5pgfl0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie2o36c5h2bs)
---
|
---
| It's no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms stack up so you can decide on the fit for you.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvoq4hmj1k22c4vnojpk3fb1atvljerqq2pmle18_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie2o36c5h2bs)
### Overview of Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
Vanguard made a name for itself by creating and offering low-fee investment products such as mutual funds and exchange-traded funds (ETFs). It still does this, and even non-Vanguard clients can buy Vanguard funds via a brokerage account. The firm has grown to now offer non-proprietary investment products and funds.

Fidelity is perhaps best known for its personal investment products, namely brokerage accounts that allow users to trade stocks. Clients can invest in a wide range of stocks, bonds and other investment products using a Fidelity brokerage account. Fidelity also makes an effort to provide investment resources to its clients and doesn't usually charge fees on all trades, though more and more brokerages and broker-dealers are moving toward fee-free investment models.

Schwab has a number of passively and actively managed funds that you can invest your money into. You also have the option to trade individual equities. It also offers free robo-advisor services, and those who want to work with a real advisor will have that option as well. [Learn how the fees compare here.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfpi7j2rse7c5n9beqr1q5bpe23n9fn1p55vts1o_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie2o36c5h2bs)

### How to Speak With a Financial Advisor

If you're interested in getting financial advice, consulting a fiduciary financial advisor can be a great first step. That's why SmartAsset created a [free tool](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj6qg26rfs6hmrlbbjgfs7vd45chtsrjp2bikla8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie2o36c5h2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors who serve your area. All advisors on the matching platform have been rigorously vetted through a proprietary due diligence process.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1 It's never too late to work towards a more comfortable retirement.
### [See how Vanguard, Fidelity and Schwab stack up »](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvn3tmtk2t3rcj3jqht3ngvbef1cl3h117pfhtio_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie2o36c5h2bs)
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**
Get retirement ready. Take this no-cost quiz to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area.
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc39t6qujij2kn26mob3o7c0un029ko8i9hg4jqg_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie2o36c5h2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
|
---
| | | Unless otherwise indicated, information is as of 5/4/2023. SmartAsset has no obligation to update any content in this article. This article may potentially include a firm or firms that have a business relationship with SmartAsset, in which SmartAsset is compensated for lead referrals or cost per engagement. SmartAsset is not a client of the aforementioned firms. SmartAsset did not receive compensation for including any of the firms in the aforementioned article. This article contains links to SmartAsset's financial advisor matching tool, which may or may not match you with the firms mentioned in this profile. The matching tool does not include all available advisors and firms and matches based on specific criteria (investable assets, geography, and willingness to work with a remote advisor). This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset's services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user's account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. Sources:
1. ["Journal of Retirement Study Winter" (2020)](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq70jdrtjp7j36kdl32iq3abslncso9ckpuq84ng_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie2o36c5h2bs). The projections or other information regarding the likelihood of various investment outcomes are hypothetical in nature, do not reflect actual investment results, and are not guarantees of your future results. Please follow the link to see the methodologies employed in the [Journal of Retirement study](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zta4q2mlb06vs5gqm1bf8t9703pgpjqkv43ukr88_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie2o36c5h2bs).

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9tg45ltgo1k9dn6v28lmb96f66nesovseo6c8t0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie2o36c5h2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z24i7gijp7u5dpvs166kbao3f5t4o8se8uipjhc0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie2o36c5h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8q87b3dje9l4uhfplpg5gjimppns9rgjg3pomq0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stie2o36c5h2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Your America
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35346%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y0jeU3oAMQrnJq7bh%2bs6Ag&sysid=1) |
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35347%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8KDihiO15bshOFuoikDJ6A&sysid=1)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35348%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ElWkzYYPjhHA4mmm9WyIQg&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35349%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fP6vtfs8Ll8du9CK06pSbQ&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35347%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8KDihiO15bshOFuoikDJ6A&sysid=1)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c9582%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=58xA8ic2Ig%2fvBVC6Y3Jo4w&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35340%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7MTWMKRIdGBteKrpDpGX8Q&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35341%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FA3zx9lkrwk87e0VH3lFHw&sysid=1)_

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Unveil the extraordinary leaders of military history in this free eBook
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsSCEXLiNP

In the annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been
attributed to a host of factors....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osSCEXLiNP

Dear
Friend,

In the
annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been
attributed to a host of factors-material resources, manpower,
pre-war strategies, and tactical doctrine all play a part in
determining the victors and the vanquished.

However,
as we delve deeper into the past, we uncover a truth that
surpasses conventional wisdom-a truth of extraordinary
significance.

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the
remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated
by the savior generals-visionary leaders displaying unparalleled
expertise.

Today,
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite
your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian
and Hoover Senior Fellow, Victor Davis Hanson, has authored a
groundbreaking eBook-Victory and the Savior Generals-a
captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional
leaders.

You can
secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Inside
its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the
defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity,
contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into
seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict,
rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment
with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is
your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most
influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate
even in the present day.

Claim
your complimentary copy of Victory and the Savior Generals now
through this secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Wishing
you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Hoover
Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA
94305

name: James Carville
subject: It’s official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:

| | | | |

| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf9b542af-edac-47a9-a3f6-d3122b857637/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._

I’ll tell you right now: we’ve gotta get serious about Pennsylvania’s Senate race. David McCormick — a mega-millionaire hedge fund guy who can spend HUGE sums of his own money and self-fund this race — is trying to flip PA’s Senate seat red. So the biggest mistake grassroots Democrats can make right now is to sit by and think that re-electing Bob Casey is a shoo-in. As someone who’s spent nearly half a century electing Democrats and winning tough elections across the country, I’m telling ya — this is gonna be a close one, and we gotta act now. [**Please, Peter will you split a donation of $20 or more between Bob Casey and Blue Amp Action? We CANNOT take Pennsylvania for granted.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c0f354c-a5c3-47b5-923d-d633d05aa8c8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| The fact is, Firstname, if we don’t rally for Bob RIGHT NOW, we’re toast. That’s how serious Mitch McConnell and his cronies are about winning this race. **National Republicans are getting ready to spend potentially more than EVER in the Keystone State!!!** I’ll take it one step further — if we want to win, I think we need to see a LOT more grassroots donations than we have since McCormick launched his campaign. [**Act now to shore up our strength in Pennsylvania. Split $20 or any amount between Blue Amp Action and Bob Casey's campaign to defend our Senate majority.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te5a162e8-4d2b-4dbb-873c-3f77ebd363c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| Thanks as always, James Carville

| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673028%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EXtupVzOD7JxQWYNLwIudQ&sysid=1 "This is a longer email but
I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden’s former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _“Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson.”_
* And I can’t even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I’m bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don’t intimidate me. _But I’ll let you in on a little secret: that’s not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It’s about power and money. Nothing else.**

That’s why it’s mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian- Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673029%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BpOStADM4AyhsFEetZKitA&sysid=1 "So as one of my first
moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority
Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between
now and the end of the month.")**_

It’s ambitious. I get it. But that’s the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we’ll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here’s my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can’t-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I’m not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673020%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NdUCbOP8EAVpuOIJu37Fqw&sysid=1 "The ONLY thing I ask is
for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?
---
**[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673021%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PZd2JkyCKng1yut34C%2f0XQ&sysid=1)[**YES >>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673022%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q3hkZqvWUI4Na2D5ThnU7g&sysid=1)_[**NO >>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673023%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KX6ZZmZlWliMTyB8uG%2f8nQ&sysid=1)**
---
Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,
Speaker Mike Johnson

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673024%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=biz7JafF9%2fK%2bn2%2fh3f0yPw&sysid=1 "Speaker Mike Johnson")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673035%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xkumhU7ETDvWPKhO6R2OUg&sysid=1 "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!")
---

This is Steve Scalise.

As your Majority Leader, I’m respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673036%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZD3nb3%2fAJANNwEqDAESB4Q&sysid=1 "MAJORITY LEADER
SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. It’s important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | [START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673037%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FzMAZ8%2f1Pk%2bZp700cganhg&sysid=1 "START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")
---

| Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement.

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Ronald Reagan was right
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before.

|
[ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=518ba450984f46ebafccecd6d0d75228&_e=fr9N5nKNtPi-0GtPZLo2mMttjLkxXT2Vhj0haBOJhVrmRoP5-RRn1dTNwzYPjmdCvNnxSwRAqTiyosPH1psV_SpIZp6VAg6f44CXvngEFr3gmk6C8u3Yx2j8hH-iIGAaZOiy39Z7i-FKziiKNWbbS2hXbLSDiNZC7QPajaaoCgO7y1iNxD0AzwBNiNCN4XUHpjv3BN46Z1F4RWYpqoL0gYwbTlm-hSSmRQSnv7B3dSu1-AzTYZpnj56RQajxFjkrndCUewFSkhGP_5g32GnYFOINg5d6BfqIxwYzs5HBQHCisOKN13Yd7riIiMZYR2KTOGZ-x0oloHF12JmWjkcFOL0LvqxuxwmPFTVV_ahQ6HxzqyBZICV6PhU_vIxmWcEUqGs7Pj6vvNVx-GSqFkWT2g%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American -

While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, _the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before._

When America was struggling greatly in the late 1970s, Ronald Reagan stood strong before the people and [**called upon us to return to our nation 's founding principles and paint again with bold colors instead of pale pastels.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=518ba450984f46ebafccecd6d0d75228&_e=fr9N5nKNtPi-0GtPZLo2mMttjLkxXT2Vhj0haBOJhVrmRoP5-RRn1dTNwzYPjmdCvNnxSwRAqTiyosPH1psV_SpIZp6VAg6f44CXvngEFr3gmk6C8u3Yx2j8hH-iIGAaZOiy39Z7i-FKziiKNWbbS2hXbLSDiNZC7QPajaaoCgO7y1iNxD0AzwBNiNCN4XUHpjv3BN46Z1F4RWYpqoL0gYwbTlm-hSSmRQSnv7B3dSu1-AzTYZpnj56RQajxFjkr50mq_8mVIMdulUrWYFc7GVTybaK27iUfrSA-cQQZcUq9CIoVUaEvwtGyqGF14m-atTbX9EFgKFzDWfgLnsZ4ZS0wkLZ4ugQqYsdF4o1k_jkRvJYCl2Jm-3-gMB1NwBRXvzny1iN7lxGjhRTkE0b-hg%3D%3D)

[** RESTORE AMERICA > **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=518ba450984f46ebafccecd6d0d75228&_e=fr9N5nKNtPi-0GtPZLo2mMttjLkxXT2Vhj0haBOJhVrmRoP5-RRn1dTNwzYPjmdCvNnxSwRAqTiyosPH1psV_SpIZp6VAg6f44CXvngEFr3gmk6C8u3Yx2j8hH-iIGAaZOiy39Z7i-FKziiKNWbbS2hXbLSDiNZC7QPajaaoCgO7y1iNxD0AzwBNiNCN4XUHpjv3BN46Z1F4RWYpqoL0gYwbTlm-hSSmRQSnv7B3dSu1-AzTYZpnj56RQajxFjkrjUG0sNGw6m9eFToZek19obK4l64lSPMtIxcVzjutC3sqjjaiBEs-WxxohuRJvc0kgbI_09PdwRdwgd7ArUHfxT08VZaVVMlToJt2eEk0mj2lmatfaPcZdX2K3qMlkRdOmBFWx9EnPWqJWd3i3NX2zQ%3D%3D)
_Republicans desperately needed that clarity and conviction,_ and Reagan understood that a well-articulated vision and public policy grounded in our timeless conservative principles were the keys to restoring our country and preserving freedom.

[**The principles that made America, and brought us back during the Reagan Revolution, must guide us still today:**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=518ba450984f46ebafccecd6d0d75228&_e=fr9N5nKNtPi-0GtPZLo2mMttjLkxXT2Vhj0haBOJhVrmRoP5-RRn1dTNwzYPjmdCvNnxSwRAqTiyosPH1psV_SpIZp6VAg6f44CXvngEFr3gmk6C8u3Yx2j8hH-iIGAaZOiy39Z7i-FKziiKNWbbS2hXbLSDiNZC7QPajaaoCgO7y1iNxD0AzwBNiNCN4XUHpjv3BN46Z1F4RWYpqoL0gYwbTlm-hSSmRQSnv7B3dSu1-AzTYZpnj56RQajxFjkrI6dG4JhknHE4HxDCNC9_piuzgRE2dAyVmYfQIcE8bMV4cGYkg41MSexrTQO07n7u6qupV_1FukrvGE53GfTBEX3aW-RH5uugNFTnqbtm6aLYvCXKKiN7gdohnnqVU5qbK7hdvndyyi3TTVvFilcSeQ%3D%3D)

* Individual freedom
* Limited government
* The rule of law
* Peace through strength
* Fiscal responsibility
* Free markets
* Human dignity
* The sanctity of human life

**I believe it is our duty as Americans to stand for conservative values without compromise.** I am fighting every day for the same vision that Ronald Reagan once had. As Speaker of the House, it is my job to unite our party on what it will take to win and save America. [**Are you with me?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=518ba450984f46ebafccecd6d0d75228&_e=fr9N5nKNtPi-0GtPZLo2mMttjLkxXT2Vhj0haBOJhVrmRoP5-RRn1dTNwzYPjmdCvNnxSwRAqTiyosPH1psV_SpIZp6VAg6f44CXvngEFr3gmk6C8u3Yx2j8hH-iIGAaZOiy39Z7i-FKziiKNWbbS2hXbLSDiNZC7QPajaaoCgO7y1iNxD0AzwBNiNCN4XUHpjv3BN46Z1F4RWYpqoL0gYwbTlm-hSSmRQSnv7B3dSu1-AzTYZpnj56RQajxFjkrWgdhICc8c40PXDj8wp1S4CHBhNk_dTB7YM515Ignfy1Mr6BnqjoGAvKf7DIP91-NcGAFX018jSARMw40FuJThUwrOCylRRw_yBogo44EMbeFPDLOZUvzWVvyuJmuzq3YCcDSJdQP-UELkjGKwtm2rQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before. | Fellow American - While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before. When America was struggling greatly in the late 1970s, Ronald Reagan stood strong before the people and Republicans desperately needed that clarity and conviction, and Reagan understood that a well-articulated vision and public policy grounded in our timeless conservative principles were the keys to restoring our country and preserving freedom. Individual freedom Limited government The rule of law Peace through strength Fiscal responsibility Free markets Human dignity The sanctity of human life I believe it is our duty as Americans to stand for conservative values without compromise. I am fighting every day for the same vision that Ronald Reagan once had. As Speaker of the House, it is my job to unite our party on what it will take to win and save America. As I lead the critical fight to restore our country and defend our values, We have a chance to save America from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. For America, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Greedy company released toxic chemicals into the sea
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2114015?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **If your community was DEVASTATED by a corporation releasing TOXIC CHEMICALS, wouldn’t you want compensation? Accountability for the company that ruined your life?** In 2016, a Formosa Plastics steel plant in Vietnam released chemicals into the sea, **killing untold numbers of marine animals and ruining millions of people’s lives** who depend on the sea and its fish. Most victims have received** ZERO dollars in compensation **from Formosa Plastics. Activists demanding restitution for Formosa Plastics’ victims have launched a **_global hunger strike_** from the front of a petrochemical plant in Texas, where Formosa Plastics has also committed environmental crimes, including releasing **billions of plastic pellets** into waterways.**[Please, Friend, support the activists who are putting their bodies on the line and tell Formosa Plastics to compensate the people whose lives it has ruined!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2114016?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** ***Your Signature is Needed Now*** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2114017?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
If Formosa Plastics isn’t held accountable for its actions in Vietnam, what’s to stop its next factory from causing another catastrophe? For example, Formosa Plastics has plans to build a mega-polluting plastics plant in **Cancer Alley **– a region of Louisiana already poisoned by more than**200 petrochemical plants and refineries.**
Formosa Plastics has a long history of corruption, environmental harm, and human rights offenses. It’s past time it was held accountable before it hurts more people. That’s why brave activists are taking a stand – but** they’re getting hungrier every second we wait. [Will you help us meet our midnight goal of 6,381 more signatures and help hold Formosa Plastics accountable?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2114018?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2114019?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Paloma Henriques
Senior Petrochemical Campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=537a9ea590af4121973ea0392df21269&_e=F3o_x7PuNd36ZULyUijup0Gk2wCRY4g2UqnaMD-q2ZqXIGygKFltwmDt7clUTQIYNA0iuz3KIV9dJs8kPgqg7-9cEqTQUJ8L3_okd8F2x3hPIF4batA7nrxzvo7nPui5aH9CGmejsmUUsd0DnKGAc282fEbifg4lrlSggO1w7pWkSHQDuqbn60SpxZ70hGFwN31Gn2SSZ8kiPC4ZfTmiY75Jl6jjHhdM7P08_GgiwfdTP0GlD0jTyPtzpomhQmaGtvvb8w8KDMrhQSCjUzZ1R7XhW--9bRMSD75l4TecwU2QwvaXvB7SB2NL80RuzHf-). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=537a9ea590af4121973ea0392df21269&_e=F3o_x7PuNd36ZULyUijup0Gk2wCRY4g2UqnaMD-q2ZqXIGygKFltwmDt7clUTQIYNA0iuz3KIV9dJs8kPgqg7-9cEqTQUJ8L3_okd8F2x3hPIF4batA7nrxzvo7nPui5aH9CGmejsmUUsd0DnKGAc6XSwDAJ8Mfr3fDvzsgIUO2HW7aAqT7RJr379ZW_yRO1-3_8zWKk0ELyz_Vz5MQlIrWnB5ZQxZS8NgbYoj12HDLTXVDatLqnVLYQcu4eeKfY1pdb6IL08N59cXCV3DlmuFzqb1h_u3puPs04blVq7ORA-Ip4kAJjmsUjwbciSg7U) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. clean_body: The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis This might be your only warning. According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: " Food shortages are coming." Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling -. When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. on these survival food kits while you can. subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.

body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=58345bea2ef646ee9c7394a7ff4967ae&_e=6idWf0gKnYesxAzwS82u6HWwHn8jLH1jmsQxiJN5DIct5Z8OM-zip9dWKsUijEDmYCWm_IWckF2I3oez9nAPT1UiTjKyhl9sSBxKHQKCpKn7wgn1ceevYVwYXRSBCKq7x5YVR42mB2kBE4z2EHqi2Y7XOgky4EbVkS1N4s9-JlAATcTP0dmUixqA7xQisyUwtpPpnlW0WxO7rQwdMB5uUHNBGeKlI_YdBOeFHLFvAbDOsWolzZwUHkBjAjb--gjMXC3cDM6WzchGlBUyLFFXTPm2QYRWgMfI0S6T5Vonph0bmtRN76OZdE6lgu28D9j4Uj738sfc4ttyarS2aCreUbclPqPv9joLITd_scdVFczNpJFcDACkHYT720f8IayMN9xlpEXRB6kifnO9JEmtmWXxuGDferDhDxBt0FCJelUHKDREHNeJUCzys7xgC4VFl43wSPlwZ9TpChsDeCwMsrk4W8MT4Gl1AmXSnSLWBBw%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=58345bea2ef646ee9c7394a7ff4967ae&_e=6idWf0gKnYesxAzwS82u6HWwHn8jLH1jmsQxiJN5DIct5Z8OM-zip9dWKsUijEDmYCWm_IWckF2I3oez9nAPT1UiTjKyhl9sSBxKHQKCpKn7wgn1ceevYVwYXRSBCKq7x5YVR42mB2kBE4z2EHqi2Y7XOgky4EbVkS1N4s9-JlAATcTP0dmUixqA7xQisyUwtpPpnlW0WxO7rQwdMB5uUHNBGeKlI_YdBOeFHLFvAbDOsWolzZwUHkBjAjb--gjMXC3cDM6WzchGlBUyLFFXTPm2QYRWgMfI0S6T5Vonph0bmtRN76OZdE6lgu28D9j4ae_LLNWvM4nh1er_nEvUp9NnD8u0D2b40BbrrXRXUuPCN797JasQEq3J9BljKwAiEwOW3_C7d4yoK1pmzlZUliaOT1_w9VHz4SvxbHx4UPXuYhyqjjln-wA1WnlGCGq_QXZo5IMHsBv9K2zaKpIWmJEOCywq7CHm_vuT3Sdm9qo%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=58345bea2ef646ee9c7394a7ff4967ae&_e=6idWf0gKnYesxAzwS82u6HWwHn8jLH1jmsQxiJN5DIct5Z8OM-zip9dWKsUijEDmYCWm_IWckF2I3oez9nAPT1UiTjKyhl9sSBxKHQKCpKn7wgn1ceevYVwYXRSBCKq7x5YVR42mB2kBE4z2EHqi2Y7XOgky4EbVkS1N4s9-JlAATcTP0dmUixqA7xQisyUwtpPpnlW0WxO7rQwdMB5uUHNBGeKlI_YdBOeFHLFvAbDOsWolzZwUHkBjAjb--gjMXC3cDM6WzchGlBUyLFFXTPm2QYRWgMfI0S6T5Vonph0bmtRN76OZdE6lgu28D9j4Cj_y9i5ffE868chQ8RxPswv6LJCNqfh4GpD2_frD4YwcRk9T8VNGPL8rzPbcc7970YLR9dPpAyBdol0CqJy_HOk9-U6s_Qe_lfuEAVqC_0fi-Zi31wAZQxspLi0UUeuCEHTa5OEzC1fxMXB4m36BDkoCyVWl9vog3Q4EYQc03LM%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?

The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC. Politico fired off this headline: " Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson." And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports. Look: These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not really the goal... The real goal of this political ambush is two-fold: 1) smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and 2) scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats. It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | "START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY >>" | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock or scare you - I say it because it's true. _What we see today didn 't happen overnight. It's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **... and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I'd know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ - radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan - then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I've dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That's why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** - and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I'm asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I'll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=26c6ed58c7024753ac68546b6677a05c&_e=zhaZxTOk9kXtlwh-H21TIgJtbixURUHyHwAJgFfOmoyikVxlzbd-nVUArPcX6vxvQel1b13_rpEMuTcOW1Gpn23wZf1tBZ-kBBOwRJWvcD78rsVy0ikAaJrHMk7MBYaj2HEGEzK3GGNSzaFG8IUvYTfIt5s3QFCRiA5z29AT9CfIAsc1uZ5OEOiC7rB_5oNmGxk3sH5Lk8gmmSQvg5vJvW334L2SNYU6WBYtjLIrK0H5FJGBytlhpzdjjodJnvy1NPjLbeKLM46DLEGyk5-9fnnan_MoYfOZfLWVJp9upZpG9NoVvGaz8_HKgqSv5rbHhigN_mQPyYCj2MsYE-Z2Y1VikdGjzhQZsLXSux7bQGtP19dhsDcsltPFVTVrdzmk-PF_Wdwm1WYe95Mc-cedJw%3D%3D)** When you think of "the enemy within" you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn't be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making - but most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. **That 's why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state - and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... "A Great Book" - Dinesh D'Souza "_The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life." - Mark Levin "David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation." Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We've reached the point in our history that will decide our future - and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That's why I'll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left's evil agenda to every American patriot.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=26c6ed58c7024753ac68546b6677a05c&_e=zhaZxTOk9kXtlwh-H21TIgJtbixURUHyHwAJgFfOmoyikVxlzbd-nVUArPcX6vxvQel1b13_rpEMuTcOW1Gpn23wZf1tBZ-kBBOwRJWvcD78rsVy0ikAaJrHMk7MBYaj2HEGEzK3GGNSzaFG8IUvYTfIt5s3QFCRiA5z29AT9CfIAsc1uZ5OEOiC7rB_5oNmGxk3sH5Lk8gmmSQvg5vJvW334L2SNYU6WBYtjLIrK0H5FJGBytlhpzdjjodJnvy1VYQTIZic7Kxmh0hUIRY-AOlDzP6L4DqVye4SHmiJWJElnpod3lAPyVmXF0sR5q9qSWF1jk6dJLKs0PrG-k2VljhbXXdj7biu3YAdayAdb1Pq9Wnnr9jV38Vo0ZyBus5r4sjG9xTz91S9kEAyBNKy_g%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don't simply disagree with us about how to make our country better - they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama's own words "radically transform" America. **And they don 't care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it's up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I'll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=26c6ed58c7024753ac68546b6677a05c&_e=zhaZxTOk9kXtlwh-H21TIgJtbixURUHyHwAJgFfOmoyikVxlzbd-nVUArPcX6vxvQel1b13_rpEMuTcOW1Gpn23wZf1tBZ-kBBOwRJWvcD78rsVy0ikAaJrHMk7MBYaj2HEGEzK3GGNSzaFG8IUvYTfIt5s3QFCRiA5z29AT9CfIAsc1uZ5OEOiC7rB_5oNmGxk3sH5Lk8gmmSQvg5vJvW334L2SNYU6WBYtjLIrK0H5FJGBytlhpzdjjodJnvy1f3oWGmjMxSbw2XFsvw_od-z7X_fIKpkiRUk1QVgDHSCRKc_K623GFagWwiL0QsA2_N3g-0Npsov7_pvOrSHocHSGfcwCV_DzhowF6yFLcBBCpKD6Ln2AD7o3FDse9S2pV9W-xLiFHUxzv-IpJXWNGg%3D%3D)**

House Republicans and I have voted to CENSURE antisemite Rashida Talib, and now the Radical Left is furious.

| |
It's official, Friend.

House Republicans and I have voted to CENSURE radical Rashida Talib for her vile antisemitism.

**For too long radicals like Talib have been allowed to spew their hateful rhetoric, but as long as I 'm in charge, they will be held accountable.**

But make no mistake, this move doesn't come without consequences.

The Radical Left is furious, and now they're coming after me like never before.

House Republicans and I have voted to CENSURE radical Rashida Talib for her vile antisemitism. For too long radicals like Talib have been allowed to spew their hateful rhetoric, but as long as I 'm in charge, they will be held accountable. But make no mistake, this move doesn't come without consequences. The Radical Left is furious, and now they're coming after me like never before. "I won’t back down from this fight, but I need you in my corner. Will you stand with me? " | | | "Generic Button" This is a battle of good vs. evil. I will never surrender, and I know you won't either. We can defeat the Radical Left's attacks and continue to hold them accountable if we stick together. subject: Did you miss a big week, friend?

body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=945cb77c711f3a364fa666adc90442589a2d3552b6b1c73b3c77f7148559f1ac66a371d615bb1dd9d4b730fd634be0d78a19365251c16bb815ebeb2975a25d0c25426344e31d7a3db8efc75358bae04e

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1cfecf04ce4afc48fb36a3406eed44b133a0eb2c6b35197381944b9da9f31971fb61f62a7e2bc4cef048cc63d919635114573856e42f977ae59bb092c440424c

Friend,

A major endorsement, a huge debate win, and a day to honor our veterans. This week was a big week for our campaign. Learn more!

MAJOR ENDORSEMENT

Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds announced her full endorsement of Ron DeSantis because she knows he is the only candidate who can win for this country next November

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1cfecf04ce4afc48fb36a3406eed44b133a0eb2c6b35197381944b9da9f31971fb61f62a7e2bc4cef048cc63d919635114573856e42f977ae59bb092c440424c

"I believe that Ron is the right person for the right job. And I believe he's going to win." - Governor Kim Reynolds

Have you pledged your support for Ron DeSantis yet, friend? We'd like to add your name to our supporters list!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1cfecf04ce4afc48fb36a3406eed44b133a0eb2c6b35197381944b9da9f31971fb61f62a7e2bc4cef048cc63d919635114573856e42f977ae59bb092c440424c
ADD YOUR ENDORSEMENT

FUN FACTS

-
Reynolds’ endorsement of Ron DeSantis is historic. This is the first time since 1996 that a sitting Iowa governor has endorsed in the Republican presidential primary.
-
As the most popular Republican in the state of Iowa, Kim Reynolds’ support will take DeSantis’ unmatched ground game in Iowa to a whole new level.

HUGE DEBATE WIN

On Wednesday night, Ron DeSantis won his third debate against the GOP field of candidates.

-
He promised to rip up Joe Biden's radical policies.
-
He set the narrative straight with the TRUTH.
-
He proved how to WIN for the Republican Party.
-
He showed the nation once again how strong America could be under a DeSantis presidency.

"I'll be a leader you can be proud of. And as President, I will not let you down." - Governor Ron DeSantis.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1cfecf04ce4afc48fb36a3406eed44b133a0eb2c6b35197381944b9da9f31971fb61f62a7e2bc4cef048cc63d919635114573856e42f977ae59bb092c440424c
After this huge debate win, supporters are lining up to join our team and support Ron DeSantis. Join them by pledging your support today!

HONORING HEROES

This week, we celebrated the veterans in our lives and honored those who served. We believe it's time to get a veteran back in the Oval Office, so we're raising support by offering a specialty veterans tee!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1cfecf04ce4afc480ab8e23269fc7fa62c5cc7724169cd50bbfa19c5cda787b3e6f82b69ba632f9067654ee09849c2befde48a9165b2795f5e62d5938b0bb5ac

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1cfecf04ce4afc480ab8e23269fc7fa62c5cc7724169cd50bbfa19c5cda787b3e6f82b69ba632f9067654ee09849c2befde48a9165b2795f5e62d5938b0bb5ac
CHECK IT OUT

We're proud of a historic week for our campaign, and we look forward to many more. We would love your support to kick our campaign up to the next level! We're counting on your help to get this job done and save our country. Let us know if you'll offer your endorsement!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1cfecf04ce4afc48fb36a3406eed44b133a0eb2c6b35197381944b9da9f31971fb61f62a7e2bc4cef048cc63d919635114573856e42f977ae59bb092c440424c
I support Ron DeSantis

BONUS

Did you hear? A Daily Mail poll released poll results that show voters believe Ron DeSantis won this debate in a landslide.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1cfecf04ce4afc48fb36a3406eed44b133a0eb2c6b35197381944b9da9f31971fb61f62a7e2bc4cef048cc63d919635114573856e42f977ae59bb092c440424c

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1cfecf04ce4afc48cfb65d5f9c13782e5e280574a1099f8ac8ec7bfc35acdfd63d7f1dbe2b02f7697c8d8866fe8222a614f2b3d4a35c7caae7a80fcb938ed4b5

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Interview with Dave Reichert
body:
This weekend we honor the men and women who have served our
nation by celebrating Veteran's Day!

The team here at Shift WA has
been working to shift the political debate in Washington state
since 2013. We've spent the last decade providing people like you
with the facts and perspectives needed to hopefully make a
difference in your community. So, as always, we will help keep
you-up-to-date with an item or two of interest from your own
backyard. Read on...

This week's Newsmaker
Interview...
This week we talked with Andrea
Suarez, Founder and Executive Director of the non-profit
volunteer organization We Heart Seattle. In a very short time the
group has made a significant impact in cleaning up encampments
and helping people get off the streets. Created during the
height of the COVID pandemic in 2020 when homeless encampments
were filling Seattle's parks, sidewalks, and other public places,
We Heart Seattle challenged the status quo regarding how best to
help those struggling with drugs and homelessness. Along the
way, they have encountered protests by a small group of
extremists as volunteers have cleaned up encampments and
attempted to help those who were suffering. Read more...

This week's top story…
We assume part of Governor
Inslee's decision to take a carbon polluting flight to the U.N.
was to get away from the increasingly louder local noise over his
costly cap-and-tax scheme and the Washington Policy Center's case
that "Governor Inslee's office and others in his administration
are upset that we and others refer to the cost of the CO2
allowances in the law as a 'tax.' The governor's office and
others have resorted to some very convoluted language and logic
to avoid using that politically powerful word." Read more...

In case you missed it…
Leave it to the local paper to
put the finishing touches on the Democrat plan to let the courts
do their re-districting dirty work. That's the take from the
Yakima Herald editorial page, which writes that "(W)hatever
happens with the District 15 boundaries from here, somebody won't
be happy, so more suits or appeals could be in the works soon. We
wouldn't be surprised if the courts were still haggling over this
one when the next census comes around." However, the local paper
takes a dim view of the Dems' motivation for the lawsuit,
pointing out that "some Democrats - particularly those who live
west of the Cascade Range - seem confident that a clear Latino
majority in the 15th would automatically add a nice hue of blue
to Central Washington. But they're living in a fantasy world if
they take for granted that Latinos will lean left." Read more...

Governor Inslee's pennies can
sure add up...

DONATE

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift
Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of
your friends, you can click here to do so.

You can also stay up to date on
our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following
us on Facebook & Twitter.
If you believe you received this message
in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift
Washington, click to unsubscribe.

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673046%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Xt3E53WdLcIEiqrYhmB0cA&sysid=1). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673047%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oDIFuTgHZPm4kzerMI%2byCA&sysid=1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673048%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ECXt2ASweZS1fw8UMTzVgA&sysid=1) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

American Update

name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e21c413bb1ea4dfe8498145cc2bbc234&_e=RK0k09zXAK-mjqNA2_h92jj73_IJfi9uhj_FFxMYZtcDl1MJh5oap-TjwTKE7l9DJQuNA9qluU9ClYfxRZEn1qea3VONADGyCVdqjiYlZucXvl_dRUu389IgmmoG8C9_fiZSd6hIGr22NHgzI7xxfwSInL2c3Olu1j2e-1c3QD99b5fLBYqlWSJ34zht--oWz_QHRSawNN4CFujNpaEA6iXJLFz7rPIWCooQWWddGg6kwyvtnNzNwvJGAl8kJkPMIkXOY-U4YJsDwd_5YcGNrngdwhJ6drbJAaepuwvW_W8X6SOegyP2J1VAWA08JS9A) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e21c413bb1ea4dfe8498145cc2bbc234&_e=RK0k09zXAK-mjqNA2_h92jj73_IJfi9uhj_FFxMYZtcDl1MJh5oap-TjwTKE7l9DJQuNA9qluU9ClYfxRZEn1qea3VONADGyCVdqjiYlZucXvl_dRUu389IgmmoG8C9_fiZSd6hIGr22NHgzI7xxf5yfoQofJaSKskn1BSJZw1dWm5S8QZBf71Hv0WczFRr233IDimDYQua3F2MjaHx6JOHzyIh3XLupDj5lUIcIx0Zk0ORP3KcFQrX-0jEFP76q-cOTp8LAV99I9JEtNjxxNknT6eT8mCI_UOXWahmnrywm-qQ0Q2l5Xrm9jEjH92tT) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VSpvGkwTWj62ePbFDtj3tQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnM3fAP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QSUZTTjExMDEyM19STV9ST05fMjAyMzExMTJXA3NwY0IKZUacu1BlASpUwFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VSpvGkwTWj62ePbFDtj3tQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnM3fAP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QSUZTTjExMDEyM19STV9ST05fMjAyMzExMTJXA3NwY0IKZUacu1BlASpUwFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VSpvGkwTWj62ePbFDtj3tQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnM3fAP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QSUZTTjExMDEyM19STV9ST05fMjAyMzExMTJXA3NwY0IKZUacu1BlASpUwFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) on these survival food kits while you can.

body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

| | This sponsored message from Conservatives Gives is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a367a47e14ec4e08a3f065ac93bf2377&_e=iYqsvQ4rTlvGRTwCl8h5er9QNgOgqM4BEj-8UwW_ov_jC4dZzG2tnGOZTpH55uktlhTy8JyI3eW6g3nStZzz6SmjOeQDo-k22cBuH0nS_IMMTXChalsrLx4HbabcWjX8nP7IkOzHMgK6x36zdivfsWmo4js43D6izNffcV4FyvBevw5mdjaE9X7vRVZj33NOvjhx27F8bhrLwjZfzmPQiHOTOJtP20NuEDnKEeCe3yV2976BtK-VcxKyNz9Z6IO2T2IqK9wRyuOjJQrL7UCAwfy2pox0qTDmJzTvKG5iSITmdxM9ZuRSM8Sl_Q-R2xQBU-USqPjelNAcnbQHJmjrFBseJ-oz3wl8IUkybUj4hZmaAXpaRdF3ktZP-ABiXCuW9t7AYRxx1MM3d4gl5SAFwDafqp0u7BpvIgMcVg3V4uM%3D)
