Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a367a47e14ec4e08a3f065ac93bf2377&_e=iYqsvQ4rTlvGRTwCl8h5er9QNgOgqM4BEj-8UwW_ov_jC4dZzG2tnGOZTpH55uktlhTy8JyI3eW6g3nStZzz6SmjOeQDo-k22cBuH0nS_IMMTXChalsrLx4HbabcWjX8nP7IkOzHMgK6x36zdivfsWmo4js43D6izNffcV4FyvBevw5mdjaE9X7vRVZj33NOvjhx27F8bhrLwjZfzmPQiHOTOJtP20NuEDnKEeCe3yV2976BtK-VcxKyNz9Z6IO2eI2lvtz30-9LU5qguOVU2dJ56RKID9jrdsnqSJqjvqlcKZtHLgGksPgLfC1Gl3dFxBrYQbPIyi9xZWgNiS1xRL8S7GEn9wY6NKwLbDfJ21SAUcDGU4ErjPFCb07rwUduScahkE90dMJbHs9MxzEEp7ckU_rNlNgPgJSm3rcD-3o%3D)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a367a47e14ec4e08a3f065ac93bf2377&_e=iYqsvQ4rTlvGRTwCl8h5er9QNgOgqM4BEj-8UwW_ov_jC4dZzG2tnGOZTpH55uktlhTy8JyI3eW6g3nStZzz6SmjOeQDo-k22cBuH0nS_IMMTXChalsrLx4HbabcWjX8nP7IkOzHMgK6x36zdivfsWmo4js43D6izNffcV4FyvBevw5mdjaE9X7vRVZj33NOvjhx27F8bhrLwjZfzmPQiHOTOJtP20NuEDnKEeCe3yV2976BtK-VcxKyNz9Z6IO2Wrmt_1Kkeu_rBQyNHdVMze6zbHhAR6Zht8HUBVKPSCnxiPzmc01wdmpKx7Nnf_fKjklMRLXL__PoR4dH451ryWlNmk-zCz9-13wbMPATBjM-YZIG23Xk5ZiM-hKEDEf8IclL61PAuD6eggh4WBoS229i69E8xBewJjLCYb5np7w%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a367a47e14ec4e08a3f065ac93bf2377&_e=iYqsvQ4rTlvGRTwCl8h5er9QNgOgqM4BEj-8UwW_ov_jC4dZzG2tnGOZTpH55uktlhTy8JyI3eW6g3nStZzz6SmjOeQDo-k22cBuH0nS_IMMTXChalsrLx4HbabcWjX8nP7IkOzHMgK6x36zdivfsWmo4js43D6izNffcV4FyvBevw5mdjaE9X7vRVZj33NOvjhx27F8bhrLwjZfzmPQiHOTOJtP20NuEDnKEeCe3yV2976BtK-VcxKyNz9Z6IO2ps5Y0dZXPYPSk23GwITdZ-wXsvTtXz119R8lnMSPT_wZU-psUvgxn54lpzrQCFHbAByVHUzR-jg2PHCgWBm8rpLrcQdAiOzBOet7gRFRR1xIr-SnYzlTgvdF0W968bDi6zqP-iUslcm0JNcFdoGkF_wa_-NwPzWPscMXMA3--xc%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a367a47e14ec4e08a3f065ac93bf2377&_e=iYqsvQ4rTlvGRTwCl8h5er9QNgOgqM4BEj-8UwW_ov_jC4dZzG2tnGOZTpH55uktlhTy8JyI3eW6g3nStZzz6SmjOeQDo-k22cBuH0nS_IMMTXChalsrLx4HbabcWjX8nP7IkOzHMgK6x36zdivfsWmo4js43D6izNffcV4FyvBevw5mdjaE9X7vRVZj33NOvjhx27F8bhrLwjZfzmPQiHOTOJtP20NuEDnKEeCe3yV2976BtK-VcxKyNz9Z6IO2bSCGrsbC6WlQKAk3lNVQc3BWC1WpEjhKbd0ECgUp3zB-J1HYoSvO4RghQgp1kdFMkNnzek1SY_Sud273J8lbH8AWKnc4dG76Le6k6_4OKW7N3MpSDaCS-8d3Fyr0nd0suegLF1xOPDbo5FvaT4umRkDIqs-JPP332B4Y1jkumJw%3D)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government? For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Conservatives Gives 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Your America
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
You are an informed citizen--I believe that wholeheartedly.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35456%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f5d8fjMUZtyrM4Uuxuqr6g&sysid=1)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen--I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren’t afraid to stand up for America’s founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. _**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today ...](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35457%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t3ZupDKfAB2vKRQu%2bVLGyQ&sysid=1)**_

## Do you believe it is important for Americans to have basic knowledge of American history and civics, including knowledge about the Constitution?
[Yes](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35458%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TXugFMXmRUhiw1lJ0uwUDg&sysid=1) [No](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35459%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RdhSI37SrvZzcRO8zBPHog&sysid=1) [Not Sure / Don't Know](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35450%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6FBcBSTF%2bnMKf09EuFpFtw&sysid=1)
We need more citizens like you--_informed citizens_ --because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can’t let that happen! That’s why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our nationwide initiative--the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand
* WHAT the Constitution says;
* HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that “educators” deliberately deceived or who just haven’t learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable. ** That’s because we’re seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ , and this initiative starts with you--YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education **today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35451%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rjy4%2bVvuJFCmY7hGvPlldA&sysid=1) For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c9583%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=p4oSvLiWZ1w30YEF4RlV4Q&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35452%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bk9AKZRxwnXCej%2f96rLCZQ&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35453%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SutpHu%2ftwpCnmZxaGllj5Q&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c9583%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=p4oSvLiWZ1w30YEF4RlV4Q&sysid=1)

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: We must remember what President Reagan said about God.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
"The time has come to turn to God and reassert our..."

|
---
| | |
**" The time has come to turn to God and reassert our trust in Him for the healing of America - our country is in need of and ready for a spiritual renewal." _\- Ronald Reagan_**
If only President Reagan could see us now, Friend.

Speaker Mike Johnson here, and I have a small favor to ask of you.

**Christian leaders throughout the country are raising the alarm as church attendance falls.**

Surveys show that not only are fewer Americans attending church every week, but fewer and fewer people are identifying as religious at all. It's clear that our country is in crisis, but I need to hear from God-fearing Americans like you on the matter. **[Will you take our Religion in America Survey and tell us what you've noticed in your church?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=62071f9931754e8e8b6564144fe2c9f2&_e=t96DDo-yuD_oOXwLqRrwZb1z5UrFittvVRtUHZE2B74V4_w0_u0S2ktG02FtCBS_jsJFBb2JxstNLQl3XkVOvCTlBHzpILtt9wz7BKv5oBycrntRFdFGYw-BvNWLVQhFhmUmXLm1p3lihl7QXsIwAlfMADNRwVWwY8NOFGh_h1MabXRR2TQCmHZ4zPwuHAdqw6c97hNoSZJPfcmgj4wbitsfwE8JmF5y3IKrGhxPYK2kO9Tjgvw0hLtEelsMPUr_gaB-IoQ_RNhHuUrGStRlduYvcbZrxG68_WuS4PO42jwv4MzgBl2Zxohfmj-PgXKeQlHb8HAVINQG02GSJZHO-lTBZt7KXJ5NXGRvaqtB2NkvKNt1Gu15AiR2Niw5BpUyEJKs6xduulgNv2Zul3LPgMWLEKzvUFJXPtfpqd5k147YLkwjJui-2JSUv3YHiiRaraXTrp0wDZ9B7hZo-mx-jg%3D%3D "Will you take our Religion in America Survey and tell us what you’ve noticed in your church?")**

---
| | | [COMPLETE RELIGION IN AMERICA SURVEY](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=62071f9931754e8e8b6564144fe2c9f2&_e=t96DDo-yuD_oOXwLqRrwZb1z5UrFittvVRtUHZE2B74V4_w0_u0S2ktG02FtCBS_jsJFBb2JxstNLQl3XkVOvCTlBHzpILtt9wz7BKv5oBycrntRFdFGYw-BvNWLVQhFhmUmXLm1p3lihl7QXsIwAlfMADNRwVWwY8NOFGh_h1MabXRR2TQCmHZ4zPwuHAdqw6c97hNoSZJPfcmgj4wbitsfwE8JmF5y3IKrGhxPYK2kO9Tjgvw0hLtEelsMPUr_gaB-IoQ_RNhHuUrGStRlduYvcbZrxG68_WuS4PO42jyuxXW-_P30y9NmCkR7rATQ8UgHZlhF5d0m_EypkXIsaM8N9J4wRmxqi1wIr4rtK9E95d7Kk_o1fLgWmZZwuxcCgpx12VNTGe8EqscaNbX_IADH0K-flyJzL77tn3Yoalrfs3ELrIkpdwV5Qh_c5M6Mytf05W3VYUCHpSft9GIp-w%3D%3D "Generic Button")
---

**A more secular America is not a better America, Friend.**

Look around. Drugs and violence fill our streets, and children are fed lies about our history in school, as the filth that passes for popular culture these days encourages the next generation to embrace anti-Biblical lifestyle choices.

House Republicans and I are working overtime to reverse these troubling trends and turn America back towards God, but we can't do that without your help. **[Will you do your part and complete your Religion in America Survey today?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=62071f9931754e8e8b6564144fe2c9f2&_e=t96DDo-yuD_oOXwLqRrwZb1z5UrFittvVRtUHZE2B74V4_w0_u0S2ktG02FtCBS_jsJFBb2JxstNLQl3XkVOvCTlBHzpILtt9wz7BKv5oBycrntRFdFGYw-BvNWLVQhFhmUmXLm1p3lihl7QXsIwAlfMADNRwVWwY8NOFGh_h1MabXRR2TQCmHZ4zPwuHAdqw6c97hNoSZJPfcmgj4wbitsfwE8JmF5y3IKrGhxPYK2kO9Tjgvw0hLtEelsMPUr_gaB-IoQ_RNhHuUrGStRlduYvcbZrxG68_WuS4PO42jy6O6FuFlhbgdD8SSU8u2urkmL-YrUxWaoZ-qfsTexMlRPmBA65XyR3pA_qbDU38H0UzmkDyBwAMqeqoBJfU8Xslc4vREZSiL3GNopSshLge2emJBoApLPZ3j3tz80zCKPYfaC0nChI1AGpj2ZEGjSjcTxMe_uvUfbEjgepQGR8pQ%3D%3D "Will you do your part and complete your Religion in America Survey today?")**

---
| | | [COMPLETE RELIGION IN AMERICA SURVEY](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=62071f9931754e8e8b6564144fe2c9f2&_e=t96DDo-yuD_oOXwLqRrwZb1z5UrFittvVRtUHZE2B74V4_w0_u0S2ktG02FtCBS_jsJFBb2JxstNLQl3XkVOvCTlBHzpILtt9wz7BKv5oBycrntRFdFGYw-BvNWLVQhFhmUmXLm1p3lihl7QXsIwAlfMADNRwVWwY8NOFGh_h1MabXRR2TQCmHZ4zPwuHAdqw6c97hNoSZJPfcmgj4wbitsfwE8JmF5y3IKrGhxPYK2kO9Tjgvw0hLtEelsMPUr_gaB-IoQ_RNhHuUrGStRlduYvcbZrxG68_WuS4PO42jwtvGXbv-l9k5XYU9j5yTHLuD4lJi0y1GNDCI9agmQ-2o9Z3W2k6K5t2_kBqv2YjRydmZJJ6w05uLg_HyamuaDcA7owJOHNOipc6Bs50LwtgQIrfK0fDzAbXdJg8jtznSBz3VyDPuqvak5Z83tV1_9bA0qTWjzDwXicbv-K8B0ENg%3D%3D "Generic Button")
---

There is no quick fix to the problems that plague our country. But just like Ronald Reagan said, "If we ever forget that we are one nation under God, then we will be a nation gone under."

**[If you can spare a moment, I really hope you'll share your thoughts with me this Sunday.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=62071f9931754e8e8b6564144fe2c9f2&_e=t96DDo-yuD_oOXwLqRrwZb1z5UrFittvVRtUHZE2B74V4_w0_u0S2ktG02FtCBS_jsJFBb2JxstNLQl3XkVOvCTlBHzpILtt9wz7BKv5oBycrntRFdFGYw-BvNWLVQhFhmUmXLm1p3lihl7QXsIwAlfMADNRwVWwY8NOFGh_h1MabXRR2TQCmHZ4zPwuHAdqw6c97hNoSZJPfcmgj4wbitsfwE8JmF5y3IKrGhxPYK2kO9Tjgvw0hLtEelsMPUr_gaB-IoQ_RNhHuUrGStRlduYvcbZrxG68_WuS4PO42jyKjsUuGLHm9mdWMhSQ5sHcoli2J4Bl41YVnWstQ2rL_dIZ5WUBkhDds81NQupeW6PsUDojex4mv8vTaZzm0k6dn1o6VqaXAm8SWa_JBeSZUZekaDwLPpMxn7SZD4hTtkNZA2FS6ApMd5Sl4NHRxU4P746NmpiyQ9OifM6VAiRqPQ%3D%3D "If you can spare a moment, I really hope you’ll share your thoughts with me this Sunday.")**

Thank you, and God Bless,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
You are an informed citizen--I believe that wholeheartedly.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. _**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today ...](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=63f4e79b7dc646ebac40fc35c9747aed&_e=Q6apxEW5c98a8t9C7VU8uUflZsXkdLemcLBuRrZC9hk_Q6Keo7deqA5bYABbOUDfDtklP_WUCGVWH4aSPEb71QYhOpTeMitwRXqg6L83bsh3PEoRQ3fBzj2FvZkc-DFLzLH4g7jBFaaDMe0M_oWWczW4h73JXJpTgfFITjTvCpvsF85o2_q0CkLbcKVBN88lw-9wf2X54mobR7XagaYWBx2YWguYbsx9L77D2OcJ4gwjY3CKBJDXBvdXTNbsenqdNblmYRUtI-XHyN2q1sPDX6GZAZRvdgq6jC3jQgKwfvX_n_ZjjgRvDobwv_MhWMa-KM1a5SemPArWaVhlXobsiVQFEK9Cy6ZpmKS2WMK4uIGcIEuPNatPxbFa8tx0Xlp7jVavaf5wEVNa1LLD4PUYXQ%3D%3D)**_

## Do you believe it is important for Americans to have basic knowledge of American history and civics, including knowledge about the Constitution?
[Yes](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=63f4e79b7dc646ebac40fc35c9747aed&_e=Q6apxEW5c98a8t9C7VU8uUflZsXkdLemcLBuRrZC9hk_Q6Keo7deqA5bYABbOUDfDtklP_WUCGVWH4aSPEb71QYhOpTeMitwRXqg6L83bsh3PEoRQ3fBzj2FvZkc-DFLzLH4g7jBFaaDMe0M_oWWczW4h73JXJpTgfFITjTvCpvsF85o2_q0CkLbcKVBN88lw-9wf2X54mobR7XagaYWBx2YWguYbsx9L77D2OcJ4gwjY3CKBJDXBvdXTNbsenqdUccmXxXIxmvUJi-_b5I9VExfN9TGv1FL5x_zD51D06E5b7AuOzS6lMtMVIKsTdBn4VDI95EcnAYHc6ydh1ngpO5T4Maocx7JrhshJp3otBubU2BgywHMHCOXMowIiHPkOrid4OQTPKW7iT9flAJJMA%3D%3D) [No](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=63f4e79b7dc646ebac40fc35c9747aed&_e=Q6apxEW5c98a8t9C7VU8uUflZsXkdLemcLBuRrZC9hk_Q6Keo7deqA5bYABbOUDfDtklP_WUCGVWH4aSPEb71QYhOpTeMitwRXqg6L83bsh3PEoRQ3fBzj2FvZkc-DFLzLH4g7jBFaaDMe0M_oWWczW4h73JXJpTgfFITjTvCpvsF85o2_q0CkLbcKVBN88lw-9wf2X54mobR7XagaYWBx2YWguYbsx9L77D2OcJ4gwjY3CKBJDXBvdXTNbsenqdpyvBlEGv0SdB051yNnLlta2IUIWlrMDzoKEMz5iN3nokE8X4lckfac555qOiSGbrfi0HxEln4NFhakdtSdaRnhndy13YaKTV3bOpM0LuRVvJZLotuCeb7FydhbjxxsXRWuDlZpfKmGBgoMJqKb08bg%3D%3D) [Not Sure / Don't Know](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=63f4e79b7dc646ebac40fc35c9747aed&_e=Q6apxEW5c98a8t9C7VU8uUflZsXkdLemcLBuRrZC9hk_Q6Keo7deqA5bYABbOUDfDtklP_WUCGVWH4aSPEb71QYhOpTeMitwRXqg6L83bsh3PEoRQ3fBzj2FvZkc-DFLzLH4g7jBFaaDMe0M_oWWczW4h73JXJpTgfFITjTvCpvsF85o2_q0CkLbcKVBN88lw-9wf2X54mobR7XagaYWBx2YWguYbsx9L77D2OcJ4gwjY3CKBJDXBvdXTNbsenqd4AuX4GlGkyg0iOXThV0b4eyOp-7wgGG6v_h2AK62i4_oKIP9G8udvR522MoN8eLLYZCdl8m6NWndCuwcJzCFMgCMVOqSiD4TYzdhEGiGpZ6y9skNZ6BASoX3jwbGB9Ezxk3buCPaY6SOs3l8Jr0IvA%3D%3D) We need more citizens like you--_informed citizens_ --because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can't let that happen! That's why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our nationwide initiative--the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand
* WHAT the Constitution says;
* HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable. ** That's because we're seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ , and this initiative starts with you--YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what's best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education **today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! Peter - I know God is not done with America yet.

It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government.

The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

I know our country is in desperate need of prayer.

[**Today I am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our nations, you'll join us.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=582531b374174b0997bc6889c313e031&_e=yBUAnBS5utkJIWZsEBf6eHm3nocV0_1xrZNIu1MHyKziYwlZqvr5oORVeLEsy0Bd4igUKIp8jWMesO7LRaJj6BXS3lVFGRDZtST4Ev7mgCTvD5o0g8biKNOAhMoxwGhbmp-CJPMgrmJoVDSfwwAhge_hS-BQ8Z5Vuh9GoAxphbmg67ATrUAILlDBiK20KYd4XirJX2qBUAuRdas-ipWFmi7vL7bKj3smYNC_pLpiH5EGoQ4VkefzIzzbyUfGJoW4tCtTPhhyRxI0BQxXTm8UdSGf9ruu_dZK12YG3Hvx3ZkZtJ2SmASBnJtmyZ_HedFe7g1k8qPMTxc-KXp72Y0ry9seLjJbmd2iKWXnZpJJrsUxMK7TPAzVVF9k0BavuCYq)

[**We cannot allow the radical Left to destroy the ideals our country was founded on. Please join me if you agree that we need to stand up for our Republic.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=582531b374174b0997bc6889c313e031&_e=yBUAnBS5utkJIWZsEBf6eHm3nocV0_1xrZNIu1MHyKziYwlZqvr5oORVeLEsy0Bd4igUKIp8jWMesO7LRaJj6BXS3lVFGRDZtST4Ev7mgCTvD5o0g8biKNOAhMoxwGhbmp-CJPMgrmJoVDSfwwAhge_hS-BQ8Z5Vuh9GoAxphbmg67ATrUAILlDBiK20KYd4XirJX2qBUAuRdas-ipWFmi7vL7bKj3smYNC_pLpiH5EsziKl5L6RWgezVq99IxhpegpXZ9UgRrdXB_M6CvsUDjlyCLYOulAvX5cpfyc8MnlmzYiDfhorweUGWgnI1yNcfyTA6Q4DNJCs95rSCRn-2we-_oegLuW6_wKVKEIo_yOuhsB80FkS2f1nWUo_bnhn)

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Defend The Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=106909e2c0c64a97b2c7fef7ceb5e127&_e=3dxQqDOQOQn6mmikC2MD3qziowiKbDY1uRhj0SttTdVD8LpNeJXITfcE_EGZda2aeLZHeAu6sz0GK--RwNBNZQH3mYiyDOwiBkFAQpmfuZMO7jW-M2ZetWKIoea_sOU1RNOs21II2pxdSkQ880gCkjPNqqr9xS_PMg_bwNfyp9357tD72CtYF6G75ftj8PE6zCumxxCNoojCGIlBm7Pmz6_ZNR3MMv4xsPjDPrsnQwJ7DWavsemuI3AxdsZa3s6ymFujzxrKwCGKUoTbSGbQdQ9JiYtQNer_AZHFQ6Gbr59pfhg9hnuMrkPCjSy8-edYaxYS85C63J4elvwAQLpPGgK5jLBCYdx_ZdHcBDGVWkavuzBsMHvaZAYwB_cDAi1O_niT3qwFqUn3lMaLhBa8OHOvaLVvqlYeJ1U1pCMZc3CVgHsmapXQy25ttBrTDANS)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=106909e2c0c64a97b2c7fef7ceb5e127&_e=3dxQqDOQOQn6mmikC2MD3qziowiKbDY1uRhj0SttTdVD8LpNeJXITfcE_EGZda2aeLZHeAu6sz0GK--RwNBNZQH3mYiyDOwiBkFAQpmfuZMO7jW-M2ZetWKIoea_sOU1RNOs21II2pxdSkQ880gCkjPNqqr9xS_PMg_bwNfyp9357tD72CtYF6G75ftj8PE6zCumxxCNoojCGIlBm7Pmz6_ZNR3MMv4xsPjDPrsnQwJ7DWavsemuI3AxdsZa3s6ymFujzxrKwCGKUoTbSGbQdWBJ-ShGHOXYndUo01QxNEBjP4o-EydvAxBE8H127bNBnOVSOzFfT83vW35sO7_xCmDpoNT2Ot2N02P8Lxqc4Q63GNaZLR2HR5uDt0zGnNQMJfOAshxgv_mYUSxJm_vEGoDEonMDdM9st8hdqQV-jXgHrDoCwUXf2xxY4jJxofjh)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=106909e2c0c64a97b2c7fef7ceb5e127&_e=3dxQqDOQOQn6mmikC2MD3qziowiKbDY1uRhj0SttTdVD8LpNeJXITfcE_EGZda2aeLZHeAu6sz0GK--RwNBNZQH3mYiyDOwiBkFAQpmfuZMO7jW-M2ZetWKIoea_sOU1RNOs21II2pxdSkQ880gCkjPNqqr9xS_PMg_bwNfyp9357tD72CtYF6G75ftj8PE6zCumxxCNoojCGIlBm7Pmz6_ZNR3MMv4xsPjDPrsnQwJ7DWavsemuI3AxdsZa3s6ymFujzxrKwCGKUoTbSGbQdcYGptlBmKKUh6wU1iGa5uMi2qW4k5RFOrEXD-rg_krM8X8mytWwfwoIzkdwbyAjpEcNxEF2ss-Qr6ydGGvZhXNTSl6lbKQXkEMN1RtiZgoprpiUz1itkIvVUezH8Up4LxdQ1yuRyY4vCAGU5oK5LWav7qfVdxjRdM4b_RPOaQdr)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=106909e2c0c64a97b2c7fef7ceb5e127&_e=3dxQqDOQOQn6mmikC2MD3qziowiKbDY1uRhj0SttTdVD8LpNeJXITfcE_EGZda2aeLZHeAu6sz0GK--RwNBNZQH3mYiyDOwiBkFAQpmfuZMO7jW-M2ZetWKIoea_sOU1RNOs21II2pxdSkQ880gCkjPNqqr9xS_PMg_bwNfyp9357tD72CtYF6G75ftj8PE6zCumxxCNoojCGIlBm7Pmz6_ZNR3MMv4xsPjDPrsnQwJ7DWavsemuI3AxdsZa3s6ymFujzxrKwCGKUoTbSGbQdcvvYnzpgR-aJfBVKg3NNPc7VCv6p8OafsQe_jYHG0UprzKLcDWv66JPleqFsMSeEQZRfUpu0I3fyGHD9fgm6fR9-4TLqcJw7_vaxoTac4bzRSVGj6N2cPeWZEfcEEJ7em53cp8WV3IH3QE9qIHO8v5ZJR2NBgsji2ZnBJLPJOWP).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=106909e2c0c64a97b2c7fef7ceb5e127&_e=3dxQqDOQOQn6mmikC2MD3qziowiKbDY1uRhj0SttTdVD8LpNeJXITfcE_EGZda2aeLZHeAu6sz0GK--RwNBNZQH3mYiyDOwiBkFAQpmfuZMO7jW-M2ZetWKIoea_sOU1RNOs21II2pxdSkQ880gCkjPNqqr9xS_PMg_bwNfyp9357tD72CtYF6G75ftj8PE6zCumxxCNoojCGIlBm7Pmz6_ZNR3MMv4xsPjDPrsnQwJ7DWavsemuI3AxdsZa3s6ymGHc37IG6gF7aT--XU7fUHKRy9R7kTTBkAA3YNAXvyrc9YIs6OzvuclHD58eVrMrz_haF-3UDbdB0zGhUyXPM18GitOcnSPMZJm9gZWYJMnYOmFGSy9mTLursOsCoHviPf2McCJRYdRUTcHBeekgGV3OmW4vPvlIIsjLqHsh0_kTXonj9_Fjcs16gcjF1K4T).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09

Hillsdale College

[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjz2vnTAMhn9N2ECJA0kZGNoe0aHSHbp1qvLhHNJiwg1B6Pz7KuiqU9fHj9_XNrSvMbwmpr8wgCX6gwEw-ZkBvP-8KJ-_6fu31r79aN_VGw11CF8ZQHnt-M_8COmQTFwr1Y_GTzJ43jc4CTWOepSyH5plAh0G5bwKKkjpUCsVrP_kbG9HOQSrmzgBBymEAAG96nXnOHrOvQujUNzZkfX87ukMYY7OiKNcJueUqHOJmnVaStmP-7CZwXygOzN2ZkOfSjUYzOkPYkBCH80zp3NnMJPJccP2KCm_2g3Rtwuue0u2TcTkfBb6daQzO2Ty8X-XgapWTT2JyUdtuokztJv43Oqm_WAFc3WuLJo8-f2K6xoPpVnPn_dvLtHfAAAA__-6EoQ0)
Friend,

Since forming OMG in March of this year, activity and investigations have been a whirlwind.
We've exposed financial behemoth BlackRock for war profiteering in Ukraine, Best Buy for religious discrimination against Christians, school boards, Fox News, John Fetterman, CNN, Pfizer, and most recently, the payment processing giants who are funding our nation's elections with shady practices.
The pace at OMG is breakneck because our sources and whistleblowers are handing over so many relevant stories that it is becoming impossible to keep up!
I need to expand OMG's operations but to do that, **[I need your help.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjz2vnTAMhn9N2ECJA0kZGNoe0aHSHbp1qvLhHNJiwg1B6Pz7KuiqU9fHj9_XNrSvMbwmpr8wgCX6gwEw-ZkBvP-8KJ-_6fu31r79aN_VGw11CF8ZQHnt-M_8COmQTFwr1Y_GTzJ43jc4CTWOepSyH5plAh0G5bwKKkjpUCsVrP_kbG9HOQSrmzgBBymEAAG96nXnOHrOvQujUNzZkfX87ukMYY7OiKNcJueUqHOJmnVaStmP-7CZwXygOzN2ZkOfSjUYzOkPYkBCH80zp3NnMJPJccP2KCm_2g3Rtwuue0u2TcTkfBb6daQzO2Ty8X-XgapWTT2JyUdtuokztJv43Oqm_WAFc3WuLJo8-f2K6xoPpVnPn_dvLtHfAAAA__-6EoQ0)**
Within the next ten days, I set a goal of raising $142,000 to cover the recruitment and hiring of much-needed staff that can help us keep and increase the pace.
**[Will you chip in today?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjz2vnTAMhn9N2ECJA0kZGNoe0aHSHbp1qvLhHNJiwg1B6Pz7KuiqU9fHj9_XNrSvMbwmpr8wgCX6gwEw-ZkBvP-8KJ-_6fu31r79aN_VGw11CF8ZQHnt-M_8COmQTFwr1Y_GTzJ43jc4CTWOepSyH5plAh0G5bwKKkjpUCsVrP_kbG9HOQSrmzgBBymEAAG96nXnOHrOvQujUNzZkfX87ukMYY7OiKNcJueUqHOJmnVaStmP-7CZwXygOzN2ZkOfSjUYzOkPYkBCH80zp3NnMJPJccP2KCm_2g3Rtwuue0u2TcTkfBb6daQzO2Ty8X-XgapWTT2JyUdtuokztJv43Oqm_WAFc3WuLJo8-f2K6xoPpVnPn_dvLtHfAAAA__-6EoQ0)** Any amount gets me closer to our goal, and you will have my thanks.
OMG is controlled by NO ONE and funded by people just like you. We are beholden to no advertisers, special interests, parties, or candidates and take an absolutely independent outlook on reporting the truth to the American people.
Most importantly, we're able to BYPASS the filters of the media and report directly to you.
Our latest story on a massive campaign finance scheme garnered 1 million views on X (formerly Twitter) alone!
Different from when I first started my career in investigative journalism over a decade ago, getting people to watch isn't the issue!
Our story-rich environment is the issue!
It reminds me of a story from Marine Corps history, and I wanted to share it with you.
During the Battle of Chosin Reservoir, Colonel "Chesty" Puller, an iconic Marine twice decorated with the Medal of Honor, found his Marines surrounded by Chinese troops and outnumbered 35 to 1.
Col Puller radioed in to give a situation report and calmly stated, _"We've been looking for the enemy for several days now. We've finally found him.**We 're surrounded. That simplifies our problem of getting to these people and killing them."**_
While that may sound like bravado for those unfamiliar with Chesty Puller, it was far from it.
Puller and his Marines fought to the sea with ferocity and purpose, leading an Army Major General to state for history,_"The safest place in Korea was right behind a platoon of Marines. Lord, how they could fight. "_
My team at OMG is like those Marines; they are restless, diligent, and the best in their class. And we are also surrounded and grossly outnumbered.
Corruption never sleeps; it never rests, but it can only operate in darkness.
OMG's purpose is to bring it to the light.
[**Please help me do that by donating today and helping us grow.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjz2vnTAMhn9N2ECJA0kZGNoe0aHSHbp1qvLhHNJiwg1B6Pz7KuiqU9fHj9_XNrSvMbwmpr8wgCX6gwEw-ZkBvP-8KJ-_6fu31r79aN_VGw11CF8ZQHnt-M_8COmQTFwr1Y_GTzJ43jc4CTWOepSyH5plAh0G5bwKKkjpUCsVrP_kbG9HOQSrmzgBBymEAAG96nXnOHrOvQujUNzZkfX87ukMYY7OiKNcJueUqHOJmnVaStmP-7CZwXygOzN2ZkOfSjUYzOkPYkBCH80zp3NnMJPJccP2KCm_2g3Rtwuue0u2TcTkfBb6daQzO2Ty8X-XgapWTT2JyUdtuokztJv43Oqm_WAFc3WuLJo8-f2K6xoPpVnPn_dvLtHfAAAA__-6EoQ0)
Thank you for your time and attention, and please [**support our operations and growth today.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjz2vnTAMhn9N2ECJA0kZGNoe0aHSHbp1qvLhHNJiwg1B6Pz7KuiqU9fHj9_XNrSvMbwmpr8wgCX6gwEw-ZkBvP-8KJ-_6fu31r79aN_VGw11CF8ZQHnt-M_8COmQTFwr1Y_GTzJ43jc4CTWOepSyH5plAh0G5bwKKkjpUCsVrP_kbG9HOQSrmzgBBymEAAG96nXnOHrOvQujUNzZkfX87ukMYY7OiKNcJueUqHOJmnVaStmP-7CZwXygOzN2ZkOfSjUYzOkPYkBCH80zp3NnMJPJccP2KCm_2g3Rtwuue0u2TcTkfBb6daQzO2Ty8X-XgapWTT2JyUdtuokztJv43Oqm_WAFc3WuLJo8-f2K6xoPpVnPn_dvLtHfAAAA__-6EoQ0)

In Truth,
James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
You are an informed citizen—I believe that wholeheartedly.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uOxw7ldZ28Zn4fCvIEipAQ~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen—I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren’t afraid to stand up for America’s founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. _**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today...](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uOxw7ldZ28Zn4fCvIEipAQ~~/AARclAA~~~)_**

## Do you believe it is important for Americans to have basic knowledge of American history and civics, including knowledge about the Constitution?
[Yes](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uOxw7ldZ28Zn4fCvIEipAQ~~/AARclAA~~~) [No](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uOxw7ldZ28Zn4fCvIEipAQ~~/AARclAA~~~) [Not Sure / Don't Know](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uOxw7ldZ28Zn4fCvIEipAQ~~/AARclAA~~~)
We need more citizens like you— _informed citizens_ —because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can’t let that happen! That’s why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our nationwide initiative—the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand
* WHAT the Constitution says;
* HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that “educators” deliberately deceived or who just haven’t learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable.** That’s because we’re seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ , and this initiative starts with you—YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education** today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uOxw7ldZ28Zn4fCvIEipAQ~~/AARclAA~~~) For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Hk0RH3B3LmWSz3FSkqthpw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnM4XQP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmVFoclQZeUHmntSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9XEL1-r26HEvnyqai10oZQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnM4XQP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplRaHJUGXlB5p7UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Rapid Response [via State GOP]
subject: Official Petition to Enforce Voter ID in ALL 50 States
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
Claim yours ASAP before I run out
Your immediate response will help improve our Election Security efforts nationwide.

---

# [Tell Joe Manchin: "Don't run for president, you'll only help Trump win">>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T42d515f4-f759-4365-a4f3-1342ea879847/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te6dc3296-6fc1-4159-9170-5ea3e2809300/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Senator Joe Manchin of West Virginia has announced that he will not run for senate next year, and is instead mulling a run for president as an independent. [**Tell him not to do it.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7be227a6-e5a2-4a10-9fe2-b799e0ac7f59/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Manchin has no chance of winning as an independent. He simply does not have the base of support to have even a long-shot chance. But he can strip away votes from Biden, and help tip the election to Trump. Which would be a disaster. If Manchin cares about America, and if he wants to prevent a slide into a fascist future, he will do everything he can to ensure that Donald Trump does not win. Which means not running. [**Tell Joe Manchin: "Don't run for president, you'll only help Trump win"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4d713dfc-6b81-4c4a-973e-858a6b298265/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

The Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals ruled on Friday that Louisiana had
engaged in “racial gerrymandering” in drawing its map of voting
districts, and must therefore redraw its congressional map by Jan. 15.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3dc0f228b3554ea38045686b8285d7a2&_e=9ZjzedVV4RbYqTlOYdmizfIdEQ0jhkXrkx0FtN-B0M1xg18AjHFjE4WKr_em1Y_T7bCsMl4GIna06Hwv9cqBkQo8btN6o2ugqZGvNIY8HZ5hzskb6Tv5aK_kdg4ex-P12vzeLHtUJyUYepufWJRw4Q4UgsiOyNFBhQ4eqM7m9sV8cCyU0P0OUQtbhzn3ivXlRx3EqlvXUA6ZfHrv_JDgjnD5zd9zbxFiatqQ5xOPQNSagAKfexqYnjszQlBZ1TdH9yPKxyOqMorG5ijPYxbqcbUv4l4TJBYkGtF8HlLwpeisBcR-vp0X2_dgChzzGKXU). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3dc0f228b3554ea38045686b8285d7a2&_e=9ZjzedVV4RbYqTlOYdmizfIdEQ0jhkXrkx0FtN-B0M1xg18AjHFjE4WKr_em1Y_T7bCsMl4GIna06Hwv9cqBkQo8btN6o2ugqZGvNIY8HZ5hzskb6Tv5aK_kdg4ex-P12vzeLHtUJyUYepufWJRw4Z66i56RcOIBsn7O_Ugpe7EM30HujPUSetiWcZs7va2Z-Nibg2hvqYw-TVCWUzuj8A3E2yJrhFN3Yjes2unpBVZ8J1-HUIsx5ke-w_d1Tom47pmxewRq9bZihqbpOL9OVf45SLgoF2LYTxiPgMMDIeGjlkh7kAgsqiV6hzuuJqDT) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3dc0f228b3554ea38045686b8285d7a2&_e=9ZjzedVV4RbYqTlOYdmizfIdEQ0jhkXrkx0FtN-B0M1xg18AjHFjE4WKr_em1Y_T7bCsMl4GIna06Hwv9cqBkQo8btN6o2ugqZGvNIY8HZ5hzskb6Tv5aK_kdg4ex-P12vzeLHtUJyUYepufWJRw4Zb4dpojPE-3kEed7rCDXxNIDLmthTCULfpGUV3co8np3kuvG5J3e75mmC33oi1EbcLrpbzFpWoO8p3Ih1HpggV1RORGs2eLLurOlBokyCmpYf7NdsZe8KFqhRc7m6xQFf2zTvfFmKX7TwQxh3FxGRlBtIoY6WFpcMHx7QW_3v0h) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Joe Manchin…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Joe Manchin's decision not to run for re-election leaves Democrats absolutely zero margin for error if we're going to hold the Senate.

Friends -
Joe Manchin's decision not to run for re-election leaves Democrats absolutely zero margin for error if we're going to hold the Senate.
If just one incumbent Democratic Senator loses, we could be in danger of losing the chamber.
That would be terrible news, regardless of what happens in the presidential election. But an absolute disaster if Trump somehow returns to office.
**If that's all you need to hear, I am asking you to split a $3 contribution between Jacky Rosen and Jon Tester -- two of the most vulnerable Democratic Senators this cycle. They need our help – and they need it fast:**
[**https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/rosen-tester**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rosen-tester?refcode=em231112&refcode2=1660_4767699_E2nG38&akid=1660%2E4767699%2EE2nG38)
Now that Republicans don't have to spend as much in West Virginia, they can focus those resources elsewhere ... like Nevada and Montana.
That means we all have a role to play in defending Jon Tester and Jacky Rosen. That's why I am asking you to split a $3 contribution to their campaigns today:
$3 because Jon Tester and Jacky Rosen are already facing significant attack ads in their races.
$3 because while those attack ads are funded by special interest money, Jacky and Jon are only able to fight back with the help of donations from people like you.
$3 because control of the Senate, and the White House, is on the line.
**If you think a Democratic Senate is worth $3, I am asking you to split that donation today:**
[**Can I count on you to split a $3 contribution between Jon Tester and Jacky Rosen's U.S. Senate campaigns? Control of the Senate is at stake, and with Joe Manchin's retirement, they need you more than ever.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rosen-tester?refcode=em231112&refcode2=1660_4767699_E2nG38&akid=1660%2E4767699%2EE2nG38)

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8053d07b2c642b4afb920f8e97c1ef6&_e=DLl45rxAABwfal9q_Cd-BssbUH9IB8LEIQeMllSZX8DU2_B-Zjfp_dnRa7fLj50rIeWPagVAHF23qDWtVOI_Y_8LtZyh9lXYdJc6fiJsxbDsDq1qoJoLg_TcAV6nxmnU1_z5d33iW6O6RL7I6SkCkMBG6BtDnFVK5VczemxDqI5JZ1XweNF5bHZVdh5JKNpQCmJhTUVEN133KtWoqYOCG9pkFhvnrqiEydOhAz7ijUP7mZcCv2SU8yuG_zUtDdGcThn0h9aVh_dIlajocXJpsg-T21IBP8orzm7-UfAp8Wn060wYHa0SckZIAlgpLlDrZgO3O0YqUiKbGksuciNOIeMdRylijCRgBzyu9t9t3k1pIILNhAP-SaO2Jsz4xrRj4McJemvYzaPGnUlEL-Egm2Q6qYwQvO_7C4TpzyRO0XGqd0B1UdXKQIadxem2hhpl51z6fgmamj8Vp5J9yn8rzI5bNDPdYUkL01zROrEs9UY%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8053d07b2c642b4afb920f8e97c1ef6&_e=DLl45rxAABwfal9q_Cd-BssbUH9IB8LEIQeMllSZX8DU2_B-Zjfp_dnRa7fLj50rIeWPagVAHF23qDWtVOI_Y_8LtZyh9lXYdJc6fiJsxbDsDq1qoJoLg_TcAV6nxmnU1_z5d33iW6O6RL7I6SkCkMBG6BtDnFVK5VczemxDqI5JZ1XweNF5bHZVdh5JKNpQCmJhTUVEN133KtWoqYOCG9pkFhvnrqiEydOhAz7ijUP7mZcCv2SU8yuG_zUtDdGcThn0h9aVh_dIlajocXJpsg-T21IBP8orzm7-UfAp8Wn060wYHa0SckZIAlgpLlDrQvSO3HVbKlW6XpC_5QiMW6M0d5fNdBBsp4CkDSPw9d1xxXFicdYd5iHPUKnm9UBQXSD-0rzSg5NtST5HwJcz6PChIGccV5U-gVKdsYay3YmJ4QbHna-vU4A6A2DFD3jRmO98oSopy-7G-OL5_dxOfbpo3658RX1qL4DhChYf3Zw%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

clean_body: My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish." Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me. The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC. Politico fired off this headline: " Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson." And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports. Look: These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not really the goal... The real goal of this political ambush is two-fold: 1) smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and 2) scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats. It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. name: Team Emerge
subject: [ONE CLICK POLL] We have to ask: Will you stand with VP Harris, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73222795/437802966/-743428587?refcode=jtk1350-su-nd&code=jtk1350-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1YmNiYTc3LTY0ODEtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wsFyi5gaPmwW0i6CsPaHBMPpQaNOO3V3ZB3HggBmwLc=)
---
Peter, we love to see women make history. That’s why we can’t stop cheering for Vice President Harris!
Since day one, our vice president has been a fearless voice for everyday Americans and a champion for our essential rights. **But with Republicans in Congress determined to sow chaos and confusion, we need to send a strong message in support of real, bold leadership. So we have to ask:**
**Will you stand with Vice President Kamala Harris in 2024? **
| | | [YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73222796/437802967/-498089657?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1350-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1YmNiYTc3LTY0ODEtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wsFyi5gaPmwW0i6CsPaHBMPpQaNOO3V3ZB3HggBmwLc=&emci=27351af4-257f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=a5bcba77-6481-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=920818)
---
| [NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73222797/437802968/-498089657?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1350-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1YmNiYTc3LTY0ODEtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wsFyi5gaPmwW0i6CsPaHBMPpQaNOO3V3ZB3HggBmwLc=&emci=27351af4-257f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=a5bcba77-6481-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=920818)
---
* From becoming California’s **FIRST Black woman to be elected district attorney** and the **FIRST woman to serve as California’s attorney general**

* To becoming the **FIRST Indian American senator**

* And now, the **the FIRST Black person and FIRST Asian American to be elected vice president **of the United States

**Vice President Harris has been shattering glass ceilings in politics for her entire career.**
In the face of MAGA extremism and the GOP’s attempts to push a far-right agenda in the Senate, Vice President Harris has fought to protect voting rights, women’s rights, reproductive freedom, and so much more. That’s the difference Democratic women make at every level of office – and **Emerge is working tirelessly to ensure that although Vice President Harris is the FIRST to achieve these historic milestones, she won’t be the last.**
**But we need to know our supporters are with us as we take our women-led movement forward and transform politics in 2024 and beyond. Right now, we still need 274 more responses before midnight tonight, including yours, Peter! So please, tell us: **
**Will you stand with Vice President Kamala Harris in 2024? **
| | | [YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73222798/437802969/-498089657?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1350-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1YmNiYTc3LTY0ODEtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wsFyi5gaPmwW0i6CsPaHBMPpQaNOO3V3ZB3HggBmwLc=&emci=27351af4-257f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=a5bcba77-6481-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=920818)
---
| [NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73222799/437802970/-498089657?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1350-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1YmNiYTc3LTY0ODEtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wsFyi5gaPmwW0i6CsPaHBMPpQaNOO3V3ZB3HggBmwLc=&emci=27351af4-257f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=a5bcba77-6481-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=920818)

name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: State Dems celebrate sweeping victories and look towards the pathahead… and everything else you need to know in the states.
body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, November 12th, 2023 | | |
---
| | | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0qGpwpXgoJxt9wxxr6-3NGZy8uzjP7lQns4eM7mQr18nbBTscuYL22isIY29FSQLcV6mr91eEUVyemsu9wrmEdKfUol6ra6mgPDPO5Av17ebx8IuuA2pV5nMjguqP_sbulixcoo4kzbhJj7IVdD_hhFPoUm_8GRaxN7Q5MeORoMYhZy4hx2hWWa0EQx6r35250pw00xTZCND1DWPHxavEmDwQw1xyab2UGxA_-0FmAzvaHFEFao5NH2TfA7X-rw5-B2du66p1RYv0-S630sMDye4uTHGDhQXA7ZFt3YLdjX5-bi0bmvIIqeRvtNTLzgZZRsU0CXz295G6iWWAeM_sUywFTsUf3yh6eabImHbqMXQxxMGtAB4EHYpxTwErmTzirTFDCoP7Qhc4T9zZ9DvpdZxm1E935AVNZUSscWxfl6aKeRZPw9nddWtNDcLDtAVPg/418/CFiLjQ9ORryDCpn0rY5xvw/h0/KGeKygunIFoepDt7bzlhReIrGbtHQ2qeh7_JR7OBHpU)
---
1️⃣ **_Virginia:_ Democrats win full control of the Virginia Legislature 🎉 **
In Virginia, voters made their voices heard, powering Democrats to victories across the state. We successfully defended control of the Senate and flipped control of the state House. [These wins blocked a Republican trifecta and are inspiring hope for upcoming elections, where the fight for Democratic power and fundamental freedoms continues →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0s6AH0FZUd3gm43nq5TodiZuK8m5APJbRgwt6FbzIHLmrWFnCAbWsNGgBEowp2UlXxbTryiojT_N2L_S_z6slClM96M2DW5MxZL-BI2stoM8ZD18LJ59769cziZ2p-oq5Zj8q3MyUCNLyP6K0bG08cJji-CUMAEvpx6EACT9zAXgNiFvqaDGY0Q0aKZPpIU5CM8VEgvgJRUqCAJqOq7PlyNQjJDy9TW26-kJScqSj9LvbSGF7Ui1o4O4amKs6Z2og4h91nKkAPU25luH79ZswXPWVAu0Fx3Ucov5PBsKbPAXt6jhqolx1t4_kuDIr1m9WsXFOndegePZ8fk-rJf7Y5N6-fOKO2zZuU6N-Xvyq3S-0CxzaItxV7g8iIlI5IhVQ1xtOYyV2blQkovkxJxmjvB7Nf_ofr5iwxEmd4LA-6q5XVRiDZNbPP7k4GtKgUpKcZDH7rnqtyoqE7yzkPPJC2tSNI2scDS079IIhC6S_zGf/418/CFiLjQ9ORryDCpn0rY5xvw/h1/0o2cGmpemczF6l-Fix7onnwIgBZfL-XRgh1H5R8iyGc)

2️⃣ **_Recount Alert:_ Virginia candidate will face a recount in competitive race**
DLCC Spotlight candidate Kimberly Pope Adams will face a recount after Tuesday’s election result remains too close to call. name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Five Good Reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Please, take a minute and give us a chance to explain why your first contribution is so important.
#

Peter:
Our mid-month deadline is right around the corner. Our fundraising is not where it needs to be. So we’re going to give you five good reasons to donate to Ruben Gallego’s campaign today.
Please, take a minute and give us a chance to explain why your first contribution is so important.
1. We’re running to take back Arizona’s Senate seat from Kyrsten Sinema, but she isn’t just going to bow out. She has $10+ million in the bank and a few dozen billionaires in her pocket. She’ll use every dollar to beat Ruben.

2. If we win, we hold control in the Senate. We get back to work. We deliver for the American people. If we lose, it’s Senate Majority Leader McConnell calling the shots — with the “MAGA Queen” Kari Lake on the national stage.

3. This is bigger than just who controls the Senate. Kari Lake is a threat to our democracy itself. She’s spent the last two years spreading lies, conspiracies, and threats of political violence. She has to be stopped.

4. This will be one of the most expensive, one of the hardest fought races in the country. And in a leaked poll, Kari Lake has a one-point edge over Ruben. She could win this. She really could.

5. If we don’t catch up on our goals before folks check out for the holidays, it could be a disaster for our chances next November. We have to hit these goals because they are what we need to raise to win.

Those are the five best reasons we can think of to chip in to Ruben’s campaign. But now, the ball is in your court.
[**Can you make that contribution and help Ruben Gallego win Arizona’s Senate seat? If you can afford a donation, use this link.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231112-1-f&t=1&akid=1426%2E734936%2E7-fL2-)
[CHIP IN HERE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231112-1-f&t=2&akid=1426%2E734936%2E7-fL2-)
Thank you.
Team Gallego

Our fundraising is not where it needs to be. So we’re going to give you five good reasons to donate to Ruben Gallego’s campaign today. Please, take a minute and give us a chance to explain why your first contribution is so important. 1. We’re running to take back Arizona’s Senate seat from Kyrsten Sinema, but she isn’t just going to bow out. She has $10+ million in the bank and a few dozen billionaires in her pocket. She’ll use every dollar to beat Ruben. 2. If we win, we hold control in the Senate. We get back to work. We deliver for the American people. If we lose, it’s Senate Majority Leader McConnell calling the shots — with the “MAGA Queen” Kari Lake on the national stage. 3. This is bigger than just who controls the Senate. Kari Lake is a threat to our democracy itself. She’s spent the last two years spreading lies, conspiracies, and threats of political violence. She has to be stopped. 4. This will be one of the most expensive, one of the hardest fought races in the country. And in a leaked poll, Kari Lake has a one-point edge over Ruben. She could win this. She really could. 5. If we don’t catch up on our goals before folks check out for the holidays, it could be a disaster for our chances next November. access

I’ve also never flown in a private jet, paid a guide to trap a collared wolf for me to shoot, or raised taxes on every Montana home.

But my opponent Greg Gianforte has done all of these things.

I’m not a billionaire from New Jersey, Peter. I’m a pro-freedom Democrat who thinks Montana deserves better than Governor Gianforte.

Can you chip in a donation of $ or more today to help me kick out Greg Gianforte and restore dignity to Montana’s Governor’s office? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfm-em-fr-welcome?amount=]

After all, this isn’t just about kicking Gianforte out — it’s about getting Montana back on the right path.

In gratitude,

Ryan Busse
Candidate for Governor of Montana

We should be terrified of their anti-freedom agenda. Greg Gianforte is the problem. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
You are an informed citizen--I believe that wholeheartedly.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e40049aaeb446d2b5f9b3875a2b2ea8&_e=msSt2Ta2qIIjcIJ_-y1raPcnA_nRjW9S_tASswyd7Muf_BoYN4_HVZHYkkllf0RTlSg_ktpj3uX630-TGUFfBcQCmXFN9mTZ850ABV66DBg-7VMtvqkQz15gKE2V2XPKTDFXAEm3HRNY3GamD5KoXZw9MTdZHJRCGtMVLOeNDbZ8x7bIf-OjyMrNZwmCfLOgcn153IqqgjveSE29TFgoRP-txmgtMNA2TFKLhimj9PJEhAoyJQLFeE5h-_NVs0wMqn6GP31MhL834RNpBR9LuDAZGMhFbW7zJCRugvPKvobcDVGTGSkhXj-p8tL-0kHpVDx3GROyQkoLxuhxJw8hUmOqdNppCqHKNrmoVhFr16yHVTZWCqo0LjcU6wNnEtgRz2s5n69xgxf7EbwcjZZnCg%3D%3D)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen--I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. _**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today ...](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e40049aaeb446d2b5f9b3875a2b2ea8&_e=msSt2Ta2qIIjcIJ_-y1raPcnA_nRjW9S_tASswyd7Muf_BoYN4_HVZHYkkllf0RTlSg_ktpj3uX630-TGUFfBcQCmXFN9mTZ850ABV66DBg-7VMtvqkQz15gKE2V2XPKTDFXAEm3HRNY3GamD5KoXZw9MTdZHJRCGtMVLOeNDbZ8x7bIf-OjyMrNZwmCfLOgcn153IqqgjveSE29TFgoRP-txmgtMNA2TFKLhimj9PJEhAoyJQLFeE5h-_NVs0wMRd6-Oe4yAPY_wtMR_71QZjQgphO_2CIVefkHh-Rbt2SE54iMrIoPGulkH4LgJ9YvFMzp0x7QK956irNvnzYEDXUfMZH_qYusUuO39iuGrrOwSYFk5t2RG79Kd6BCoPIm2VYTBzJaVyj_ecAESoMBIw%3D%3D)**_

## Do you believe it is important for Americans to have basic knowledge of American history and civics, including knowledge about the Constitution?
[Yes](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e40049aaeb446d2b5f9b3875a2b2ea8&_e=msSt2Ta2qIIjcIJ_-y1raPcnA_nRjW9S_tASswyd7Muf_BoYN4_HVZHYkkllf0RTlSg_ktpj3uX630-TGUFfBcQCmXFN9mTZ850ABV66DBg-7VMtvqkQz15gKE2V2XPKTDFXAEm3HRNY3GamD5KoXZw9MTdZHJRCGtMVLOeNDbZ8x7bIf-OjyMrNZwmCfLOgcn153IqqgjveSE29TFgoRP-txmgtMNA2TFKLhimj9PJEhAoyJQLFeE5h-_NVs0wM3jriXbEyvIe7egxz-8MBPhvwOKTiWoJNeQfePcwxT3qKqsOQX85RgDmcVBMszTg4IUAzeMkx6SII6zFDqsPMwW6qBOoWSWxm_SVbPcXEmfwwdkY8t_WlmukFQQuL-xc9PeXcDz5SF4Da1-B8b0kK0w%3D%3D) [No](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e40049aaeb446d2b5f9b3875a2b2ea8&_e=msSt2Ta2qIIjcIJ_-y1raPcnA_nRjW9S_tASswyd7Muf_BoYN4_HVZHYkkllf0RTlSg_ktpj3uX630-TGUFfBcQCmXFN9mTZ850ABV66DBg-7VMtvqkQz15gKE2V2XPKTDFXAEm3HRNY3GamD5KoXZw9MTdZHJRCGtMVLOeNDbZ8x7bIf-OjyMrNZwmCfLOgcn153IqqgjveSE29TFgoRP-txmgtMNA2TFKLhimj9PJEhAoyJQLFeE5h-_NVs0wM03_ExmGivcZE1gaD0cw_7CnEL7NFrJRfPEd6TugJZsKFr1ShslxXlUjKp1RYsMSZ0s7m9fIMxSjnWgbYUpObG2OznkZScRvWeC9JbT-Xjnn0g1BNbxbJR_9r8c9z0Q47yGltFJr7CmIh61WQ53AVMg%3D%3D) [Not Sure / Don't Know](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e40049aaeb446d2b5f9b3875a2b2ea8&_e=msSt2Ta2qIIjcIJ_-y1raPcnA_nRjW9S_tASswyd7Muf_BoYN4_HVZHYkkllf0RTlSg_ktpj3uX630-TGUFfBcQCmXFN9mTZ850ABV66DBg-7VMtvqkQz15gKE2V2XPKTDFXAEm3HRNY3GamD5KoXZw9MTdZHJRCGtMVLOeNDbZ8x7bIf-OjyMrNZwmCfLOgcn153IqqgjveSE29TFgoRP-txmgtMNA2TFKLhimj9PJEhAoyJQLFeE5h-_NVs0wM7Q6TNUPri2tvGsidZ_Pe0qGDu8P3z1SA4JQtInXRFwhMuoQ9JAoccFBc0Z44bCpOCPAReKm4ZdB-alUBAyL1VWnnqjaU0HOHojF51KEKwACZg-6H4sy1HyK55fw6rLe6naSDRqKSBz444Eg02_DD9w%3D%3D) We need more citizens like you--_informed citizens_ --because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can't let that happen! That's why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our nationwide initiative--the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand
* WHAT the Constitution says;
* HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable. ** That's because we're seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ , and this initiative starts with you--YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what's best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education **today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e40049aaeb446d2b5f9b3875a2b2ea8&_e=msSt2Ta2qIIjcIJ_-y1raPcnA_nRjW9S_tASswyd7Muf_BoYN4_HVZHYkkllf0RTlSg_ktpj3uX630-TGUFfBcQCmXFN9mTZ850ABV66DBg-7VMtvqkQz15gKE2V2XPKTDFXAEm3HRNY3GamD5KoXZw9MTdZHJRCGtMVLOeNDbZ8x7bIf-OjyMrNZwmCfLOgcn153IqqgjveSE29TFgoRP-txmgtMNA2TFKLhimj9PJEhAoyJQLFeE5h-_NVs0wMqfrKY13_RBuMGjFHI09qspZzEQGrzASdBh4raPh-GDUaq6-lwpW2taXVJ-z6etK6TJQHyABWps9VK6qeAUksW9lbdQ9kybcrrWDOE0R3jyiwvMg8iJyascAwsvEFJImBEXRYL0IS8dIgyM2HbW0Rag%3D%3D) For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

Freedom Nation Today
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=7e40049aaeb446d2b5f9b3875a2b2ea8&_t=eE4vxoBgLNGKf1sjBlJRAeO4Lx2EzyIu5rNM6gwmwupKrMqF7rdqB61F3b9cBlLBF61T7Gu-rR66D7Oz645Y0FT-VUfQfcL8bV06jVThtmSEp5v8HV8Hn2AN3IQxaMCOjDv-0Oyjv_sSs4S0HPjnbjJBTylJtSBvOA0qhoPj5O4%3D)

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: What I’ve been up to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=282b4e5fbf9545dea7e1326739667a44&_e=LHVgsFZ3S-do4J5JyXMXcsuO3PUbTIZfewZutKMti7xjU0iRhPMMQLN7oHImAicC_CzMrdKF6R8qGpfPYYwvlw5cpKam_ERS5pIwR6lbpx9uZIpq4kv66ayhiojyhI0YAbFCC3ViEoH-5XrQWUQ4j26_w5LzWdbTgtbOipCDlR3DsG8312v5gjq7p1XPZah_B9tVe9RwBbNZn8k5Q8L2WhuScRjWtJJ9H1Ly2zSXVUYejrN4cTDGg86ErGceAgbPC6gbF2LZT9s_FofWct4v0DglFzLw8nBEAUSiMkJq9jeTA55dXIlOOF0fr7dCfZIM6em2h8mXPGSpX61wEe66OStXQz52p2t28T1SIzDD1TodWUB7nOOEQAb2oeGVvpQ1)
---
Peter,

---
This campaign has been tough, but it has been SO rewarding.

I’ve loved traveling all over Virginia meeting as many of you as I can.

And with all the time I’ve spent on the road, the moments I spend with my family count even more.

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Priorities
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Travel-organizations-sound-the-warning-bells-about-2s.jpg]
CONTRIBUTE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend,
In less than a week, the US government teeters on the brink of shutdown, and my opponent is focused on feckless slashes to the pay of his party's adversaries. Rep. Bergman supported attempts to reduce the salary of the White House Press Secretary, the Vice President, and leaders at several other agencies to a mere $1/year.
This is a mockery of the duty of a Congressperson, no matter the party. All attempts, of course, failed.
What a disgraceful waste of time and a deceitful charade. We all deserve better. It's time to end this pointless bickering and childish behavior and get back to work for the American people.
Bergman also supported significant cuts to the National Parks Service and the EPA and then tried to spin it as "good for the district," a district he doesn't even live in nine months of the year. Bergman isn't interested in serving constituents; he just wants to keep the wool pulled over your eyes.
I want to say I'm surprised by how little the GOP has accomplished, but when you look at representatives like my opponent — who have passed less than three bills in six years — this inaction is to be expected. I need your help getting Democrats back in the majority.
No matter the amount, every dollar you contribute to my grassroots campaign helps me compete for this seat and continue the momentum we've built in rural Michigan over the last two years.
I'm more prepared than ever to defeat Jack Bergman, and I need you in my corner.
Thank you for your continued support. I'm grateful to have you by my side in this fight.
To save Social Security, expand healthcare, and prioritize hardworking families first, we need to elect Congresspeople willing to get it done. Jack Bergman is not that person.
Help me unseat him.
I appreciate your consideration.
VR
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / UP
Democrat, MI01
CONTRIBUTE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or send a check to:
"Friends of Dr. Bob"
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855

We're keeping our head down, focusing on what matters, and getting the job done. We're not just letting the media spread their false narrative and poke at our campaign with baseless attacks; we're meeting them on their own playing field.

We're in this fight, and we're taking the attacks head-on. Other campaigns are pouring millions into attacking us because it's clear that we're the threat to beat, and we're not slowing down. Our new ad proves that. I would really appreciate your help in keeping our new ad on air. I want to reach every corner of the United States with our message, but I can't do it without you.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b5aaeb41b3adb85781e6783f188d2bf1c6d5cf06b9f6fc4f7e1dd0de837f1d7b9baa73fd8ed46984db81ebdf9a9ff0625ca789dbfbd97420f185de6143be78d

Subject: Will you watch?

Friend,

"Fight. Win. Lead." That's the theme of the FIRST Ron DeSantis for President television ad! 📺

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b5aaeb41b3adb85138d4021d5e3b501087b07dc4b28fe8d1cd76d1a5f9e8fe8249ca85e57edd988a759ed6efdb17c2939e806ffac237c3941f962c4fd74ed0a

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b5aaeb41b3adb85138d4021d5e3b501087b07dc4b28fe8d1cd76d1a5f9e8fe8249ca85e57edd988a759ed6efdb17c2939e806ffac237c3941f962c4fd74ed0a
Be the first to view the ad!

Ron DeSantis has FOUGHT for the American people. Refusing to bend the knee to unelected bureaucrats, the pressure of the radical woke mob, and even Republicans telling him to stand by and wait while America slips into further decline.

He has WON time and time again—as Congressman and as Governor—turning a former swing state bright red and delivering victories for the people he serves.

He has LED while other politicians have sold out, sat by, and dropped the ball on protecting Americans.

We want to bring this message nationwide, but we need your help.

This
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b5aaeb41b3adb85138d4021d5e3b501087b07dc4b28fe8d1cd76d1a5f9e8fe8249ca85e57edd988a759ed6efdb17c2939e806ffac237c3941f962c4fd74ed0a
first television ad is a huge moment for our campaign, friend. Because of the support of our grassroots donor team, we've gotten to get this ad on air weeks earlier than originally planned. Your support is truly what drives our every success.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b5aaeb41b3adb85138d4021d5e3b501087b07dc4b28fe8d1cd76d1a5f9e8fe8249ca85e57edd988a759ed6efdb17c2939e806ffac237c3941f962c4fd74ed0a
Can we count on your support to help us keep this ad on air until election day?

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b5aaeb41b3adb85efdad711034874c2f430eb73d7cc67a0a183d930b3508b6c8e61a4c90f81f7e881c7b5cfda40ce33e38ac83b1124fbebe54c69ea729d47b3

Send in $100
