Send in $250

>From sending planes to Israel to bring Americans home safely to rebuilding bridges in the days following a hurricane, Ron is the leader we need during a crisis, and no one in the country has a stronger record of securing victories. Ron DeSantis will fight for the American people, win, and lead our nation’s comeback—he's counting on you and me to back him today.

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b5aaeb41b3adb8540f647fc4a8359d27c0be1f6795e53ec6acb64be47a864b0ad7c0cbc34fa3d05840ec9ab007d6270302c92b6b8b5535b0a640bcc00ce6c7a

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b5aaeb41b3adb8544453b71186efd044cbd45847570d3fb127aa83ccb67d498041e8229e7f32de1b95cba8b2da0e57ce4dafa5bce3f36a4e762f1db79d1b570
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b5aaeb41b3adb85c205857f425411bc764aac7f340eff7f4e292c699da376e66f0b192ecbe691b672ca1c8b7ddd086ec47dedb88a51d4939c9cf02d08ec3384
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b5aaeb41b3adb85138d4021d5e3b501087b07dc4b28fe8d1cd76d1a5f9e8fe8249ca85e57edd988a759ed6efdb17c2939e806ffac237c3941f962c4fd74ed0a

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b5aaeb41b3adb85138d4021d5e3b501087b07dc4b28fe8d1cd76d1a5f9e8fe8249ca85e57edd988a759ed6efdb17c2939e806ffac237c3941f962c4fd74ed0a

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Friend, This is one of my favorite announcements yet. Our very first television ad has hit the air weeks earlier than we anticipated, and it's all thanks to the generous donations of this team. Pitch in $25 to keep our ad on air! We're keeping our head down, focusing on what matters, and getting the job done. We're not just letting the media spread their false narrative and poke at our campaign with baseless attacks; we're meeting them on their own playing field. We're in this fight, and we're taking the attacks head-on. Other campaigns are pouring millions into attacking us because it's clear that we're the threat to beat, and we're not slowing down. Our new ad proves that. I would really appreciate your help in keeping our new ad on air. I want to reach every corner of the United States with our message, but I can't do it without you. Will you send in $10, $25, $47, or whatever you can today? And be sure to check out the new ad below! Yours in Freedom, Ron DeSantis --------Forwarded Message-------- From: Team DeSantis Subject: Will you watch? Friend, "Fight. Win. Lead." That's the theme of the FIRST Ron DeSantis for President television ad! 📺 Be the first to view the ad! Ron DeSantis has FOUGHT for the American people. Refusing to bend the knee to unelected bureaucrats, the pressure of the radical woke mob, and even Republicans telling him to stand by and wait while America slips into further decline. He has WON time and time again—as Congressman and as Governor—turning a former swing state bright red and delivering victories for the people he serves. He has LED while other politicians have sold out, sat by, and dropped the ball on protecting Americans. We want to bring this message nationwide, but we need your help. This first television ad is a huge moment for our campaign, friend. Because of the support of our grassroots donor team, we've gotten to get this ad on air weeks earlier than originally planned. Your support is truly what drives our every success. Can we count on your support to help us keep this ad on air until election day? Send in $25 Send in $47 Send in $100 Send in $250 From sending planes to Israel to bring Americans home safely to rebuilding bridges in the days following a hurricane, Ron is the leader we need during a crisis, and no one in the country has a stronger record of securing victories. Ron DeSantis will fight for the American people, win, and lead our nation’s comeback—he's counting on you and me to back him today. In Freedom, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. Fellow American - I know God is not done with America yet.

It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government.

The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

I know our country is in desperate need of prayer.

[**Today I am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our nations, you'll join us.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=db4b9a3be37243febd31e569c1c7333e&_e=9m2scKi3-lY5zj3u88H95iyhrzk66ELgUROuso8OoYwKBnwGYfAZKgaqQwoLEw5zu0733urvAV_KA5pzjNdP0AXb-eY8QuQVDXu0QJ4grIFNi7q5KO1XFtDxmDtToPak3dA2XzwskIMcxEg7aNw1UxMA8VWhYJs6IlVcpGZdWPvnWLMLHVG8cayTE34v9m1NRzAnKtgl8fayntqBFSoxdn3VIDxaMl1qrg3cBt7NoETkoamB-u4-DQTcqNof2TOIBno0e2mrGIYHS-n5sbv3v8jWhpVfQVxo2Z1KOqnk-RmBMXLzS29tj7irgmL_D8rqM0EumZzwK8cZ1rUBYfCp-SLqryPDYZa-foiBuuNoKmsIZA6sehlu7dHKMusbF96W)

[**We cannot allow the radical Left to destroy the ideals our country was founded on. Please join me if you agree that we need to stand up for our Republic.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=db4b9a3be37243febd31e569c1c7333e&_e=9m2scKi3-lY5zj3u88H95iyhrzk66ELgUROuso8OoYwKBnwGYfAZKgaqQwoLEw5zu0733urvAV_KA5pzjNdP0AXb-eY8QuQVDXu0QJ4grIFNi7q5KO1XFtDxmDtToPak3dA2XzwskIMcxEg7aNw1UxMA8VWhYJs6IlVcpGZdWPvnWLMLHVG8cayTE34v9m1NRzAnKtgl8fayntqBFSoxdn3VIDxaMl1qrg3cBt7NoEShdJnUk8zloRGTSxkvpvkkQhhXDQnaoGfpYsromXATK4msjxffp0fq29PWT6fY_CpNR8v1dROQXErULuERrhmx8pw6dUvGHvOeqMJfa1MFKbSqe6Aug7I2cSG1_i5bt8hUfDMKY5HnEmfz2hAky4K3)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

clean_body: It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God. | | Fellow American - I know God is not done with America yet. It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God. Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people. I know our country is in desperate need of prayer. God bless, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? name: Mucarsel-Powell, Debbie
subject: 🍩 doughnuts and the American Dream 🍩
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
I'm hoping you'll let me tell you a story
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73229686/437828062/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk311-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWUxNzJhZGMtNmM4MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=U6NA-gs7E20DQYDJnQtW7ZB1TN-pD3rMCYx__MHl594=)
Hi there, friend, it's Debbie. If you don't know me already, I'm the Democrat running to defeat Sen. Rick Scott in Florida.
I'm about to ask you to make a donation to support my grassroots campaign. But first, I'm hoping you'll let me tell you a story about doughnuts and the American Dream. [**(If you're short on time and ready to chip in, you can click here to help me flip Florida blue!)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73229687/437828063/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk311-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWUxNzJhZGMtNmM4MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=U6NA-gs7E20DQYDJnQtW7ZB1TN-pD3rMCYx__MHl594=)
When I was 14 years old, my mother, my sisters, and I left our home in Ecuador in the hope of achieving our American Dream. As I adjusted to life and high school in a new country, my mom worked double shifts to support our family. But even still, it was a struggle to pay the bills and afford rent for our small, one room apartment.
When I turned 15, I got a job at a local doughnut shop. **It was hard work, but it's what my family needed to make ends meet.**
I'm not the only one who got their start in the doughnut business. When he was a young man, my opponent, Rick Scott, **_bought_** two doughnut shops.

While I was a teen making minimum wage to help keep the lights on at home, Rick Scott was an owner.

**For me, the doughnuts represent a lifeline that helped my family afford rent. ****For Rick Scott, they represent the beginning of his private corporate career.**
I went on to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant ever elected to Congress. Rick Scott went on to oversee the largest Medicare fraud in the nation’s history, amass a fortune of hundreds of millions, and buy a Senate seat.

If you ask me, our differing stories in the doughnut business make the differences between us pretty clear.
**I know we can win — and new polling data shows this race is already tied! But Rick Scott spent $64 million to buy this seat in 2018 and has already written _six-figure_ personal checks to his campaign this time around.** **[I can't win this race without your help. So please, if you have anything to spare, will you rush $5 now to defeat Rick Scott and give Floridians the leadership they deserve?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73229688/437828064/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk311-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWUxNzJhZGMtNmM4MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=U6NA-gs7E20DQYDJnQtW7ZB1TN-pD3rMCYx__MHl594=)**

Debbie

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Fred Guttenberg via Blue Amp Action
subject: It’s always hard to tell this story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taf22c786-74c9-4a32-b6ba-f0d759642864/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T316b994e-ca8e-42eb-9d7a-a02148911c75/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter – It’s always hard to say these words: On February 14, 2018, my beloved daughter Jaime was killed in her own high school in Parkland, Florida, at the hands of a mass shooter who never should have had access to a gun. That day, Jen, Jesse, and I lost a piece of our hearts that no amount of time, thoughts, or prayers will ever heal.

I was devastated. And enraged. I knew that I had to do something. No family should have to endure the loss that mine did but, unfortunately, far too many have and will.

**The truth is, the only way we’re going to prevent future mass shootings and save lives is by electing a historic wave of gun violence prevention candidates to office who will have the courage to enact common sense gun reforms.**

[**_That’s why I’m humbly asking if you’ll join Blue Amp Action and me in electing one of those leaders: Dr. Brian Williams. Brian is a first-time candidate and trauma surgeon who treats victims of gun violence who needs your help so he can win an open seat in Congress._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d76aa20-7283-4ecf-abbf-f0b20cc940e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8913efa-77c3-4aee-b47e-ba0666091cfb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| In the aftermath of the Parkland mass shooting, it immediately became clear that the politicians and institutions my community had trusted to protect us had failed us miserably. For the extremist state legislators and federal lawmakers supposedly “representing” us in Congress, our children’s lives had a price.

But through that anger and despair, I found a sense of hope.

**I remain hopeful because of the great people I have had the good fortune of meeting over the years who are dedicated to saving lives from senseless gun violence. Dr. Brian Williams is one of them.**

He never thought he would run for office – but after responding to a mass shooting in Dallas, he knew there was work to do beyond the operating room. He then advised Congress on what would become **the first major Federal gun reform bill signed into law in thirty years and is now running for an open House seat in Texas.**

He’s a person who is putting himself out there because of what he has seen and he’s exactly the kind of leader we need representing and fighting for us in Congress. Dr. Brian Williams has been a fearless leader on this issue and will be in Congress.

[**_For all the families who have lost someone to gun violence and for all those families who will soon experience this devastation without life-saving reforms, I’m asking if you’ll join me in electing Dr. Brian Williams and a wave of gun violence prevention champions like him at all levels of government._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T81f96c73-4822-4273-be26-c99a903e996e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10 NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T938bf51e-3a90-48d2-8efe-f33393e0f8fe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you,

Fred Guttenberg
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta7a60965-a288-4847-af41-b301c801f3a3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter) | [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---

---

body:
Mike Johnson’s bigotry and extremism have no home in West Michigan or the United States House of Representatives. 2024 is our opportunity to kick Mike Johnson out of power and show strong support for the LGBTQ+ community by taking back the House.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73231248/437833542/664569766?refcode=BLU-HSC-20231112-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2JlM2NhOS02ZTgxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2fC65D2M09aTY8f7MeA6MBdTp-jCqHMiFHmLGp8nsXI=)

| Team, _**Republican Speaker Mike Johnson is as extreme as they come.**_ Although many of his stances are abhorrent to everything I believe as a Christian, mother, and champion of West Michiganders, I am particularly furious at Mike Johnson’s extensive anti-LGBTQ+ record. He has called the LGBTQ+ community a “deviant group.” He has implied that equal rights for the LGBTQ+ community could lead to pedophilia and individuals marrying their pets. He has even partnered with anti-gay conversion therapy groups before he became a politician. _**The list of his anti-LGBTQ+ bigotry goes on.**_ Recently, when asked about these horrific views, he told his opponents to “go pick up a Bible.” Well, as a proud Christian, I read the Bible, and I will never cherrypick Bible verses to fuel a message of hate. I believe in a loving God who could not care less about the gender of who you love. Mike Johnson’s bigotry and extremism have no home in West Michigan or the United States House of Representatives. 2024 is our opportunity to kick Mike Johnson out of power and show strong support for the LGBTQ+ community by taking back the House. [_**If you believe we should protect and expand LGBTQ+ rights, I hope you will contribute $5 today to my campaign so we can retake the House and oust Speaker Johnson. **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73231249/437833543/664569766?refcode=BLU-HSC-20231112-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2JlM2NhOS02ZTgxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2fC65D2M09aTY8f7MeA6MBdTp-jCqHMiFHmLGp8nsXI=)

name: Katie Porter
subject: Changing technology can’t be an excuse to leave workers behind.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=33007%2E3422442%2EvMR-xs)
Derek,
From the United Auto Workers to performers and healthcare workers, workers are demanding that corporations pay up. **These striking workers have sent a strong message to CEOs across the country: changing technology can’t be an excuse to leave workers behind.**
We can’t stop here. As a champion for good government oversight, I always say that unions and oversight go hand in hand. **It’s one thing to pass laws that are supposed to help people, but we have to make sure laws are being followed and are effective.** Unionized workers are often the folks on the ground holding these big companies accountable, and as a Senator I’d be in close contact with labor so we can hold bad actors accountable together.
Public polling shows support for unions is at a high since the 1960s, but still just around 12% of Americans are in a union. Congress has important work to do to make sure workers can be part of strong unions: [**Can you sign my petition and tell Congress to protect the right to organize?**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-right-to-organize/?refcode=EMAMDD_1_CEO_20231112_V1_F&akid=33007%2E3422442%2EvMR-xs)
[Add your name ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-right-to-organize/?refcode=EMAMDD_1_CEO_20231112_V1_F&akid=33007%2E3422442%2EvMR-xs)
Onward!
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAMDD_1_CEO_20231112_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=33007_3422442_vMR-xs&akid=33007%2E3422442%2EvMR-xs)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=33007%2E3422442%2EvMR-xs)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=33007%2E3422442%2EvMR-xs)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Team Baldwin
subject: We came up short
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| We came up short of our October fundraising goal.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1501%2E35263%2EL9MvjN)
We have some troubling news to share, Peter: **We came up short of our October fundraising goal.** Grassroots fundraising makes a critical difference for our campaign. We rely on your donations of $5, $10, and $25 at a time to keep pace with the enormous sums of cash that Tammy’s potential Republican opponents are ready to spend in this race. Unlike Tammy, megamillionaire Republicans like Eric Hovde don’t need to count on grassroots donations to run a winning campaign. They can write themselves checks worth millions of dollars from their own personal fortunes. **Since we missed out on our October fundraising target, we’re setting a 4-day flash goal of $20,000 to make up the ground we lost.** **[Before Wednesday’s deadline, will you chip in any amount you can to reelect Tammy and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-nov23.TOAtRC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20231112_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1501%2E35263%2EL9MvjN)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-nov23.gM21RB&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20231112_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1501%2E35263%2EL9MvjN)

| | Peter, Democrats across the country won big on Tuesday and I’ve unpacked what that means for our race here in Maryland. In places like Virginia, Kentucky, and Ohio, grassroots movements overcame the massive dark money spending by their opponents — _proving grassroots efforts CAN win._ _Ultimately, it confirmed what we already know:**We might have started as underdogs in this race, but if we stick together and work hard we’ll have what it takes to outwork and defeat our multi-millionaire opponent.**_ **He might have the financial edge, but I’ll take a nimble, well-organized grassroots movement over his millions any day.** **[Can Angela count on you to chip in $25 to set the tone for 2024 and lay the groundwork to outmaneuver the millions being poured into this race as we speak? * * *
_**Forwarded message from The Collective PAC:**_

**Peter,**

**** Black women in politics are under attack.

**Across the country, lawmakers, prosecutors, and judges are being burdened with an onslaught of racist and misogynistic attacks.**

**We’re seeing extremists like Trump, DeSantis, and Jim Jordan go after Black women like Fani Willis and Monique Worrell for** _doing their job_**and going after those who break the law.**

**In North Carolina, a state judicial commission is attempting to restrict the First Amendment rights of Supreme Court Justice Anita Earls for daring to point out the clear racial bias in the state judiciary.**

**And in South Carolina,****Leah Aden, senior counsel for the NAACP Legal Defense Fund, is fighting attacks as she challenges the state's unconstitutional redistricting maps at the Supreme Court.**

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, We launched our Black Women Defense Fund to stand up against the barrage of unprecedented racist and misogynistic attacks that Black women in politics are receiving, all for simply doing their jobs. In the face of personal attacks, Black women like Fani Willis, Letitia James, Monique Worrell, Anita Earls, and Leah Aden are doing their job to hold people accountable — here at The Collective PAC, we’re supporting them every step of the way because their commitment to justice is a beacon of hope. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Forwarded message from The Collective PAC: Peter, Black women in politics are under attack. Across the country, lawmakers, prosecutors, and judges are being burdened with an onslaught of racist and misogynistic attacks. We’re seeing extremists like Trump, DeSantis, and Jim Jordan go after Black women like Fani Willis and Monique Worrell for doing their joband going after those who break the law. In North Carolina, a state judicial commission is attempting to restrict the First Amendment rights of Supreme Court Justice Anita Earls for daring to point out the clear racial bias in the state judiciary. And in South Carolina,**Leah Aden, senior counsel for the NAACP Legal Defense Fund, is fighting attacks as she challenges the state's unconstitutional redistricting maps at the Supreme Court. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . subject: AIPAC is attacking Summer Lee and Jamaal Bowman.

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

First, they came for Rashida. Now, AIPAC and their super PAC United
Democracy Project are running attack ads on Facebook against Summer Lee
and Jamaal Bowman.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231112-jb-sl.r89rpR&refcode=em20231112-31779&t=1001&akid=31779%2E1203867%2ElhH8xt ]Screenshots of attack ads against Jamaal Bowman and Summer Lee

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231112-jb-sl.r89rpR&refcode=em20231112-31779&amount=3&t=1002&akid=31779%2E1203867%2ElhH8xt ]Will you rush a split contribution of $3 or more right
now to support Summer, Jamaal, and Justice Democrats and help us fight
back?

Summer and Jamaal were already on AIPAC’s target list in 2024: for months,
we’ve learned they’re building up their war chest and recruiting potential
candidates to challenge these Democratic incumbents at the ballot box next
November.

Now that they are some of the only members of Congress to demand a
ceasefire in Gaza and safe return of hostages, AIPAC is rapidly ramping up
their attacks in an effort to kick them out of the House next year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231112-jb-sl.r89rpR&refcode=em20231112-31779&amount=3&t=1003&akid=31779%2E1203867%2ElhH8xt ]Justice Democrats stands with Summer and Jamaal, and we will do
everything in our power to re-elect them. Will you split a grassroots
donation between us and their campaigns right now to support us in this
urgent moment?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231112-jb-sl.r89rpR&refcode=em20231112-31779&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=31779%2E1203867%2ElhH8xt ]Contribute $3

Through your contributions, we’re going to fight like hell to defend
Summer, Jamaal, and the rest of the Squad from being ousted by this
corporate- and GOP-fueled, anti-Palestinian group.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1023&akid=31779%2E1203867%2ElhH8xt ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1024&akid=31779%2E1203867%2ElhH8xt ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231112-31779-footer&t=1025&refcode2=31779_1203867_lhH8xt&akid=31779%2E1203867%2ElhH8xt

clean_body: Alongside me in Congress are brave Democrats calling for a ceasefire. | | | Friend, When a majority in Congress voted to censure me last week, they tried to silence the majority of Americans who are demanding a ceasefire. In a democracy, Congressmembers are supposed to represent the people who vote for them. But right now,only a few of us are brave enough to keep calling for a ceasefire and denouncing the Israeli government’s war crimes. These leaders for peace include Rep. Cori Bush, who introduced the Ceasefire Now Resolution, and freshmen Reps. Summer Lee and Delia Ramirez, who continue to act with moral courage despite political risks. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Every hour, every day there’s not a ceasefire, more innocent Palestinians and children are killed with U.S. support and U.S. tax dollars. We must act now. \- Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib Date: Sat, Nov 11, 2023 Subject: We must act now. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, This week, I met with veterans calling for a ceasefire. They spoke about what they saw serving in Afghanistan and Iraq. With tears and outrage, they’re coming together to say “Enough!” and calling for an end to the violence. Our movement for a ceasefire is growing every single day. Alongside me are morally courageous Democrats leading the ceasefire movement in Congress, who are aligned with the vast majority of Americans. At a time when most of our colleagues want to send $14 billion U.S. taxpayer dollars to fund the Israeli military’s massacres of Palestinians, our voices are desperately needed. As we met with veterans yesterday, Rep. Summer Lee called out how 99% of the Palestinians killed by the Israeli military in the past month were civilians. Even though anti-Palestinian AIPAC spent millions of dollars trying to defeat Summer in her first election to Congress last year, she will not be intimidated and keeps speaking up for Palestinians’ humanity. First-term Rep. Delia Ramirez is also continuing to hold Israel’s government accountable despite the political risks, saying: “I was sent here to fight for shared humanity. I was sent here to fight for peace and justice.” Rep. Cori Bush , who introduced the Ceasefire Now Resolution, said: “I was sent to Congress to save lives. I was not sent to Congress to have my constituents’ tax dollars buy bombs to kill thousands of innocent Palestinians.” We were all grassroots activists before running for Congress, and we’re still holding firm to our values—even when it makes us targets. body:

#
Let's talk about how our team works.
We're powered by the grassroots -- _not dirty corporate PAC money_ -- as we support John's work down in DC. It's folks chipping in $5 here or $35 there that we are able to protect our Democratic Senate majority and fight for working families in Pennsylvania and nationwide.
**When you support John with a donation, you *directly* help us stand up to the hundreds of millions of dollars that the GOP will spend in PA and other battleground states in 2024.**
This movement has *always* been powered by real people like you -- that's why we send you emails like this one.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Can I share some reflections with you?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
While I was having breakfast this morning, I found myself thinking of the GIFFORDS community and wanted to reach out to you personally.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov23.H_pglF&refcode=em231112-1-30&t=1&akid=6859%2E3935704%2E-uut-V)
---
Hi there, it’s Gabby Giffords.
While I was having breakfast this morning, I found myself thinking of the GIFFORDS community and wanted to reach out to you personally.
Over twelve years ago, I was shot in the head while meeting with constituents in Tucson, Arizona. I’ve been in recovery every single day since then. I often think about my recovery the same way I think about our movement to end gun violence: some days are more difficult than others.
It hasn’t been an easy journey for me, but even on my darkest days, I’ve refused to give up hope. Today, I encourage you to take a moment to renew your hope that we can and will have a future someday where the threat of gun violence no longer looms over us.
I know this work isn’t easy. But the fights worth having rarely are. That’s why we can never, ever give up.
[**I can’t do this work alone. So please, can I ask you to chip in $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov23.H_pglF&refcode=em231112-1-30&t=2&akid=6859%2E3935704%2E-uut-V)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-nov23.ka8v8M&amount=3&t=21&akid=6859%2E3935704%2E-uut-V)**

While I was having breakfast this morning, I found myself thinking of the GIFFORDS community and wanted to reach out to you personally. Over twelve years ago, I was shot in the head while meeting with constituents in Tucson, Arizona. I’ve been in recovery every single day since then. I often think about my recovery the same way I think about our movement to end gun violence: some days are more difficult than others. It hasn’t been an easy journey for me, but even on my darkest days, I’ve refused to give up hope. Today, I encourage you to take a moment to renew your hope that we can and will have a future someday where the threat of gun violence no longer looms over us. I know this work isn’t easy. name: VoteVets.org
subject: Tuberville is the GOP’s Problem
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
Tell them to do something about him.
#
Derek, we want to re-center on this before we start up a fresh week.
Tommy Tuberville has never served a day in the Armed Forces. He acts like he knows more about the Military than anyone, and he’s even said as much. It’s just not true.
And here we are — more than 450 senior flag officers in the most powerful Military in human history are still having their promotions held up. Hamstrung.
By this guy.
[](https://act.votevets.org/signup/231112_vv_em_c4_tub/?source=em231112-1-30?refcode2=19020.3013755.VRA-i7&akid=19020%2E3013755%2EVRA-i7)
We are more than nine months into this. VoteVets has done everything we can to get these promotions moving. TV ads, digital ads, press conferences, meetings. We’re proud to do it, too. It’s our duty — both to honor these officers and their commitment to our nation, and to protect the country.
But where is the GOP? Where is that supposed “pro-America, pro-Military, pro-Veteran party?”
We hear that there might be some votes in the GOP to break this blockade, but we haven’t heard anything yet. Until we do — until they take action to move these promotions — the leadership of the GOP and their entire party are as complicit as Tuberville in this.
More than Tuberville, it’s the rest of the GOP that we have to push. After everything we’ve done, this could be the week we get there.
**[Tuberville is the GOP’s problem, so tell them to do something about him. Add your name and tell the GOP to step up and break this blockade.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/231112_vv_em_c4_tub/?source=em231112-1-30?refcode2=19020.3013755.VRA-i7&akid=19020%2E3013755%2EVRA-i7)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/231112_vv_em_c4_tub/?source=em231112-1-30?refcode2=19020.3013755.VRA-i7&akid=19020%2E3013755%2EVRA-i7)
---
If we can get thousands of you to join us, we can put more pressure on the press. Then the press will put more pressure on Mitch McConnell and the rest of the GOP. And then, with any luck, they’ll put more pressure on Tuberville.
Step by step, Derek.
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

body:
Ohioans stood up to the radical extremists trying to control our bodies and made it clear that the government has no place in personal medical decisions. |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73237889/437852383/-1405508824?refcode=20231111_SykesOHSplit&sourceid=1052327&refcode2=WTEFHK25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGVkNjM0Zi03ODgxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BAJOCo-UXRtSlwHMLhD7ks7Yy522XzeCnMUNqll7Xng=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73237890/437852386/-1405508824?refcode=20231111_SykesOHSplit&sourceid=1052327&refcode2=WTEFHK25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGVkNjM0Zi03ODgxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BAJOCo-UXRtSlwHMLhD7ks7Yy522XzeCnMUNqll7Xng=) Peter, I'm coming to you with incredible news out of Ohio:

**Thanks to millions of people from across Ohio and countless grassroots volunteers, Issue 1 passed, enshrining in our state constitution the right to an abortion!**

Not only will Issue 1 protect the right for women to access abortion services in Ohio, it will also provide a **constitutional right for birth control, for fertility treatment, and for miscarriage care.**

**Together, Ohioans stood up to the radical extremists trying to control our bodies and made it clear that the government has no place in personal medical decisions.**

But while this is an incredible moment, we can't afford to take our foot off the gas. **Republicans in the House will stop at nothing to pass a national abortion ban — and it's going to take all of us working together to stop them.**

**That's where you come in, Peter. Please, will you chip in to my campaign and EMILYs List today so that we can keep fighting for reproductive rights in Congress? clean_body: Ohioans stood up to the radical extremists trying to control our bodies and made it clear that the government has no place in personal medical decisions. | | | = = Peter, I'm coming to you with incredible news out of Ohio: Thanks to millions of people from across Ohio and countless grassroots volunteers, Issue 1 passed, enshrining in our state constitution the right to an abortion! Not only will Issue 1 protect the right for women to access abortion services in Ohio, it will also provide a constitutional right for birth control, for fertility treatment, and for miscarriage care. Together, Ohioans stood up to the radical extremists trying to control our bodies and made it clear that the government has no place in personal medical decisions. But while this is an incredible moment, we can't afford to take our foot off the gas. Republicans in the House will stop at nothing to pass a national abortion ban — and it's going to take all of us working together to stop them. That's where you come in, Peter. Please, will you chip in to my campaign and EMILYs List today so that we can keep fighting for reproductive rights in Congress? We're counting on your support. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Congresswoman Emilia Sykes Ohio's 13th Congressional District = = EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. Of all the skills of leadership, listening is the most valuable.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=813e99bfde7e477b933a0e79d5253615&_t=rtT3DwvYkPk6h4ak5RHelVka1YuFpEFZAzf9UbIXOt_ylmYGKMJuFeunAGZ3GaaYp2SE9ruLAGF0DkgKi-Q2x9LZUYbvXq-Mvxv5t5ic_6E%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=813e99bfde7e477b933a0e79d5253615&_t=rtT3DwvYkPk6h4ak5RHelVka1YuFpEFZAzf9UbIXOt_ylmYGKMJuFeunAGZ3GaaYp2SE9ruLAGF0DkgKi-Q2x9LZUYbvXq-Mvxv5t5ic_6E%3D)

|
Fellow American,

**We are Americans.**

At the end of the day, that is our most unifying principle. That spirit of unity is a centerpiece of my campaign. We cannot establish a national identity without saying, "I am proud to be American."

A President can and should be the best example of that ideal. Someone who listens to every American, even if they disagree on issues or on how to make America stronger. That's exactly why I need to hear from you now, Fellow American.

**[Please share your year-end priorities and where you stand on the future of America.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=813e99bfde7e477b933a0e79d5253615&_e=4eHYXXvo6xmcUftKtnopvlGsZzvX6cywgFnvG2IZpDly-5AYDOe1VFn5AgMNYiX0KuAKYzm0x7y_B6FvQgZzZSgDj_gTlxgMAmCb5sijFViug0iAIG_VZY217-nNTxEAf88-x__rZQc6hm8Npigu23A_ByAsCcRvHgm8VCM8zxTbJKiYUIPH1Lb27Pz_DM6LirX4JUikb5dZot4iFut0Sl2TOm4CbPZFBJojlh9v4EOhh0wYZPvP7neSahamRnp53utLneG-wyiJpdF4Yl1C6_wOc04LB32EPhMcLXlsgr3u1rtrsD_8C1rPm2HNyb3jlBabgqRTktL7-wRBfJK-OJCr3dniLCGMnTDhErcNuTiAW0llNl8PksXy1Co9-HFeBY9O_YJn9RqulT4kj2Qz0gKbCWXBrnX0yhHUCUS8V-yUJXN4HJP2Z3rQ2dx3XnYWZO90qUI9CNxb6hDoDs6cS05oACSOCQPsWcQ0qWPKQsToN-LDFOodD_0liq1Z78dZsTxE7x0ZUpS_bbZ9lF7n_nodvsUmvGxFrWb8rRDfibN9HRYnequsEClTNxlqLEfz)**

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Of all the skills of leadership, listening is the most valuable. | | Fellow American, We are Americans. At the end of the day, that is our most unifying principle. That spirit of unity is a centerpiece of my campaign. We cannot establish a national identity without saying, "I am proud to be American." A President can and should be the best example of that ideal. Someone who listens to every American, even if they disagree on issues or on how to make America stronger. That's exactly why I need to hear from you now, Fellow American. | PRE-DEBATE ISSUES POLL 1\. ◯ Yes ◯ No 2\. ◯ Yes ◯ No ◯ Unsure 3\. ◯ State of the economy ◯ Standing with our allies ◯ Strength of our borders ◯ Big Tech and censorship ◯ Securing our elections ◯ Stance on "Woke" Issues 4\. ◯ Right ◯ Wrong ◯ Unsure 5\. Share your thoughts on how to save America | Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: James Carville
subject: Pennsylvania is as competitive as ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
I had to reach out ASAP.
#
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-casey-split.w9a6HL&refcode=em231112-1-t3&t=1&akid=4999%2E196590%2ETHkTye)
Hi folks, it’s Carville.
I’ll tell you right now: we’ve gotta get serious about Pennsylvania’s Senate race.
David McCormick — a mega-millionaire hedge fund guy who can spend HUGE sums of his own money and self-fund this race — is trying to flip PA’s Senate seat red.
So the biggest mistake grassroots Democrats can make right now is to sit by and think that re-electing Bob Casey is a shoo-in.
As someone who’s spent nearly half a century electing Democrats and winning tough elections across the country, I’m telling ya — this is gonna be a close one, and we gotta act now.
[**Please will you split a donation of $5 or more between Bob Casey and The Long Run? We CANNOT take Pennsylvania for granted.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-casey-split.w9a6HL&refcode=em231112-1-t3&t=2&akid=4999%2E196590%2ETHkTye)
[CHIP IN $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-casey-split.w9a6HL&refcode=em231112-1-t3&t=3&akid=4999%2E196590%2ETHkTye)
The fact is if we don’t rally for Bob RIGHT NOW, we’re toast. That’s how serious Mitch McConnell and his cronies are about winning this race.
**National Republicans are getting ready to spend potentially more than EVER in the Keystone State!!!**
I’ll take it one step further — if we want to win, I think we need to see a LOT more grassroots donations than we have since McCormick launched his campaign.
[**Act now to shore up our strength in Pennsylvania. Split $5 or any amount between The Long Run and Bob Casey’s campaign to defend our Senate majority.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-casey-split.w9a6HL&refcode=em231112-1-t3&t=4&akid=4999%2E196590%2ETHkTye)
[CHIP IN $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-casey-split.w9a6HL&refcode=em231112-1-t3&t=5&akid=4999%2E196590%2ETHkTye)
Thanks as always,
James Carville

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=4999%2E196590%2ETHkTye). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=7&akid=4999%2E196590%2ETHkTye)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=4999_196590_THkTye&akid=4999%2E196590%2ETHkTye)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=9&akid=4999%2E196590%2ETHkTye)

Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: I’m proud of this number
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Team, **$24.64** That’s how much, on average, someone chips in to our campaign, and I couldn’t be prouder. That number represents the thousands of people who chip in to fuel our grassroots movement. And when I look and see that so many of you are committed to standing alongside us, it makes me feel more hopeful than ever before about the future of our country. It shows me that you’re committed to fighting like hell to protect abortion access and reproductive rights. It shows me that you’re committed to fighting like hell against an extreme MAGA agenda that wants to rip away our freedoms just so they can cut taxes for their wealthy friends. It shows me that you’re committed to fighting like hell for gun safety so that Michiganders, and all Americans, can live safely in their communities. And most of all, it shows me that you’re committed to fighting like hell to build a political movement that will stand up to people like Donald Trump and elect Democrats across the country. **That’s why it’s important that we see a surge of grassroots fundraising ahead of next week’s mid-quarter fundraising deadline.[Will you match our average online contribution of $24.64 to help us reach our mid-quarter fundraising goal? That number represents the thousands of people who chip in to fuel our grassroots movement. And when I look and see that so many of you are committed to standing alongside us, it makes me feel more hopeful than ever before about the future of our country. It shows me that you’re committed to fighting like hell to protect abortion access and reproductive rights. It shows me that you’re committed to fighting like hell against an extreme MAGA agenda that wants to rip away our freedoms just so they can cut taxes for their wealthy friends. It shows me that you’re committed to fighting like hell for gun safety so that Michiganders, and all Americans, can live safely in their communities. And most of all, it shows me that you’re committed to fighting like hell to build a political movement that will stand up to people like Donald Trump and elect Democrats across the country. That’s why it’s important that we see a surge of grassroots fundraising ahead of next week’s mid-quarter fundraising deadline.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for your continued support. name: Team Mondaire
subject: Good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Mike Lawler is vulnerable, but Republicans will spare no expense to keep their reliable MAGA vote and hold their narrow majority.
**_Politico:_ “GOP sees gains in heavily blue NY. Here’s what it says for 2024.”**
Team—we’ll start with the good news: Democrats across NY-17 had an incredible election night, flipping key seats and defeating Lawler-backed candidates.

**The bad news is these victories did not materialize everywhere.** According to _Politico,_ **"Democrats have a New York problem."** Republicans saw a “red wave” on Long Island and even in the Bronx—an alarming outcome that could spell trouble in 2024.

Republicans smell blood, and they're going to fight like hell to hold onto Mike Lawler's reliable MAGA vote and flip other races. **We need to start preparing to fight back NOW.**

Every political insider and analyst is calling NY-17 a true “toss-up.” The path to retaking the House majority runs straight through our district.

Mondaire is running a grassroots campaign. Your money will help us build a war chest to fund ads, organizers, yard signs, and more when the time comes. We have to start early because Lawler is backed by shady right-wing money that could swamp us if we're not careful.

Flipping NY-17 blue and retaking our majority is well within reach, but it’s going to take this grassroots team stepping up and coming together to make it happen.

[**Our mid-month deadline is right around the corner. Chip in any amount right away to help us reach our $25,000 grassroots goal, and let’s send Mondaire back to Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73244113/437858498/-1250271359?refcode=em23_231112_MM1_fndd_gq_act___TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231112_MM1_fndd_gq_act___TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=2dd7f9ec-7c81-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGQ3ZjllYy03YzgxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pZ5pyFtE7IrfuruYDLrEGEkMORylZkVS4p56hA3rxhw=)

clean_body: Mike Lawler is vulnerable, but Republicans will spare no expense to keep their reliable MAGA vote and hold their narrow majority. Politico: “GOP sees gains in heavily blue NY. Here’s what it says for 2024.” Team—we’ll start with the good news: Democrats across NY-17 had an incredible election night, flipping key seats and defeating Lawler-backed candidates. The bad news is these victories did not materialize everywhere. According to Politico, "Democrats have a New York problem." Republicans saw a “red wave” on Long Island and even in the Bronx—an alarming outcome that could spell trouble in 2024. Republicans smell blood, and they're going to fight like hell to hold onto Mike Lawler's reliable MAGA vote and flip other races. We need to start preparing to fight back NOW. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Every political insider and analyst is calling NY-17 a true “toss-up.” The path to retaking the House majority runs straight through our district. Mondaire is running a grassroots campaign. Your money will help us build a war chest to fund ads, organizers, yard signs, and more when the time comes. We have to start early because Lawler is backed by shady right-wing money that could swamp us if we're not careful. Flipping NY-17 blue and retaking our majority is well within reach, but it’s going to take this grassroots team stepping up and coming together to make it happen. = Onwards, Team Mondaire Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. = = = PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591

name: Speaker Johnson
subject: What guides America?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
Reagan understood that a well-articulated vision and public policy grounded in our timeless conservative principles were the keys to restoring our country and preserving freedom. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=6b886d904a69433b97b1ac0791a4ccdc&_t=e7Kb4q1ttdU2wRwSGIqK8seU_lPxzLgYNsiqx1L9AqDIz3bl8Bsz5B5aCtaDD5x-VFX6qjYiAcaPHBVnLCyfafs7FssLc_ybaSXevdEuiaU%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=6b886d904a69433b97b1ac0791a4ccdc&_t=e7Kb4q1ttdU2wRwSGIqK8seU_lPxzLgYNsiqx1L9AqDIz3bl8Bsz5B5aCtaDD5x-VFX6qjYiAcaPHBVnLCyfafs7FssLc_ybaSXevdEuiaU%3D)
[ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6b886d904a69433b97b1ac0791a4ccdc&_e=7S904E4--gdRbxOjdGmnaqcVD8zO17TcD5VWw-Pu0Dumn4WrVVL17_N1ZBUej08_KppW3tK6i0BrJOBIZTx6MH-dwGl4MoRKzmynBWZy8UP17IFAicBykabZoKuF9ITYyb99hMhvt495I81h4eRg9smLn9Zx9FAPwkQcLEPZWn7_SYl_RidSSpn6mfCME09fJwpspyxdVKP-kLwbZ620d3L-JSA4GWx27B2juMgF-6YeNZ1nx9kURG--vnsyhwI0qIHU-Hiq3vC156ypLkoIClzmHGd_tNgSpevpPVieNa88GoYMssaIRIgGC_pqi6fmX_kumsv5dkJKqVSj131JiNgTOfQEfSlYRJ9KFojLrCo4Sa1XP-MpmaDNLDpRX7IELTXt9MpGNwCAgSQMM82BHw%3D%3D)
---
Peter -

While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, _the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before._

When America was struggling greatly in the late 1970s, Ronald Reagan stood strong before the people and [**called upon us to return to our nation’s founding principles and paint again with bold colors instead of pale pastels.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6b886d904a69433b97b1ac0791a4ccdc&_e=7S904E4--gdRbxOjdGmnaqcVD8zO17TcD5VWw-Pu0Dumn4WrVVL17_N1ZBUej08_KppW3tK6i0BrJOBIZTx6MH-dwGl4MoRKzmynBWZy8UP17IFAicBykabZoKuF9ITYyb99hMhvt495I81h4eRg9smLn9Zx9FAPwkQcLEPZWn7_SYl_RidSSpn6mfCME09fJwpspyxdVKP-kLwbZ620d3L-JSA4GWx27B2juMgF-6YeNZ1nx9kURG--vnsyhwI0UJcpKwPsWmDMD99_0obCFftH4YJOIXFUfHkpZu-Qp3VdgKqZblKbVEXmut-YlEAL8hGXRdvcYzcEcGDwmtUVuIJg3YggZKOeCR8iACEc-sQ9mD7MWLGxJlA6EYePnWRwx0N6KYZB8MDt4pP6Xa6eBg%3D%3D)

[** RESTORE AMERICA > **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6b886d904a69433b97b1ac0791a4ccdc&_e=7S904E4--gdRbxOjdGmnaqcVD8zO17TcD5VWw-Pu0Dumn4WrVVL17_N1ZBUej08_KppW3tK6i0BrJOBIZTx6MH-dwGl4MoRKzmynBWZy8UP17IFAicBykabZoKuF9ITYyb99hMhvt495I81h4eRg9smLn9Zx9FAPwkQcLEPZWn7_SYl_RidSSpn6mfCME09fJwpspyxdVKP-kLwbZ620d3L-JSA4GWx27B2juMgF-6YeNZ1nx9kURG--vnsyhwI0Ruf6lKQr69uGT66LHqTjOD0ES2pM7gsJjaEd5uIYfCL1z_SsaLUl4-seNWmdXbnGejevyiCn6ME1G6AN3q-CBAZoFgiRj-GWjsRVkGzmlW-BZoRM3cFB_t7VDztnDob5DHyDJ5V8ZgBkM9NnVBgVXw%3D%3D)
_Republicans desperately needed that clarity and conviction,_ and Reagan understood that a well-articulated vision and public policy grounded in our timeless conservative principles were the keys to restoring our country and preserving freedom.

[**The principles that made America, and brought us back during the Reagan Revolution, must guide us still today:**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6b886d904a69433b97b1ac0791a4ccdc&_e=7S904E4--gdRbxOjdGmnaqcVD8zO17TcD5VWw-Pu0Dumn4WrVVL17_N1ZBUej08_KppW3tK6i0BrJOBIZTx6MH-dwGl4MoRKzmynBWZy8UP17IFAicBykabZoKuF9ITYyb99hMhvt495I81h4eRg9smLn9Zx9FAPwkQcLEPZWn7_SYl_RidSSpn6mfCME09fJwpspyxdVKP-kLwbZ620d3L-JSA4GWx27B2juMgF-6YeNZ1nx9kURG--vnsyhwI0_pviFv1aMkAC2KmA40dQgiwojieygITqsyO8GcKpNfFUIYpPpS9dcTGdrDzQXhw0Ah3eQgMryAOwrLhn0fYEXYwyfuYmka_3KUxewdFY3Z3_Iu92A8fw3f46Ec0jXTYKiAlW6IhcqDGE_9n7ogCLqw%3D%3D)

* Individual freedom
* Limited government
* The rule of law
* Peace through strength
* Fiscal responsibility
* Free markets
* Human dignity
* The sanctity of human life

**I believe it is our duty as Americans to stand for conservative values without compromise.** I am fighting every day for the same vision that Ronald Reagan once had. As Speaker of the House, it is my job to unite our party on what it will take to win and save America. clean_body: Reagan understood that a well-articulated vision and public policy grounded in our timeless conservative principles were the keys to restoring our country and preserving freedom. | | Peter - While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before. When America was struggling greatly in the late 1970s, Ronald Reagan stood strong before the people and Republicans desperately needed that clarity and conviction, and Reagan understood that a well-articulated vision and public policy grounded in our timeless conservative principles were the keys to restoring our country and preserving freedom. Individual freedom Limited government The rule of law Peace through strength Fiscal responsibility Free markets Human dignity The sanctity of human life I believe it is our duty as Americans to stand for conservative values without compromise. I am fighting every day for the same vision that Ronald Reagan once had. As Speaker of the House, it is my job to unite our party on what it will take to win and save America. As I lead the critical fight to restore our country and defend our values, We have a chance to save America from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. subject: We need your help to secure our nation’s future.

body:
I’m emailing you about Dave McCormick, a fellow patriot and leader who’s running for the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania. This race could decide the majority — which means it could decide our country’s future.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=9a7a17cc0383452a9ce06ee0f06a8a24&_t=eC8W-fYV0iq9HZ8WFdrfneYeWlfPebGM0jtZtN7Y5yyN8RoBFczwebl75GNmh9gJSrPgjnrC74M_mOaNpR-Oh2md8mZ_90iOKCv4eOhaVrk%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=9a7a17cc0383452a9ce06ee0f06a8a24&_t=eC8W-fYV0iq9HZ8WFdrfneYeWlfPebGM0jtZtN7Y5yyN8RoBFczwebl75GNmh9gJSrPgjnrC74M_mOaNpR-Oh2md8mZ_90iOKCv4eOhaVrk%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9a7a17cc0383452a9ce06ee0f06a8a24&_e=oo13Wet_OVTZejsqWciSUDWGXCzH67N8VIYkGkkgLZKvUqZCDbMB1CfuACB8cVCorhAwxWPNbvd54TeKh8b-qFRAeNDmzbgdlx6f94KgNmdmsXYPj3GTvBtRYSybeMaaoIGN5Bsg5CGB_Q2dejq7rvL3ke8JRX5fNcBKMSzaGwg5VbSgm5mbxWbQhFEWNtc7kRLxHSADJvPuZY66QeCjEhBhbLXzzAb6atcGTJOy_-QhaH-BzpGIp2rojrcp23mdICBekYvqqaBAXJW3sngLQToMRBL_IuEY7eGlUGwWMqnNF__4JvlFQbqHl5FrXCWuaWjmQU6XCjPn6x44eVzV0XRa-sVYlSAcVZZ3E_z-RkA%3D)

Peter,

**I 'm emailing you about Dave McCormick, a fellow patriot and leader who's running for the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania.** This race could decide the majority -- which means it could decide our country's future.

Dave is a fellow combat veteran, successful businessman, and someone committed to serving his country.

I know the importance of strong leadership that never retreats and always advances. And I know Dave McCormick has what it takes to help make our country strong again -- starting by standing up to Communist China.

**Joe Biden and the rest of the left are pathetically weak.** They've refused to get tough on China over anything -- from unleashing the virus to spying on Americans to gobbling up our farmland.

**If we 're going to stop this madness, then Republicans must flip the U.S. Senate. And to flip the Senate, we must come together to support Dave McCormick in this race.**
[SEND SUPPORT TO DAVE->](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9a7a17cc0383452a9ce06ee0f06a8a24&_e=oo13Wet_OVTZejsqWciSUDWGXCzH67N8VIYkGkkgLZKvUqZCDbMB1CfuACB8cVCorhAwxWPNbvd54TeKh8b-qFRAeNDmzbgdlx6f94KgNmdmsXYPj3GTvBtRYSybeMaaoIGN5Bsg5CGB_Q2dejq7rvL3ke8JRX5fNcBKMSzaGwg5VbSgm5mbxWbQhFEWNtc7879GW-c5rFE4mrLe49MxUN9r_BxruN8O_Rfr286Ncn0PUDYADKwIiQMBS-kGnejjXLX5oBGgrr7ftAPB7k_qotMU9g7Gqqaf-hKju01_pXszgHNWZtUqUDanCHGEuVD7AlX4Ug7PtUWvLEinSF3wtouCKzEl5ze5mnE9vXuodN4%3D)
---

**[But here's the reality: Dave can't do it alone. He needs your support.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9a7a17cc0383452a9ce06ee0f06a8a24&_e=oo13Wet_OVTZejsqWciSUDWGXCzH67N8VIYkGkkgLZKvUqZCDbMB1CfuACB8cVCorhAwxWPNbvd54TeKh8b-qFRAeNDmzbgdlx6f94KgNmdmsXYPj3GTvBtRYSybeMaaoIGN5Bsg5CGB_Q2dejq7rvL3ke8JRX5fNcBKMSzaGwg5VbSgm5mbxWbQhFEWNtc738QEAo6iYOKyIhKvbuWXlgvebxhD_eiizpty1FOzPthte6dHctZTCNROTpYruVOiHibMZIEfI2vdbO3x1xFRIkmNUv58h9oQ2YbCMeh3rSh9GC4XmtaXOyOJJlJkETHyrKmWsW_25m1pDoIy17xS4nfuHcPxScYA1JULah_kGFc%3D)**

For Dave to flip this seat, we need every tough conservative reading this to step up. And that's why I'm coming to you today.

**[Can I count on you to stand with Dave?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9a7a17cc0383452a9ce06ee0f06a8a24&_e=oo13Wet_OVTZejsqWciSUDWGXCzH67N8VIYkGkkgLZKvUqZCDbMB1CfuACB8cVCorhAwxWPNbvd54TeKh8b-qFRAeNDmzbgdlx6f94KgNmdmsXYPj3GTvBtRYSybeMaaoIGN5Bsg5CGB_Q2dejq7rvL3ke8JRX5fNcBKMSzaGwg5VbSgm5mbxWbQhFEWNtc7k7gIloZws8vQ59YEd7s_VTjH0xvH5jQOQAbPGHXjSZaPrTNSUSf47tjJ9Q8r2X_lA36O8r5CbpWD9HlVcj47-uEMnfVIK_9cssBAxnQErUuRF7HGX9zMS3KR5c6f1B1M1vLjU5cp3vx9rokZjTq02D7mlSCkYtiv-1jwGZL-UEU%3D)**

_Your donation, no matter the size, will make a difference._ Every dollar counts, and your support will help us build a stronger and safer America for future generations.

With your help, we can ensure Dave McCormick has the resources it takes to flip this seat, help Republicans take back the Senate, and then work with me to make America strong again.

In service,
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9a7a17cc0383452a9ce06ee0f06a8a24&_e=oo13Wet_OVTZejsqWciSUDWGXCzH67N8VIYkGkkgLZKvUqZCDbMB1CfuACB8cVCorhAwxWPNbvd54TeKh8b-qFRAeNDmzbgdlx6f94KgNmdmsXYPj3GTvBtRYSybeMaaoIGN5Bsg5CGB_Q2dejq7rvL3ke8JRX5fNcBKMSzaGwg5VbSgm5mbxWbQhFEWNtc7FF_sfX-EpjfIJpH2l78YVf3ttJYj60HCMzoYQ3_Y62v4iKp6SKwFPKeKH-tgn1SWScX8nsVvFt4iJ3_RUZsjWfnQkJvvmuQCENX8B1_1vsj7eWGUvHtGnd6bl7ksWogXK9niLnbZXjhJSpPs3_ppERn_ethe4GA-NtTmb-2atlo%3D)

Tom Cotton [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9a7a17cc0383452a9ce06ee0f06a8a24&_e=oo13Wet_OVTZejsqWciSUDWGXCzH67N8VIYkGkkgLZKvUqZCDbMB1CfuACB8cVCorhAwxWPNbvd54TeKh8b-qFRAeNDmzbgdlx6f94KgNmdmsXYPj3GTvBtRYSybeMaaoIGN5Bsg5CGB_Q2dejq7rvL3ke8JRX5fNcBKMSzaGwg5VbSgm5mbxWbQhFEWNtc7iCvLNQtbgSI5fF8aUTIXqsA55AdoZUCXwDGwsydemX5nrnopdiJ14hJLmaptTLCT5Vf-EoVyhh6y0QE2LFrx5u0teaoGw0l_Y14nn_OokgEMKxWZOT0GQthEkJOd3ArB88RlvsXURKjklP-iGJnKFykKILP0dS4nibLyqKz3-t4%3D)

[SUPPORT DAVE NOW](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9a7a17cc0383452a9ce06ee0f06a8a24&_e=oo13Wet_OVTZejsqWciSUDWGXCzH67N8VIYkGkkgLZKvUqZCDbMB1CfuACB8cVCorhAwxWPNbvd54TeKh8b-qFRAeNDmzbgdlx6f94KgNmdmsXYPj3GTvBtRYSybeMaaoIGN5Bsg5CGB_Q2dejq7rvL3ke8JRX5fNcBKMSzaGwg5VbSgm5mbxWbQhFEWNtc7d6LGneKSt0NmwWkgG-vGCkmzRu8AgbUgfACMMN0Z-2e7nfKPx5503em3k_JpP94edduF7bLYfVPSzYdkAB5IV9_4zqmCNya2TVjn8fhJOZ7mbsZCPOa3ciLXC_S87aMeITCu5We9Qc9QTz2NA51ffB9P-WxrOrmTFfq2zUgztWM%3D)

Bob Casey is running for re-election in one of the most competitive battleground states in the country in 2024 — and Mitch McConnell has already made this seat one of his top targets.
**Supporting Bob’s campaign is critical to keeping our majority in the Senate. It’s that simple.**
**[So pitch in $5, $10, or what you can to Bob’s re-election campaign ahead of his mid-month deadline →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231112-1?refcode=em20231112-1&refcode2=1116_552475_xgIE3D&akid=1116%2E552475%2ExgIE3D)**

name: Lose Cruz HQ
subject: Brace yourselves…Ted wants to run for president again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOSE CRUZ PAC
body:
Haven’t we been here before?
# [](https://act.losecruzpac.com/go/128?t=1&akid=140%2E623276%2En3UKhw)
Between endlessly tweeting and constantly appearing on cable television, there’s not much Ted Cruz says that can surprise us. But even we couldn't predict this: 👇
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231112?refcode=em20231112&amount=5&refcode2=140_623276_n3UKhw&akid=140%2E623276%2En3UKhw)
And since then, our team hasn’t been able to stop laughing:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231112?refcode=em20231112&amount=5&refcode2=140_623276_n3UKhw&akid=140%2E623276%2En3UKhw)
But all jokes aside, if you don’t have the time to join us for a quick trip down memory lane, [**will you pitch in $5 or any amount that works for you so we can deny Ted another Senate term _and_ keep him out of the White House?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231112?refcode=em20231112&amount=5&refcode2=140_623276_n3UKhw&akid=140%2E623276%2En3UKhw)
Alright, let's travel back to 2016:
* Back then, Ted was an early front-runner among GOP candidates and several pundits predicted a GOP nomination in his sights.

* When he failed to clinch the nomination, Ted became Trump’s biggest Senate cheerleader, despite initially criticizing him and eventually became a leading figure of the Sedition Caucus that sought to overturn the 2020 election.

* Then, like now — Ted has been "hard at work" to:
* Pass a national abortion ban
* Refuse to address mass shootings
* Enforce a far-right immigration policy
* Undermine same-sex marriage, voting rights, and our democracy

**We'll pass 😡🙅**. We have plenty of far-right extremists to be worried about next year.
**Ted Cruz has shown us who he is time and time again.** He doesn’t care about serving or doing what’s right for Texans. All he cares about is furthering his career at the expense of the rest of us. We’ve had enough.
We’re ready to send him home but to do this, we’ll need a groundswell of grassroots support to make this a reality.
[**Help us cross the finish line and replace Ted with someone who will _actually_ fight for Texas by chipping in $5 today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231112?refcode=em20231112&amount=5&refcode2=140_623276_n3UKhw&akid=140%2E623276%2En3UKhw)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231112?amount=5&refcode=em20231112&refcode2=140_623276_n3UKhw&akid=140%2E623276%2En3UKhw)**
Thank you for being an integral part of this movement!
In solidarity,
— LCHQ

* * *
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-footer?refcode=em-140&t=2&refcode2=140_623276_n3UKhw&akid=140%2E623276%2En3UKhw)**

Lose Cruz PAC

Washington, DC 20001
