name: COURIER
subject: Stop The Presses: Fact-checking isn’t enough, we need fact-crusading
body:
Those who spread misinformation should be called out AND confronted.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73245729/437864395/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDRkYzE1MWEtODE4MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Dpfxd4-yXXzzXBOGSHh4y3KQomzdQPEYVerjnlbhtG0=&emci=24ac3879-227f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=44dc151a-8181-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=14016711)
Peter, fact-checking is not enough.
Simple fact-checking is not enough to address the rising tide of right-wing misinformation, and it doesn’t stop all too many news outlets from platforming that misinformation.
_We need fact-crusading, not just fact-checking._
We'll explain the difference between these in a moment, but if you want to support journalism that fact-checks and _crusades_ , [**will you chip in $5 to power our rigorous journalism?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73245731/437864397/1796093812?refcode=em20231112&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDRkYzE1MWEtODE4MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Dpfxd4-yXXzzXBOGSHh4y3KQomzdQPEYVerjnlbhtG0=)
A journalist’s ultimate task is to provide people with the critical information they need to accurately assess the issues and events impacting their community. When news organizations and journalists provide a platform for misinformation to spread unchecked, they do themselves and the people they serve **a massive disservice.**
COURIER was founded on the radical idea that media organizations must prioritize truth-telling and rigorous journalism above turning a profit and driving clicks.
We’ve seen over and over the damaging impact of mainstream media organizations neglecting this responsibility. Rather than actively confronting and fighting disinformation, they strive for so-called “balance.” More times than not, the result is that they end up spreading misleading and false information instead of correcting it.
[**By contributing $5, you're helping to power our efforts to provide the good journalism our communities need at this critical time.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73245732/437864399/1796093812?refcode=em20231112&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDRkYzE1MWEtODE4MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Dpfxd4-yXXzzXBOGSHh4y3KQomzdQPEYVerjnlbhtG0=)
**For the good of our democracy, this has to change, Peter.** As local newsrooms continue to dry up across the country, the far-right is intensifying efforts to spread dangerous, anti-democratic ideas that divide and hurt our communities.
That’s what makes our work at COURIER different. Rather than passively fact-check right-wing BS, our journalists across our nine newsrooms are actively fact-crusading and holding bad actors accountable for their lies and deceit.
Our innovative model **not only** informs but _crucially_ confronts bad information in real time — all without locking our stories behind a paywall or subscription fees.
But for us to continue fact-crusading in the local communities who need it the most, we need to continue to have the resources our newsrooms need to keep the lights on.
That's where you come in. [**If you'd like to support the engaging, fact-crusading journalism our democracy deserves, will you pitch in $5 or anything you can today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73245734/437864400/1796093812?refcode=em20231112&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDRkYzE1MWEtODE4MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Dpfxd4-yXXzzXBOGSHh4y3KQomzdQPEYVerjnlbhtG0=)
[Pitch In ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73245742/437864402/1796093812?refcode=em20231112&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDRkYzE1MWEtODE4MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Dpfxd4-yXXzzXBOGSHh4y3KQomzdQPEYVerjnlbhtG0=)
Thank you for all you do,
— COURIER
* * *
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

[**Receive Fewer Emails**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73245743/437864411/1416945388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDRkYzE1MWEtODE4MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Dpfxd4-yXXzzXBOGSHh4y3KQomzdQPEYVerjnlbhtG0=&emci=24ac3879-227f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=44dc151a-8181-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=14016711)
[**Update Your Information**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73245744/437864412/1324474970?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDRkYzE1MWEtODE4MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Dpfxd4-yXXzzXBOGSHh4y3KQomzdQPEYVerjnlbhtG0=&emci=24ac3879-227f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=44dc151a-8181-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=14016711)
**[unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XCUEQN0BTUWWQ1xBmQeS9g2?unsubscribedata=BHI6W%2BGjL8HTgLGZvmXUIqPXLd9EC0pSjIa0cWxBScQ%2FQN6%2BrGVgz0FPIk6M9W9s4GZqtmYCEMtZ6mBv1HaCIz9E22zN%2B9GHatOYfvgfkcpkJwBmT69d5h3Uy4jsCSiEqrj9ajSbi7v3LpibH8alJlHCejPG3hA2730VwjuN8OT21MsvndALdz%2Fify%2FtJqmw%2Bzy6CBPypLx%2FjPTXIwWm2Vr01tF%2BNg7PeoJk3%2FqFDNUcPydfRbAoy%2FykPdai9FMF%2FskFwbaEs58QrJfYh4al1vYW2jQuDjv%2Fj4QOGvkNA2vpHjtcqOQ%2BvkWF8SiNm8jedk8CVGZQBqdSmMSqIMeAgZ5l5FbUTJEEsShnu3nuVPBqEGC6wGzwTGwiaIK8pxrR3kI%2FMuNl5yZ%2B0b8g%2B48IGmmNx3%2B42Dd0xssJzlatq9%2FT7O3t1VKjAoy%2F1hfysbhJ)**
To give by check:

name: Tony Evers HQ
subject: Tell Republicans to stop politicizing our election system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek, did you see
this note about the GOP’s latest attacks on our election system?

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2193?source=EM_NBI_TE_20231112_PT_ElectionSystem.1.2_0_3MO_TonyEversHQ_NA_NA_ElectionSystem&t=1001&akid=6483%2E1827488%2Eth6vwV ]We have to fight back. Tell the Republicans to stop politicizing our
election system by adding your name to our petition today.

— Begin Forwarded Message —

Derek, did you
see the latest assault on fair elections by Wisconsin Republicans?

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2193?source=EM_NBI_TE_20231112_PT_ElectionSystem.1.2_0_3MO_TonyEversHQ_NA_NA_ElectionSystem&t=1002&akid=6483%2E1827488%2Eth6vwV ][IMG]
Republicans in the legislature will not stop in their efforts to attack
our election system, including attempting to remove our state’s
nonpartisan elections administrator.

Wisconsinites deserve a nonpartisan, unbiased election system. Every vote
in every election must be counted, and we can’t allow Republicans to
hijack our election procedures.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2193?source=EM_NBI_TE_20231112_PT_ElectionSystem.1.2_0_3MO_TonyEversHQ_NA_NA_ElectionSystem&t=1003&akid=6483%2E1827488%2Eth6vwV ]If you agree that Republicans must stop their extreme efforts to remove
our nonpartisan elections administrator, please add your name to our
petition today.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2193?source=EM_NBI_TE_20231112_PT_ElectionSystem.1.2_0_3MO_TonyEversHQ_NA_NA_ElectionSystem&t=1004&akid=6483%2E1827488%2Eth6vwV ]SIGN ON

Onward,

Team Evers

Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://go.tonyevers.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=6483%2E1827488%2Eth6vwV

**Since Vice President Kamala Harris was elected, she has proven herself to be a vital asset and a strong force to keeping our democracy alive.**

Beyond her historic election, she has continued to break records _and_ barriers with her persistence and strong leadership.

However, the MAGA extremist rot that has been plagued this nation since Donald Trump’s election has taken root.

That’s why we’re reaching out to loyal Democrats like you to fix the record and strengthen Kamala Harris’ approval rating.

name: Team Pramila
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We can’t power this campaign without you.
#
Peter,
Our team moved mountains to reach our October end of month goal — and we did it!
We have three things to say: **thank you, thank you, thank you.**
With your support, dedication, and faith in this movement, we were able to ensure that our campaign can continue working at full power in November.
Your support, no matter the amount, allows us to keep pace with our plans and ensure that our fight continues 24/7 — 365 days a year.
Peter, we can't power this campaign without you. [**Can we count on you to make a donation of any amount to help us keep up our momentum from October and continue fighting for our democracy?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47120?refcode=em20231112-3155&t=1&akid=3155%2E420207%2E6A8Dot)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47120?refcode=em20231112-3155&t=20&akid=3155%2E420207%2E6A8Dot)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20231112-3155-footer&t=21&refcode2=3155_420207_6A8Dot&akid=3155%2E420207%2E6A8Dot)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

body:
Today is an important day to show you stand with Ilhan
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=710%2E791427%2ES8PUXq)

We wanted to make sure you heard the news:
**The same opponent we defeated last year just launched his primary campaign challenge against Ilhan.**
Last cycle, as the super PACs threw an avalanche of dark money behind our opponent and put up an onslaught of bigoted attack ads against us, our movement stood together and went on to win by 2,466 votes.
We cannot afford to take anything for granted this time around. Once again, it's going to take ALL of us to fight back and win in 2024.
**Today's an important day to show you stand with Ilhan, so please:**
**[Can you make a contribution — of $3 or anything you can — to our re-election campaign? Your support, especially today, is so critical to our success.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov23.oBEWmx&refcode=em231112-1-t3&t=2&akid=710%2E791427%2ES8PUXq)**

As president, I will focus on the issues that **MATTER** like our skyrocketing debt, out-of-control government spending, lack of transparency in schools, high crime in our cities, and chaos on the border.

_We have a country to save, but I need your help to make it happen._

I assure you that your dedication and commitment to a better future will never go unnoticed. Thank you for standing with me, and thank you for believing that America is worth fighting for!

On Wednesday night, I had the opportunity to take the stage for my third presidential debate and prove to America that I am the ONLY candidate who can win this fight and save our country's future. From the moment I left the stage, I've been FLOODED with a nonstop SURGE OF SUPPORT. | We're closer than ever to VICTORY , but our work is far from over. We must continue the momentum, never let up, and keep pouring 100% into every day. With only 67 DAYS until the first votes are cast, we can't lose sight of what's to come. The stakes are now higher than ever to win this race. With your support, we WILL make America strong and proud again. As president, I will focus on the issues that MATTER like our skyrocketing debt, out-of-control government spending, lack of transparency in schools, high crime in our cities, and chaos on the border. We have a country to save, but I need your help to make it happen. I assure you that your dedication and commitment to a better future will never go unnoticed. Thank you for standing with me, and thank you for believing that America is worth fighting for! My very best, Nikki R. name: Brad, Team Schiff
subject: Bold
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| We’re making big plans for our TV and digital ad buys for the coming months ahead of the March primary in California.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4445%2E5257348%2Eq24fF9)
Derek —
We’re doing something a bit bold with this campaign to send Adam to the U.S. Senate — but it’s only possible with your help.
**We’re making big plans for our TV and digital ad buys for the coming months ahead of the early March primary in California.
**
And when I say big plans... they might even be too big. Hopefully not. Here’s my thinking:
There are 22 million registered voters in California. And this is Adam’s first statewide race, so most voters have never seen his name on their ballot.
Reaching people on the airwaves, the radio waves, and their social media feeds will be crucial for them to get to know who Adam really is — beyond the mean tweets from Trump and the attacks on _Fox News_ that can spread like wildfire.
But TV ads are expensive. **Like $4 million a week expensive.**
California is home to some of the most expensive media markets in the country.
And we rely on this grassroots team stepping up to support Adam’s campaign. To fund these ads and many other important efforts to turn out voters.
**The thing is — we need to book these ads soon. Before we know how much we’ll raise in the months ahead.
**
I’m not panicking... yet. But I really need this team to step up right away to make sure we don’t fall short of what we need to air these ads.
**[I’m hoping this team can help us raise another $150,000 by Wednesday to help our campaign run more ads about Adam’s long record of service for Californians — and his bold plans for California’s future. It’s what we need to do to win — and knowing this team, I bet that we can reach our goal. Derek, can you pitch in $3 today?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC90_20231112_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=4&akid=4445%2E5257348%2Eq24fF9)**

clean_body: | We’re making big plans for our TV and digital ad buys for the coming months ahead of the March primary in California. Derek — We’re doing something a bit bold with this campaign to send Adam to the U.S. Senate — but it’s only possible with your help. We’re making big plans for our TV and digital ad buys for the coming months ahead of the early March primary in California. And when I say big plans... they might even be too big. Hopefully not. Here’s my thinking: There are 22 million registered voters in California. And this is Adam’s first statewide race, so most voters have never seen his name on their ballot. Reaching people on the airwaves, the radio waves, and their social media feeds will be crucial for them to get to know who Adam really is — beyond the mean tweets from Trump and the attacks on Fox News that can spread like wildfire. But TV ads are expensive. Like $4 million a week expensive. California is home to some of the most expensive media markets in the country. And we rely on this grassroots team stepping up to support Adam’s campaign. To fund these ads and many other important efforts to turn out voters. The thing is — we need to book these ads soon. Before we know how much we’ll raise in the months ahead. I’m not panicking... yet. But I really need this team to step up right away to make sure we don’t fall short of what we need to air these ads. Peter,
It’s a wonderful fall weekend, and I hope you’re spending the day enjoying the fall breeze. Let me keep this short so you can go back to enjoying the weekend!
I’ll be honest, we’re running behind on our fundraising this month. November is flying by so **I’m humbly asking if you’ll consider making your first contribution of $5 right now so we can hit our goal.**
**You can give at this link:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231112-teamhillsupporter?refcode=em20231112-561](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231112?refcode=em20231112-561&refcode2=561_62735_HxLau8&akid=561%2E62735%2EHxLau8)**

Hill Harper

name: Sen. Josh Hawley
subject: A bigger threat than Hamas?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, The level of vitriol against Christian conservatives is staggering, and it is unrelenting.

Just this week, an article put out by liberal news outlet Salon attacking House Speaker Mike Johnson, among others, was titled, **“MAGA and Christian nationalism: Bigger threat to America than Hamas could ever be.”**

_**Wow, what a headline.**_

This is what we’re up against— the Left wants you to believe that our deeply held Christian faith and family values are more dangerous than **Jihadist terrorism**.

The new speaker of the house is a man rooted in faith and deeply conservative. _**[For this reason, the left hates him.](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0773d9c0ecb04754a4620ad0bbbeaf3d&_e=uZJDqw9I7N_zpDJR0UzZVOqzYgupuO7MN2QQEwS5TQJH2-D9_jqoPkIBgiuEqtDwVwGpgpOBiWC0ysaOORO92V7e7wTHBUhX3X6p-Uy8EbN8PPH9KyHH4obaWpW4LutgIt1tHvHX5VnfAoE1z3f0kJxbYtp2ViWo4vC9JckUjgGznzexfwOQdO-S_guLfY3tSoqFAXCaoOl0-VjuH7NQmeT2L5kZSVe5-NUXQ1Bamn3ggSvVbUzQZktma-s4Z2tlYOQC8vuY9Fa2X4nmJ9s6w-YwCuapUrB6NqCbu1Agsgv-E_8e5B0BOHojqNpan7Ukipdg-XEvma1UujFywvIkuI5J9G8xabvUZcLfR6w1cZjyPDj09r_8o7OPAa_UO1yJ)**_ We must stand with Mike Johnson as he faces the left, the media, and corporate America!

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Every dollar you invest in the Jane Fonda Climate PAC has an immediate impact in the decisions we make, and we cannot do it without you.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73248575/437874983/931971737?refcode=BLU-JANE-20231112-z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmNzUzMWJkLThhODEtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ggWFmtA-GTYrgzcA6Dh6fO7z5yvySK3bTDipmAqptdQ=)
---
| Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. If you’re reading this, it’s likely you receive a lot of emails from us. I wanted to take a moment to explain why we send them and why your support matters to the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and the candidates we support.

_**Here are 3 reasons why every investment counts:**_

1️⃣ _**We rely on grassroots supporters like you.**_ We wish we didn’t have to ask people to part with their hard-earned money, but our ability to support candidates depends on a lot of individuals being willing to support however they can.

2️⃣ _**We focus our support where we can have the biggest impact.**_ Our strategy combines direct financial support and smartly leveraging our ability to reach people in down-ballot races where even modest financial support goes a long way. **With your support in 2023, we have already been able to make a major impact on state & local races across the country from ****Virginia’s General Assembly election****wins to key victories for local Climate Champions in San Diego, Luzerne, and Minneapolis.**

3️⃣ _**The climate crisis is here.**_ Day after day, we are seeing the effects of burning fossils on our communities. The fossil fuel industry is dedicated to investing in politicians who will let them continue to get away with it. We can’t take a break from demanding climate action because the climate crisis is getting worse every day. And with your support, I strongly believe the climate movement is in great hands, but there is still so much work to be done.

We don’t say any of this to scare you – anyone who tries to scare you into giving them money should rethink that strategy. If nothing else, our goal is for you to feel hopeful – our team and the rest of the climate movement are working every day out of hope for a livable future, and we hope you consider yourself part of our team.

Every dollar you invest in the Jane Fonda Climate PAC has an immediate impact on the decisions we make, _**and we cannot do it without you.**_ [__**Will you contribute $10 today to keep up our momentum?**__](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73248576/437874985/931971737?refcode=BLU-JANE-20231112-z-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmNzUzMWJkLThhODEtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ggWFmtA-GTYrgzcA6Dh6fO7z5yvySK3bTDipmAqptdQ=)

clean_body: Every dollar you invest in the Jane Fonda Climate PAC has an immediate impact in the decisions we make, and we cannot do it without you. | = | Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. If you’re reading this, it’s likely you receive a lot of emails from us. I wanted to take a moment to explain why we send them and why your support matters to the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and the candidates we support. Here are 3 reasons why every investment counts: 1️⃣ We rely on grassroots supporters like you. We wish we didn’t have to ask people to part with their hard-earned money, but our ability to support candidates depends on a lot of individuals being willing to support however they can. 2️⃣ We focus our support where we can have the biggest impact. Our strategy combines direct financial support and smartly leveraging our ability to reach people in down-ballot races where even modest financial support goes a long way. With your support in 2023, we have already been able to make a major impact on state & local races across the country from Virginia’s General Assembly electionwins to key victories for local Climate Champions in San Diego, Luzerne, and Minneapolis. 3️⃣ The climate crisis is here. Day after day, we are seeing the effects of burning fossils on our communities. The fossil fuel industry is dedicated to investing in politicians who will let them continue to get away with it. We can’t take a break from demanding climate action because the climate crisis is getting worse every day. And with your support, I strongly believe the climate movement is in great hands, but there is still so much work to be done. We don’t say any of this to scare you – anyone who tries to scare you into giving them money should rethink that strategy. If nothing else, our goal is for you to feel hopeful – our team and the rest of the climate movement are working every day out of hope for a livable future, and we hope you consider yourself part of our team. Every dollar you invest in the Jane Fonda Climate PAC has an immediate impact on the decisions we make, and we cannot do it without you. = | | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Gratefully, Jane Fonda = | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Josh Shapiro
subject: As long as I’m Governor, abortion will be legal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Derek, let me be clear: **As long as I’m Governor, abortion will be legal in Pennsylvania.** Here in Pennsylvania, we value real freedom above all — including the freedom to choose. I’ve spent my career fighting to defend reproductive rights for every Pennsylvanian — and despite the far-right’s never-ending attacks, I’m not going to stop now. **But I need you on my side in this important fight.** If we’re going to keep abortion legal, it’s going to take this entire grassroots movement. body:

| Peter,

As the GOP goes after our voting rights, our public schools, reproductive access, and more, Valerie is working tirelessly to make sure those rights are protected.

But we need overwhelming support for her campaign as we approach the 2024 election year to ensure she remains in Congress fighting for you. Republicans know they’re in trouble, _**which is why they’re hellbent on rolling back access to the ballot.**_ North Carolina is a battleground state for their attempts to undermine our democratic process.

clean_body: Republicans know they’re in trouble, which is why they’re hellbent on rolling back access to the ballot. | = | Peter, As the GOP goes after our voting rights, our public schools, reproductive access, and more, Valerie is working tirelessly to make sure those rights are protected. But we need overwhelming support for her campaign as we approach the 2024 election year to ensure she remains in Congress fighting for you. = | = | = Republicans know they’re in trouble, which is why they’re hellbent on rolling back access to the ballot. North Carolina is a battleground state for their attempts to undermine our democratic process. With Democrats like Valerie leading on voting rights legislation, Republicans will be paying close attention to our district. It’s crucial we start building momentum to be able to fight back against Republican attacks. [Can Valerie count on your support with a $10 contribution? name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Sen. Manchin isn't running (this changes everything)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
Friend, I don’t know if you heard, but Sen. Joe Manchin just announced that he will not seek reelection in 2024.
Now that Republicans are all but guaranteed to flip West Virginia red, we absolutely need Florida to defend our Senate majority. Plain and simple.
Listen, there's absolutely no denying it — the path to defending the Senate runs right through Florida.
We've got to step up to the plate — so I’ve launched a $50,000 Emergency Goal, and I need your help to hit it. Will you split $20 or more between my campaign and Serve America to make sure that we can flip Florida and keep the Senate blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
This changes everything. Without a Democratic incumbent running, we have almost no chance of holding West Virginia. Donald Trump won the state by almost 40 points.
Florida is a different story. Experts are already calling this one of the most competitive races in the nation — and last time Rick Scott only won his seat by 0.12%!
The path to the Senate runs DIRECTLY through Florida. I know it, you know it, Rick Scott knows it, and Mitch McConnell knows it. That means Rick Scott won’t be alone with his millions in this — the GOP will be spending more than ever to keep this seat red and defeat my campaign.
This race is in a statistical tie right now. But if we're outspent over these next few weeks, Rick Scott will retake the lead — and we may never catch back up.
This race in Florida is Democrats' BEST chance to save our Senate majority — and I'm counting on your help to win. Will you split $20 before 11:59 p.m. to flip Florida blue and save our Senate majority? We HAVE to win this race, friend. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
Thank you. This makes this race harder, but I know with this team we will win.
— Debbie

blow up the pipeline, according to the Post.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73249847/437879645/1013293294?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20231112_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmE1ZGI1Ny05MDgxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X1Za4eft9ZJ7opkgX5ElKpAgfGqFMZ4Brycg7K0DLbo=) **Peter, I’ve got a huge announcement that should bring a smile to your face and hope to your heart:** former federal prosecutor, Will Rollins just announced his campaign for Congress in California’s 41st district -- one of the most important races in the country in the effort by Democrats to retake the House.

Will stunned political experts in 2022 when he came so close to winning against right wing Republican, Ken Calvert. It ended up being one of the closest races in the country. He outperformed every projection and was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote. That’s a big deal.

There is no question in my mind that in this upcoming election, with the Presidency on the ballot, the larger turnout will be the key to victory IF we have a strong campaign.

I have committed my energy, time and money to this race and today I am asking you to start Will off with a show of support that will send him a message that we are behind him 100 percent.

Here’s why Democrats across the country should pay close attention to this race:
1. **We need candidates like Will in Congress.** As a former federal prosecutor, he understands the ongoing danger that extremism poses to our democracy. He brought justice to insurrectionists, and I know he'll take the oath to defend democracy as seriously now as he did in the Justice Department.
2. **Retaking the House runs through CA-41.** After the new lines were drawn, CA-41 became a true swing seat. It’s the type of district Democrats MUST WIN to regain Congress.
3. **GOP super PACs.** Despite the tough midterm environment in 2022, Will was the third most “overperforming” Dem challenger in the country. He was also heavily outspent by the GOP’s dark money machine. If Democrats help Will keep pace, he can flip this seat!
4. **Will’s opponent Ken Calvert has got to go.** Calvert voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election. He backs the extreme ban on abortion -- including for instances of rape, and wants doctors who perform them to go to jail. CA-41 is home to one of the most LGBTQ-friendly cities in Palm Springs, yet Calvert staunchly opposes gay marriage.

The rematch is on, folks. Will came so close to winning in 2022, and this is our chance to finish the job. But it depends on widespread, grassroots support.

[**Please split a $3 contribution between Will Rollins’ campaign for Congress and Mark Takano today. I’m telling you, this will be one of the most critical races in the country, so don’t sit this one out! name: Matt Dolan
subject: Brutally Honest With You.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO
body:
| [](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=8ff4da6bc10b4666b05fddef5326fc80&_e=eLlcNkAHoC8l8lZtYdc6Te0tKQb4OevWA2z8AkN3hu79raRz7nJcTPri9ruajlDh010DY_6jx_ICFh2r3kXZsYltv_bEM6_vJnVIvKX1r5YrfUiwt-Tbwc0m64yX24hVDfuCoZN3X-mi9yQMCbB9kQHriT72aDCiT6lhPpdvVbQvA4hATCKYc7qCfIal-cg7wyr9xJckaEy9emRl7iKtORNkBIw6ermuQVXdajc69tHNkSIiZizZBsYmhahq2t_4E_qyoFwtGp4LnZmY6SMjy6_sZb83CPstzPGJ3_h9wjy2i5Hx0-_YD-tWXsBFRabq)

Friend,

Let me preface this email by saying THANK YOU for all the support you’ve given me over the past few months. Running for office isn’t easy, but when I see everyone ready for change in this country, I know I made the right decision by running for the United States Senate.

All the people who’ve helped on the campaign trail and the volunteers who have combed the state to support my campaign have genuinely humbled me. The best news is we’re just getting started.

Without my grassroots supporters, this campaign would be NOWHERE. [**I can’t do this without you; that’s why I hate to ask you again, but there’s just too much on the line in 2024. Can you help me again?**](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=8ff4da6bc10b4666b05fddef5326fc80&_e=eLlcNkAHoC8l8lZtYdc6Te0tKQb4OevWA2z8AkN3hu79raRz7nJcTPri9ruajlDh010DY_6jx_ICFh2r3kXZsYltv_bEM6_vJnVIvKX1r5YrfUiwt-Tbwc0m64yX24hVAVNrvei-_Gnfu367Ho3Oic5xlJhfz4GcavfLfdf8X1vhD5s8BEEd8rwV3Gi8GM4SUAr3QuQh4-EQwGOuZZz0BfDtheFWA_UJM_JUOf4W_bGO0gs2Q8Z9l5JKbX-FYqYZR2rS6gcdbWJhI8RnwZhaUB25WtUaDHoJVDvysJxdHkWDzQf9VV0mr4Mq3rgHLMf1)

My radical opponents have taken notice of my campaign; they’re calling in all the dark money they have available from their Hollywood donors, and they’ve already stockpiled MILLIONS of dollars to take me out. The leftist establishment knows I have the best chance at taking out Sherrod Brown, and they’re willing to do ANYTHING to take me out of this race. [**We absolutely must win this election.**](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=8ff4da6bc10b4666b05fddef5326fc80&_e=eLlcNkAHoC8l8lZtYdc6Te0tKQb4OevWA2z8AkN3hu79raRz7nJcTPri9ruajlDh010DY_6jx_ICFh2r3kXZsYltv_bEM6_vJnVIvKX1r5YrfUiwt-Tbwc0m64yX24hVAVNrvei-_Gnfu367Ho3Oic5xlJhfz4GcavfLfdf8X1vI3PMWXhqFhNQIk6lzyFU4PG1sR1W0ycuozJDY_bxonjzKdlHxJuYcSEAY9bvfDIWr-xoHIYtJ0mRUPeGHwmgvJTammqHZtxeTk9M9KiOcod_A7DSrXi7mfIoHsmCAHYJpL1NLtTuS2Y9VsUs12xap)
**I’M HUMBLY ASKING FOR YOUR HELP**
**The only way we will take back this country is by Taking Back the Senate. STEP ONE to achieving this dream is by meeting our fundraising goals. Can you contribute anything to my November fundraising deadline by donating below?**

name: Laurel Imer
subject: Join my campaign for Republican National Committeewoman of Colorado!
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Laurel Imer and is not approved by any candidate or candidates committee
body:
I am all in! Let's re-take the Republican National Committee, together.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s1PjXJvHq2P5EAdW3eEqUDXIGJLzOxxNBbEfzziBs4qcYGKbQ4o_ZyRwQhEsm0f1lzzjWjTGIb6iWg6IxkW9hIh91VZxWY1mn_Nh0J7INzknYHjyxGNwF2tGyuL__HKEOvoFPSblY_WrP2CSiKEgwyoj928ZNaT7&c=SHJryliE7EA5UFQEQU7TKWZ2PDdy8NyLtmVfa3JfUyIBg9TgZcLe4A==&ch=J_Nom4FGk4eMZj66ncg4hw2vIFPIEUWg5qcLaqttW4yopJ5I63KqrA==)
---
---
| Fellow Republican,
I wanted to reach out and introduce myself to you. My name is Laurel Imer and back in October, I announced my candidacy to be the next Republican National Committeewoman of Colorado.
It is far past time for the Republican National Committee to go in a different direction. The People of Colorado are tired of not having their voices heard by our leaders on the Republican National Committee.
I am tired of it just like them, it is time for the failed leaders on the National Committee to be fired and it is time for new, younger blood on the RNC.
Just two short weeks ago we suffered devastating losses across the country due to a lack of help and poor leadership from Chairwoman Ronna "Romney" McDaniel.
As a matter of fact, the incumbent Committeewoman of Colorado voted to re-elect this failed Chairwoman for a third term at the RNC Winter Meeting in 2023. A race where better and more conservative options were presented. People like Harmeet Dhillon of California, Mike Lindell, and others.
It is decisions like this one that led me to jump into the race to be your next Republican National Committeewoman from the great state of Colorado.
My priorities are simple, Elect a new Chair of the RNC, Preserve the America First Platform, Increase Grassroots Participation, Engage Younger Voters, and last but not least Secure Our Elections.
How do we do this? By you running to be a delegate to the Colorado Republican State Convention at your local caucus on March 7, 2023. Once elected you can cast a vote in the race for Committeewoman and we can re-take the RNC and lead the party in A Return To Patriotism!
So today, I am asking you to sign the pledge below, pledging that you will attend your precinct caucus on March 7th and support my race for Republican National Committeewoman of Colorado. You can sign the pledge by clicking the image or button below.

---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s1PjXJvHq2P5EAdW3eEqUDXIGJLzOxxNBbEfzziBs4qcYGKbQ4o_ZzlYvdALeAaNUJN1y-gobNZqMqWKNEdAOHzsDsAWvmP0GCJ1EDWzdJ_a119VMaSJge8V3vSCiVBSCAlmiyUd1p1zxR9AO87ev3LyjxpK8sXA78MCkAOdlto=&c=SHJryliE7EA5UFQEQU7TKWZ2PDdy8NyLtmVfa3JfUyIBg9TgZcLe4A==&ch=J_Nom4FGk4eMZj66ncg4hw2vIFPIEUWg5qcLaqttW4yopJ5I63KqrA==)
---
| [I pledge to Caucus on March 7th!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s1PjXJvHq2P5EAdW3eEqUDXIGJLzOxxNBbEfzziBs4qcYGKbQ4o_ZzlYvdALeAaNUJN1y-gobNZqMqWKNEdAOHzsDsAWvmP0GCJ1EDWzdJ_a119VMaSJge8V3vSCiVBSCAlmiyUd1p1zxR9AO87ev3LyjxpK8sXA78MCkAOdlto=&c=SHJryliE7EA5UFQEQU7TKWZ2PDdy8NyLtmVfa3JfUyIBg9TgZcLe4A==&ch=J_Nom4FGk4eMZj66ncg4hw2vIFPIEUWg5qcLaqttW4yopJ5I63KqrA==)
---
| If for some reason you are not able to attend your caucus or even if you are not from Colorado. You can support our campaign in other ways. Click the image or button below to see all the ways you can get involved in this race. With your help in this race, we can Save America!

---

clean_body: I am all in! Let's re-take the Republican National Committee, together. | | | | == | Fellow Republican, I wanted to reach out and introduce myself to you. My name is Laurel Imer and back in October, I announced my candidacy to be the next Republican National Committeewoman of Colorado. It is far past time for the Republican National Committee to go in a different direction. The People of Colorado are tired of not having their voices heard by our leaders on the Republican National Committee. I am tired of it just like them, it is time for the failed leaders on the National Committee to be fired and it is time for new, younger blood on the RNC. Just two short weeks ago we suffered devastating losses across the country due to a lack of help and poor leadership from Chairwoman Ronna "Romney" McDaniel. As a matter of fact, the incumbent Committeewoman of Colorado voted to re-elect this failed Chairwoman for a third term at the RNC Winter Meeting in 2023. A race where better and more conservative options were presented. People like Harmeet Dhillon of California, Mike Lindell, and others. It is decisions like this one that led me to jump into the race to be your next Republican National Committeewoman from the great state of Colorado. My priorities are simple, Elect a new Chair of the RNC, Preserve the America First Platform, Increase Grassroots Participation, Engage Younger Voters, and last but not least Secure Our Elections. How do we do this? By you running to be a delegate to the Colorado Republican State Convention at your local caucus on March 7, 2023. Once elected you can cast a vote in the race for Committeewoman and we can re-take the RNC and lead the party in A Return To Patriotism! So today, I am asking you to sign the pledge below, pledging that you will attend your precinct caucus on March 7th and support my race for Republican National Committeewoman of Colorado. You can sign the pledge by clicking the image or button below. | == | == | If for some reason you are not able to attend your caucus or even if you are not from Colorado. You can support our campaign in other ways. Click the image or button below to see all the ways you can get involved in this race. With your help in this race, we can Save America! | == | | == | Now last but most importantly, if you are financially able, please consider supporting our campaign so we can ensure that our message reaches all four corners of Colorado before the Caucus in 2024. Whether it is traveling to rural Colorado, sending mailers, emails like this one, text messages or even robocalls, it all takes financial support from people like you. If you feel inclined, you can donate by clicking below ⬇️ | == | | == | Over the years I have demonstrated my commitment to win across Colorado, and today I assure you nothing has changed. I will not be backing down, I will not be retreating from the battle at hand, I will not be silenced by the haters and naysayers, and I will always fight for each and every one of you. It is time that we Return to Patriotism as a Republican Party, end globalism, ensure actual election integrity, hold our Party Leadership accountable, and not keep doing the same thing cycle after cycle and expecting a different result. In closing, I would like to encourage you to check out our newly launched website, my platform, and the list of growing endorsements I have received by visiting == today. This campaign would not be possible without the support of you and the hundreds of Coloradoans that have asked me to step into this role. I will not let you down. I hope you will join us today! Sincerely, | == | Laurel Imer Candidate Republican National Committeewoman of Colorado == | | == | == == == | == | This email was Paid for By Laurel Imer and is not approved by any candidate or candidates committee. www.ImerForColorado.com This email was sent by Prodigy Consulting Group, LLC with authorization and approval by Laurel Imer | | | | | | | Prodigy Consulting Group, LLC | 16606 W 9th Ave, Golden, CO 80401 | (202) 849-7530 | prodigyconsultinggroupllc.org | | Sent by mailto:contact@imerforcolorado.com powered by

clean_body: | Peter, we've known Nancy Mace can't seem to stay out of the spotlight. But this takes it to a whole new level. 👇🏾 = You read that right: Nancy Mace gives each of her congressional staffers a handbook designed to get her on television come hell or high water. No, this isn't a joke. = = Nancy Mace has put the priorities of folks across the Lowcountry in the backseat in exchange for furthering her own career whenever possible. You don't have to take it from me, though. Her handbook begs staffers to book her three television appearances per day to spread her extremist agenda. The breaking article even states that she uses over one-third of her congressional office's budget of $500,000 on "marketing". That's funding that the government gives her to represent us! To call this news shameful would be doing a disservice to folks across this district. It's reprehensible and self-serving, and it's time we clean up this office. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Let's wipe our hands of Nancy Mace once and for all. name: Team Tester
subject: This is a turning point in our race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
This week, Senator Joe Manchin announced he would not seek reelection in West Virginia. I want to tell you what that means for our race here in Montana.
This officially makes us Mitch McConnell’s number one target. **You can bet that every dollar national Republicans would have spent in West Virginia is now coming to Montana.**
Mitch McConnell only needs to flip two seats to retake the Senate majority, and with a new open seat in West Virginia,**reelecting Jon Tester and Bob Casey is the only chance we have to stop him.**
Over $5 million is already being spent in Montana—that’s more than any other Senate race in the country right now. Polls are virtually tied. All eyes are on us.
**If we want to win this critically important race, Jon needs you to step up today with an urgent donation. I know we can win this race if we have the resources to combat the GOP’s lies and attacks.**
**[The stakes just got higher. We can’t afford to have you sit out. Please, rush a split donation now to help us reelect Jon Tester and Bob Casey, and win the most important races in the country.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231112-2?refcode=em20231112-2&refcode2=1117_552475_SMxkc3&akid=1117%2E552475%2ESMxkc3)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231112-2?refcode=em20231112-2&refcode2=1117_552475_SMxkc3&akid=1117%2E552475%2ESMxkc3)**
This is important. Thank you.
—Shelbi Dantic
Campaign Manager
Jon Tester’s U.S. Senate Campaign

name: Mayor Sepi Shyne
subject: Housing is a human right
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73251295/437884785/-1233768706?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=231111_ss_housing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzczYTc1YjMtOTk4MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0IVH8MjU9EZyGYNKTKNP96ACat9rrXXggYqfXs9f-gA=)
---
Friend, We need to talk about a pandemic of homelessness that's afflicting our nation coast to coast. The rising cost of everything has become untenable for working people, especially when it comes to housing. That means more and more workers, families, and children are losing the roof over their heads and facing a brutal, uncertain, and unsafe life on the streets. We need leaders who will take immediate action to address this crisis. Here in California, we are facing an unprecedented housing crisis. That's why one of my first actions on City Council was to **increase rental assistance** to help keep people in their homes while at the same time increasing oversight of our social service providers to make sure they provided services for and housed our unhoused community. The result? Our city saw a **60% drop in homelessness.** [**Friend, housing is a human right. We need leaders who are ready to take swift action to keep folks housed. I'm ready to advocate for the people being left behind by corrupt and archaic systems, and short-term greed in Congress. Will you chip in any amount to power our movement for systemic change clean_body: | | = Friend, We need to talk about a pandemic of homelessness that's afflicting our nation coast to coast. The rising cost of everything has become untenable for working people, especially when it comes to housing. That means more and more workers, families, and children are losing the roof over their heads and facing a brutal, uncertain, and unsafe life on the streets. We need leaders who will take immediate action to address this crisis. Here in California, we are facing an unprecedented housing crisis. That's why one of my first actions on City Council was to increase rental assistance to help keep people in their homes while at the same time increasing oversight of our social service providers to make sure they provided services for and housed our unhoused community. The result? Our city saw a 60% drop in homelessness. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = We can't rely on short-term fixes or piecemeal solutions that don't address the root of the problem. We need to address the long-term issue of lack of affordable housing by building more affordable units that our communities desperately need, while also increasing crucial resources to help get our unhoused neighbors off the streets. I know what it's like to feel unsafe in your environment. I escaped the Iranian revolution when I was just a child. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Bayer-Monsanto is selling LIES
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2114515?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Friend, we know that when you go to the store, you expect **honest, safe products.** You expect companies to disclose important information that may harm you, those you love, and the planet. Unfortunately, Big Pesticide corporations are selling _**DECEIT**_ and _**LIES**_ to their innocent customers. **We’re talking about Bayer-Monsanto and their toxic weedkiller, Roundup.** This infamous weedkiller is being used around the globe on lawns, backyards, playgrounds, and farm fields, and consumers are unaware of the **DANGER.** There’s an active ingredient in Roundup called _**glyphosate.**_ This harmful chemical is dangerous to both people and pollinators, including our beautiful monarch butterflies. Glyphosate has been linked to serious health concerns, including **cancer, hormone disruption, and kidney toxicity.** Bayer-Monsanto did more than lie, Friend. They _**MANIPULATED science**_ and obstructed regulations that are meant to keep you, me, and our planet safe. **But you and I will not stand for corporate greed and deception.[That’s why we need your help in demanding that Bayer-Monsanto stop selling toxic pesticides that harm our planet. Sign now!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2114516?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2114517?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_**The science is clear:**_ Roundup is bad for human health and for the environment, Friend — _and it’s also actively threatening the survival of monarch butterflies._ Glyphosate is wiping out an essential plant called milkweed — _**something that monarchs cannot live without.**_
Milkweed is the _**ONLY source of food**_ for baby monarch caterpillars, and it’s also where monarchs lay eggs. **So without this essential plant, there would be no more baby monarchs!**
But glyphosate is _**DECIMATING**_ milkweed crops at devastating rates, and as a result, monarch butterfly populations are dying out. _850 MILLION_ milkweed plants in the U.S. have been _**WIPED OUT**_ over the last 20 years alone. And the _**North American monarch butterfly population has dropped 90%.**_
**_While Roundup threatens people, pollinators, and the planet, the pesticide industry continues to rake in major profits._ [Will you take action today to hold Bayer-Monsanto accountable? Tell Bayer-Monsanto to STOP selling toxic Roundup immediately! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2114518?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2114519?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for standing up against harmful pesticides,
Friends of the Earth**

Fellow American -

While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, _the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before._

When America was struggling greatly in the late 1970s, Ronald Reagan stood strong before the people and [**called upon us to return to our nation’s founding principles and paint again with bold colors instead of pale pastels.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1fde4fa1af8a410a81a43badb884151d&_e=KNM36LCZuFER_XrsdNUS_2b7Y5JkasrAlg3cBx1OdYQJUyw4nx-TLjmNUPnh0-VeRb0RIdur6vxH4OuAWbiw3YincIfRR982Jpxqed0EAay6qTYnCWcbbtpW1YKeBodAuBI9eZs6X0oMO2KPXU708vSCJLun3WFY7IYA1tafTrQX3kJVLLfAee6LsYZq1Cbtp4XrU37NW6hgWDBIInFpohKTRpIYZ6b5xaVoMHnHHB20pL639mS-2P8xbOpSbsQC56gA46yJQ6YQS66bwPbQLAyy1x1UiuDdycwJ6TnajEEHVtsoE3Sl7eih3ZvWtuSe8mdffTtJHekqHr4ltGA1A832Fd53ivQ5Bu2RufrffvsqidihTLSbiBZdzkg2oOKIL606VacxdLbXxQEMHdvc0g%3D%3D)

[** RESTORE AMERICA > **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1fde4fa1af8a410a81a43badb884151d&_e=KNM36LCZuFER_XrsdNUS_2b7Y5JkasrAlg3cBx1OdYQJUyw4nx-TLjmNUPnh0-VeRb0RIdur6vxH4OuAWbiw3YincIfRR982Jpxqed0EAay6qTYnCWcbbtpW1YKeBodAuBI9eZs6X0oMO2KPXU708vSCJLun3WFY7IYA1tafTrQX3kJVLLfAee6LsYZq1Cbtp4XrU37NW6hgWDBIInFpohKTRpIYZ6b5xaVoMHnHHB20pL639mS-2P8xbOpSbsQCnEXpdC2J1JVn7lf4_DnPhmn7Gwp1ciw1LLtIrp-U1W0JzioUm2r4vBMVCLQ62px3BwDQK4nOzRQRq0KZ--cEfOI14bebfp_djsXEECswPdlyoe9izVRVWo3XOG2hhK8eINqGyojpapLuWdHJKagHxw%3D%3D)
_Republicans desperately needed that clarity and conviction,_ and Reagan understood that a well-articulated vision and public policy grounded in our timeless conservative principles were the keys to restoring our country and preserving freedom.

[**The principles that made America, and brought us back during the Reagan Revolution, must guide us still today:**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1fde4fa1af8a410a81a43badb884151d&_e=KNM36LCZuFER_XrsdNUS_2b7Y5JkasrAlg3cBx1OdYQJUyw4nx-TLjmNUPnh0-VeRb0RIdur6vxH4OuAWbiw3YincIfRR982Jpxqed0EAay6qTYnCWcbbtpW1YKeBodAuBI9eZs6X0oMO2KPXU708vSCJLun3WFY7IYA1tafTrQX3kJVLLfAee6LsYZq1Cbtp4XrU37NW6hgWDBIInFpohKTRpIYZ6b5xaVoMHnHHB20pL639mS-2P8xbOpSbsQC4FuiPXmHwgpAfW2bspN2vgPn1hRVvvCYoGCv4qbDP7pdelgKQfngK4S37wGNuzPrmzKvZQ8Azg3Oy6QgyC12SqWJkj1zhp5ny373pMgQqZoXvPbDEyqexkkawJ7YNaH-9RSPN-Cob40MKslvV3w9pA%3D%3D)

* Individual freedom
* Limited government
* The rule of law
* Peace through strength
* Fiscal responsibility
* Free markets
* Human dignity
* The sanctity of human life

**I believe it is our duty as Americans to stand for conservative values without compromise.** I am fighting every day for the same vision that Ronald Reagan once had. As Speaker of the House, it is my job to unite our party on what it will take to win and save America. [**Are you with me?**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1fde4fa1af8a410a81a43badb884151d&_e=KNM36LCZuFER_XrsdNUS_2b7Y5JkasrAlg3cBx1OdYQJUyw4nx-TLjmNUPnh0-VeRb0RIdur6vxH4OuAWbiw3YincIfRR982Jpxqed0EAay6qTYnCWcbbtpW1YKeBodAuBI9eZs6X0oMO2KPXU708vSCJLun3WFY7IYA1tafTrQX3kJVLLfAee6LsYZq1Cbtp4XrU37NW6hgWDBIInFpohKTRpIYZ6b5xaVoMHnHHB20pL639mS-2P8xbOpSbsQCutYwWKs58z3UILMiFvnYe3H83x6azneaRPeTik34yzBmsZ5QJtHG9RcpkrrQSAmzlBU90Cx8-OX41wEZd493yApG3LfH-zjd9q2-4M82eg0AjrixGYC2aSnlbExV5YZq1us0BN7DQzd2aoJRBKlrLg%3D%3D)

We have a chance to save America from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must act before it’s too late.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1fde4fa1af8a410a81a43badb884151d&_e=KNM36LCZuFER_XrsdNUS_2b7Y5JkasrAlg3cBx1OdYQJUyw4nx-TLjmNUPnh0-VeRb0RIdur6vxH4OuAWbiw3YincIfRR982Jpxqed0EAay6qTYnCWcbbtpW1YKeBodAuBI9eZs6X0oMO2KPXU708vSCJLun3WFY7IYA1tafTrQX3kJVLLfAee6LsYZq1Cbtp4XrU37NW6hgWDBIInFpohKTRpIYZ6b5xaVoMHnHHB20pL639mS-2P8xbOpSbsQCKtt3mHFlvX9_vmGPvU37MWF99mp0weVBk5sR0fPg_LUcZdNVVCjZb4kN-U3zvi24haMzmNlr4Rihnp4n0pGSHZY8NaBtRdETkMsD9d0Kt7kW_SzLH07mL_P6LJlJjMCs3j36gq139OXfGKKNAO0yAw%3D%3D)

body:
We MUST take back the House majority.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73251902/437886894/-1301578774?refcode=BLU-SAN-20231112-z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzQ2MzI3MC05ZTgxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SMkYPQyRorQodg0rOjFhbAKoutaNyideleZmRC_zKUY=)

| Peter,

Republicans have proven themselves to be unfit to govern.

After spending 22 days without a speaker and delaying critical spending bills, Republicans are STILL playing political games.

Now more than ever, Congress needs to act to invest in education, Social Security, and Medicare, but Republicans are leading us closer and closer to a government shutdown. Everyday Americans can’t afford Republican incompetence.

**We _MUST_ take back the House majority.**

I grew up in an immigrant, working-class family and have dedicated my career to ensuring families like mine get their fair share and are represented in Congress. **That’s why I’m working to stand up to Republican dysfunction and am working to elect progressive Latinos up and down the ballot next year.[_Keeping up a steady momentum is critical to making that happen. clean_body: We MUST take back the House majority. | = | Peter, Republicans have proven themselves to be unfit to govern. After spending 22 days without a speaker and delaying critical spending bills, Republicans are STILL playing political games. Now more than ever, Congress needs to act to invest in education, Social Security, and Medicare, but Republicans are leading us closer and closer to a government shutdown. Everyday Americans can’t afford Republican incompetence. We MUST take back the House majority. I grew up in an immigrant, working-class family and have dedicated my career to ensuring families like mine get their fair share and are represented in Congress. Fellow Conservative,

**I 'm emailing you about Dave McCormick, a fellow patriot and leader who's running for the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania.** This race could decide the majority -- which means it could decide our country's future.

Dave is a fellow combat veteran, successful businessman, and someone committed to serving his country.

I know the importance of strong leadership that never retreats and always advances. And I know Dave McCormick has what it takes to help make our country strong again -- starting by standing up to Communist China.

**Joe Biden and the rest of the left are pathetically weak.** They've refused to get tough on China over anything -- from unleashing the virus to spying on Americans to gobbling up our farmland.

**If we 're going to stop this madness, then Republicans must flip the U.S. Senate. And to flip the Senate, we must come together to support Dave McCormick in this race.**

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73252320/437888536/-1812672068?sourceid=1052330&refcode=20231112_ELonFOXRS&refcode2=WTEFEK27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTgyNmFmZi05ZTgxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7rtdeg1voTb7w-zLuocvUBOsaWnueArhop1AHgy4SpA=) | [TAKE BACK THE GAVEL](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73252321/437888537/-1812672068?sourceid=1052330&refcode=20231112_ELonFOXRS&refcode2=WTEFEK27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTgyNmFmZi05ZTgxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7rtdeg1voTb7w-zLuocvUBOsaWnueArhop1AHgy4SpA=)
---
Mike Johnson responded exactly how you'd expect. Instead of confirming or disputing our claims, he feigned ignorance: _"I'm not sure what they're talking about, I really don't remember any of those measures."_

This guy knows how extreme and unpopular his views are. But his halfhearted half-denials don't really matter — what matters is that **this pro-choice community isn't letting him sweep his anti-choice extremism under the rug**. We're here to call him out, and to call him out so loudly that even _FOX News_ can't ignore it.

[**We placed Mike Johnson "On Notice"**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73252322/437888538/-1812672068?sourceid=1052330&refcode=20231112_ELonFOXRS&refcode2=WTEFEK27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTgyNmFmZi05ZTgxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7rtdeg1voTb7w-zLuocvUBOsaWnueArhop1AHgy4SpA=) because we're committed to regaining the House majority and taking his gavel next November. That means we're investing in close House races across the country _and_ working hard to make sure American voters know what MAGA Mike and his GOP cronies _really_ believe.

And _FOX_ , if you're listening: we've got _plenty_ more to say about Mike Johnson.

| Friends,
To my incredible team, thank you! Over the last year, thousands of fellow Republicans poured our hearts and souls into elections all across Virginia. For those feeling burned out, dismayed by some of the results, or even discouraged; don't quit rather pray and get some rest. When ready, Virginia will need you to reengage and re-join the fight.

| Ramona Christian, Buckingham GOP Chair
---
|
---
| Thank you Ramona Christian for your leadership. It took awhile, but she was persistent, respectful, and successful at ensuring Buckingham County has election officer parity per the law for the first time since the law took effect in 2011. This effort in Buckingham for parity is backed up by an Attorney General Jason Miyares Opinion. Ramona and her team also flipped her school board to Republican. Thank you again for your positive and persistent leadership!

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Love Your Neighbor | Friends, To my incredible team, thank you! Over the last year, thousands of fellow Republicans poured our hearts and souls into elections all across Virginia. For those feeling burned out, dismayed by some of the results, or even discouraged; don't quit rather pray and get some rest. When ready, Virginia will need you to reengage and re-join the fight. == | Song of the Day, Carrie Underwood - How Great Thou Art | == | For a little inspiration, click this video link and watch the Song of the Day, == | Ramona Christian, Buckingham GOP Chair | | Thank you Ramona Christian for your leadership. It took awhile, but she was persistent, respectful, and successful at ensuring Buckingham County has election officer parity per the law for the first time since the law took effect in 2011. This effort in Buckingham for parity is backed up by an Attorney General Jason Miyares Opinion. Ramona and her team also flipped her school board to Republican. Thank you again for your positive and persistent leadership! | | | Fall Performance Bull Sale | | | | | | | Tracy and I had a wonderful getting to know farmers around the district at the Fall Performance Bull Sale. Thank you farmers for all you do to keep us fed. | Manufactured Home Tour Buckingham County | | | | | I really appreciate Jesse Rutherford teaching Delegate Elect Tom Garret and myself about Manufactured Housing. Manufactured Housing is part of the essential solution to the affordable housing crises we have today. Unlike mobile homes of yesterday, these homes are energy efficient, and structurally sound to last a generation. To learn more contact: Jesse Rutherford Owner Sleepy Meadows, LLC 434-981-8728 Direct Jesse@ProTechBuilder.com | Louisa High School Football | | | | | | | | | | Fluvanna County | | Congratulations Timothy M. Hello,

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cbc9c51b757e4017b183bf6b98dbb27e&_e=6YuJU2MrOMrivmokXeOXLUq3_Ms5MBkYnICZdDZ1u-1vWG0GsMSTZ3pw4MH2greBhNpzbtEKbMq4zqSv4CvNAxG14PvvELOvjeM1XppPemcyQcHTtM0OhGF0Ngdpv4eGUCtVH_L6tccTQglTz4_TNZmjSigNuwcP5izEUPAdny_TzMO1raeXGk9rV1vuqoE5TcRwm6hlO3fQf5OVOuQX0C8MWuPmV_ezIh3BMCjrZqCeYGq_tJxwCQwPNPiCx4eckTDbStRDq2CLDmatMB--44BEWTlJ1oyRa1AtaDjr6VDDHrReh4jdZ9GfKlO4eTSNN8enyG2dmY8Lu30Qi6aq5Bsp23PRizII4Glza4OO4qN1UmKMS4zJ7OtnKyZJEX6InbQP-O2t6Fk5xNc3ZZXYNsRdA9S8f9dy14OWSif9fEanMjnmrlokJxyunhTKxXLf2fVw4N0ObmaY9wLRPmIxKgPl8DD5uTa9g2xqzD4Y8cnpn3GlL1I6sju-3LENABzXSqz13mZhG80frNmhGpfpI5aGITqtnBaMPCQPiD8uDzwbXNz_albwdJF78pjE2M8D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

body:
here’s how we can do it:
| Team, After many, many, months of advocating for Issue 1, we have finally protected reproductive rights for all Ohioans. If you find yourself asking “where do we go from here?” Don’t worry, we’ve got you covered. There are some pretty big battles ahead for Ohio, and we’ll be here to keep you updated about each and every one. In order to keep this momentum from our Issue 1 win going, we have to take back the House and hold on to our Senate majority next year. Anti-choice extremists are running for Congress and if they take control in Washington and successfully ban abortion, who says they’ll stop there? Meanwhile, our Democratic Senate has been instrumental in advancing policies that benefit Ohioans and all Americans. From expanding access to affordable healthcare, fighting for economic justice, addressing climate change, and improving our nation’s infrastructure, we've made significant progress over the last few years. But Ohio Republicans will destroy all the progress we’ve made. **[Donate today to help us reach our mid-month fundraising goal so we can keep up this momentum, flip the House, and protect our Democratic Senate majority in 2024>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73252798/437890309/-605597782?refcode=odp_em_231112_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzEwZGJkMS1hNjgxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MANWu8YjPiOnsOxpGIv2sPiMl7UOhSQDKu8X1i0C7rk=)** Thank you, Team Ohio Dems | | ********[********](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73252799/437890310/-605597782?refcode=odp_em_231112_1&amount=5;email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzEwZGJkMS1hNjgxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MANWu8YjPiOnsOxpGIv2sPiMl7UOhSQDKu8X1i0C7rk=)****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73252801/437890311/-605597782?refcode=odp_em_231112_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzEwZGJkMS1hNjgxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MANWu8YjPiOnsOxpGIv2sPiMl7UOhSQDKu8X1i0C7rk=) ************

| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc2OmzAUhZ_G7ED2tY1hwWKmFpuoU6mbVt1Exj_JTbGhYIrSp6-Iktl-5-jqfLomziOGe0fUOwG4olsJAOFvBOAk3n9-1KcfJ13SP6IpdS3FfqTwhQDk--w_q88rlY8Gx4MqXbgObAPWFr5jdds2oDiH4tpZSa0fFBWtoEFyoQZgth1MIygXgwwFdkCBM8YAgElglbOehSZQKVU7cBqIoDumyk3JjO6Wly3OlZ1iMXbXnOf1Makn0K_ebouvdkyLd0fjYOavL030C1pT3iZMuQxbcovBFdOltFOMmLP3BPpkRyFaSsEH7puagjSE91uO5-gdbpFw_fStD7hO22I94dri2TyZNXE2eEmE65fTK5lS9ikTrhmVShGoz2lER7j-_m8J5u2rTh8P-HgJ1_cZ9v4X_fa7WDo37ziOuNaKCHo5Jhxy_wMAAP__1aCM9w)

Friend,
It’s always laughable to see the disloyal RINOs who were on the debate stage this week talk about their signing of a “loyalty” pledge.
Let me be as clear as day: _**their pledges are MEANINGLESS!**_
_Because every minute our special interest “Republican” opponents waste attacking yours truly instead of the Crook currently occupying the White House, is another minute they are being**DISLOYAL to YOU** – the more than 74 MILLION voters who make up our incredible movement!_
The longer they refuse to accept the reality that we are the UNDISPUTED FRONTRUNNER (leading by 50 and even 60 points!) and the ONLY candidate crushing Crooked Joe by double digits, the more they _HELP_ salvage Biden’s failing campaign.
But they don’t care about loyalty to you, Friend, or saving our country from Marxist tyranny for that matter...
The only thing they care about is furthering their own political ambitions.
Which is exactly why on the very same day that I was forced to testify in the SHAM TRIAL in New York, one of our RINO opponents chose to use that dark and disgraceful moment to _attack_ me online.
This is the same person who said that it would be a “fatal” mistake for the Republican Party to let me be the presidential nominee if Biden were to unjustly convict me.
The only fatal mistake is these disloyal RINOs playing right into Crooked Joe’s hands!
**And that’s why I’m making a _REAL_ loyalty pledge – a pledge to the _PEOPLE:_**
| [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX_NcAOZGTDkwKG7LqoUqe2latVL5NpDMltsKJii_PuKKNvr955G79PYMI8y3DtoXgDxJn4FRKAPgHiuXn581ufvZ5OrP1WbG11X-5HiKyCm-8z_q88rBQcr40Ebk_kOXYvOZdyV-nRqsSHC7NYxs2utZiSthgpRsWWruG7Qc0ukMulQIZVliYhljWXhHZdDO6i6bk6_SA1QqV1i4adoR_-Wli3MhZtCNna3lOb1MakH7Fd228LFLnFhfzQOZv9ybgMv4mz-NklM-bBFv1hZJV5zN4UgKTED9tGNVXVSCnkgbrXC2gL1WwqXwF62AGSevvqA67QtjoGMk4t9MmfDbOUagcy703syxcQxAZlS1U0DqC9xFA9k1q84vH609OnbAz5eQuY-497_VF9-Z0vn513GUVbdQKWux4RD7l8AAAD__3jhjQY)
---
_Friend, I pledge to OFFICIALLY WRAP UP this primary as fast as humanly possible, so that we can shift all our time, energy, and resources to the one and only REAL mission of FIRING Crooked Joe Biden and MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!_
And in turn, with just two months to go until the FIRST contest of the primary, I ask that you consider contributing even just $1 to our Primary Victory Fund to help lock up the nomination ASAP.
_But of course, if you’re struggling right now because of Crooked Joe and his RINO enablers, then please don’t even think about donating. Very soon, we will win back the White House and America will come ROARING BACK! Don’t you worry._

clean_body: I’d like to see the disloyal RINOs say this... | | | Friend, It’s always laughable to see the disloyal RINOs who were on the debate stage this week talk about their signing of a “loyalty” pledge. Let me be as clear as day: their pledges are MEANINGLESS! Because every minute our special interest “Republican” opponents waste attacking yours truly instead of the Crook currently occupying the White House, is another minute they are beingDISLOYAL to YOU – the more than 74 MILLION voters who make up our incredible movement! The longer they refuse to accept the reality that we are the UNDISPUTED FRONTRUNNER (leading by 50 and even 60 points!) and the ONLY candidate crushing Crooked Joe by double digits, the more they HELP salvage Biden’s failing campaign. But they don’t care about loyalty to you, Friend, or saving our country from Marxist tyranny for that matter... The only thing they care about is furthering their own political ambitions. Which is exactly why on the very same day that I was forced to testify in the SHAM TRIAL in New York, one of our RINO opponents chose to use that dark and disgraceful moment to attack me online. This is the same person who said that it would be a “fatal” mistake for the Republican Party to let me be the presidential nominee if Biden were to unjustly convict me. The only fatal mistake is these disloyal RINOs playing right into Crooked Joe’s hands! And that’s why I’m making a REAL loyalty pledge – a pledge to the PEOPLE: | Friend, I pledge to OFFICIALLY WRAP UP this primary as fast as humanly possible, so that we can shift all our time, energy, and resources to the one and only REAL mission of FIRING Crooked Joe Biden and MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! And in turn, with just two months to go until the FIRST contest of the primary, I ask that you consider contributing even just $1 to our Primary Victory Fund to help lock up the nomination ASAP. But of course, if you’re struggling right now because of Crooked Joe and his RINO enablers, then please don’t even think about donating. Very soon, we will win back the White House and America will come ROARING BACK! Don’t you worry. | | Thank you, | Donald J. body:
Mike Johnson is “dangerous”
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20400%2E4449941%2EFJdZLQ)
---
**WE TOLD YOU** Liz Cheney has spent years speaking truth to power – calling out Trump’s corruption and losing her seat in Congress because of it.

**AND WE TOLD YOU** that she just spoke up against MAGA Speaker Mike Johnson, calling him “dangerous” and calling out his attempt to overturn the 2020 election. [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-cheney?source=FFR_20231112_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=20400%2E4449941%2EFJdZLQ) _**NOW, WE’RE TELLING YOU**_ Democrats aren’t stepping up to stand with her in her fight to call out “dangerous” MAGA Mike Johnson!

We’re still 373 local Democrat signatures short of our emergency petition goal – _we thought Democrats wanted to make sure election deniers lose their power!_

**[This is your final chance: Add your name to our emergency petition standing with Liz Cheney today »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-cheney?source=FFR_20231112_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=20400%2E4449941%2EFJdZLQ)** | [373 LOCAL SIGNATURES STILL MISSING: SIGN OUR PETITION TO STAND WITH LIZ CHENEY BEFORE MIDNIGHT »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-cheney?source=FFR_20231112_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=20400%2E4449941%2EFJdZLQ)

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: This is a people-powered campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas
body:
You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=dy%2FedODFseMmfUktdq7GM3aiuJwUiNSEBBpcXHSoOw3zokUj8HrmpzaCtTVjJh012iQAL8%2BaZeP1FuHWJ26el2HxV2Mf%2BKtcGMb9mex5Ru6LIpGf51q%2Br2cA27WMtcZPgdTIsfyOT22vY8xcvvDfNtgftruidgtLY0WdOGhNIJOwSDUmBmD1zzjRz0P9MjaMEy040nQmbB%2FEPBMIac66ZAivB8HG7yRv3k70%2BYW2wezUdlvm1j13F5G2ZneIApB43otjTncFID7Pm29WM%2Fz%2B2s%2FgvERBh9j6hV5%2BbXgoy%2FOz0zgG1KEnlpTuTgPaZ7A9%2Fz7K%2BqvXpW42Ullo6ockOsauVtEPprLHfUHHcOSg6%2BW23u0JPsebciQ5I30UcZxKYuWk3QAVeAnCLTp3zjIr96cCWuPoFngVi7oYxdco%2FU1nuJHldICNpugoDdMK2%2BKP .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp]
Peter,
Grassroots supporters like you are the lifeblood of this campaign. Your input guides our strategy, your support builds our momentum, and your donations make everything that we do possible.
I’m proud to run a truly people-powered campaign. But that’s not the kind of campaign we’re up against.
I’m running against one of the richest Senators in Washington — a guy who spent $64 MILLION of his own fortune to buy this Senate seat last time around. That’s not even counting all the millions that he raised from far-right megadonors.
You shouldn’t be able to buy your way to Washington. But that’s exactly what Rick Scott did — and he’s trying to pull the same stunt in 2024. Last year, he gave his campaign $4 MILLION to boost his end-of-quarter fundraising.
At the end of the day, this isn’t really about fundraising numbers or big checks. It’s about Rick Scott absolutely failing the Floridians he swore to protect: He wrote the plan to end Medicare and Social Security, pushed Trump’s election conspiracy theories, and advocated for a nationwide ban on abortions.
I’m running for Senate to give Floridians the leadership they deserve — and putting up big fundraising numbers is how we’re going to do it. That’s why I’ve set a big $350,000 goal to make sure we have the resources we need to win this race. Please, will you split $15 between my campaign and Roland Gutierrez to invest in this grassroots movement and flip Florida blue? I’m counting on your help to compete with Scott’s massive fortune. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp]
Thank you so much,
Debbie
Democrat Roland Gutierrez is running for US Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. Texans deserve leaders who will look out for their best interests. We need you in this campaign. Can you donate $5 right now to help Roland win this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=5]

body:
What if we told you that we are facing millions of dollars worth of attack ads from Republican candidates for president and outside spending organizations and we need your help to fight back? | | |
---
Peter, We're writing to ask if there is ANYTHING we can say to convince you to make your first online contribution to President Biden's reelection campaign today? Let us try: What if we told you that we are facing millions of dollars worth of attack ads from Republican candidates for president and outside spending organizations and we need your help to fight back?
