name: =?utf-8?q?a_personal_note_=F0=9F=92=8C__=28via_VPP=29?=
subject: To: President Joe Biden >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
show your thanks!
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56954?t=6&akid=11724%2E878179%2EgBB8_I) We can’t believe how much Biden has done for our country, so we’re sending him a HUGE card to thank him for his hard work!

[**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56954?t=7&akid=11724%2E878179%2EgBB8_I) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56954?t=8&akid=11724%2E878179%2EgBB8_I)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I’m so grateful.

**Dear President Biden,

I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!

**Despite MAGA turmoil, over the last two and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs for the people.**

I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, but it is always the right thing to do.

So as the 2024 race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country!

[**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56954?t=9&akid=11724%2E878179%2EgBB8_I)** | [SPACE RUNNING OUT: Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56954?t=10&akid=11724%2E878179%2EgBB8_I)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11724%2E878179%2EgBB8_I). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11724%2E878179%2EgBB8_I).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11724%2E878179%2EgBB8_I) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=11724%2E878179%2EgBB8_I). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=11724%2E878179%2EgBB8_I)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=11724%2E878179%2EgBB8_I)

name: Our Revolution
subject: billionaires are a policy failure (and 2 other great stickers!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Cost of food and housing continue to skyrocket, and wealth inequality continues to explode thanks to billionaires and corporations rigging our political system.

We need more voices speaking up and fighting back - on the streets and in the halls of power. That’s why we’re organizing the progressive movement and electing progressive leaders coast to coast who will actually get to work for the American people instead of serving Big Pharma, Wall Street, defense contractors, and other special interests.

You can make a statement and help support this critical work by pitching in $10 here to get our new wealth inequality sticker pack. You'll receive three stickers for the price of one, so act now before supplies run out! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12479?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231112_fr_stickerpackrs_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_stickerpack&t=1011&akid=4893%2E5885482%2EBpledS)

GET YOUR STICKER (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12479?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231112_fr_stickerpackrs_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_stickerpack&t=1013&akid=4893%2E5885482%2EBpledS)

As the working class struggles under the weight of rising costs and corporate greed - it's past time to rein in the wealth & power of billionaires subverting our democracy.

The rising cost of goods is the number one concern of the American people heading into the 2024 election, and failing to address it will almost certainly lead to the end of American democracy as we know it.

Public school teachers and baristas now pay a higher tax rate than billionaire oligarchs, and our society will collapse if we don't change course.

Donate $10 here, and we'll send you our special wealth inequality sticker pack. Take advantage of this special 3 for 1 deal! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12479?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231112_fr_stickerpackrs_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_stickerpack&t=1014&akid=4893%2E5885482%2EBpledS)

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

name: GallegoForArizona.com
subject: Humbly asking you to chip in $3 this evening.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We didn’t fundraise yesterday for Veterans Day. So today, we need to ramp back up.
#

Peter, it's Ruben.
In just a minute I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign. We didn’t fundraise yesterday for Veterans Day. So today, we need to ramp back up.
But please, hang on a minute. Let’s put all that aside.
Before I ask for that donation, I want to talk to you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place.
To be honest with you, it gets back to why I joined the Marines. This country has been good to me, and to my family. My mom raised me and my sisters on her own. And today, all her kids have college degrees. My mom even went back to college and got her own degree.
If that’s not the American Dream, I don’t know what is.
So I joined the Marines to give back to the country that did so much for my family. And I decided to run for Senate because kids that grow up poor like I did, the people who serve in our military — they’re not getting what they need from our leaders. From people like Kyrsten Sinema.
I decided to run to take back Arizona’s seat and deliver for the people of our state. Plain and simple.
But when I joined the Marines, I also swore an oath to protect and defend our Constitution. I took that oath seriously. Marines are the first to the fight, and believe me: On January 6th, I was ready to fight.
I see Kari Lake as a real threat to our Constitution.
So now, this race isn’t just about serving our country. It’s not just about delivering for the people of Arizona. It’s about defending our democracy itself.
And to win in Arizona, to beat Kari Lake and take back this seat from Kyrsten Sinema, I need your help.
I need you to make that donation I mentioned at the beginning of this email. Can you do it?
[**Please, chip in $3 today. It’d be your next/first donation, and it’s critical to our success. Especially now, with Kari Lake officially in the race.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231112-2-f&t=1&akid=1424%2E734936%2EpkwqGt)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-nov23.aZOhHW&refcode=em231112-2-f&t=20&akid=1424%2E734936%2EpkwqGt)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-nov23.Qbnb2l&refcode=em231112-2-f&t=21&akid=1424%2E734936%2EpkwqGt)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-nov23.vL6Lqu&refcode=em231112-2-f&t=22&akid=1424%2E734936%2EpkwqGt)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-nov23.Vx4UJF&refcode=em231112-2-f&t=23&akid=1424%2E734936%2EpkwqGt)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-nov23.qoudqp&refcode=em231112-2-f&t=24&akid=1424%2E734936%2EpkwqGt)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-nov23.eTtrZ1&refcode=em231112-2-f&t=25&akid=1424%2E734936%2EpkwqGt)**
---
****
From the bottom of my heart, thank you. I can’t do any of this without your support. And having you with me means a lot.
Semper Fi,
Ruben

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: Never lost focus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
Unlike the House Republicans who have spent the last few months knee-deep in political games, partisan infighting, and utter legislative inaction, I’ve never lost sight of the reason I came to Congress in the first place. Home.

Unlike the House Republicans who have spent the last few months knee-deep in political games, partisan infighting, and utter legislative inaction, **I’ve never lost sight of the reason I came to Congress in the first place.**
**Home.**

That’s why I’m here. To pass legislation that will actually make life better for families, back at home, in Oregon.

That means fighting to lower costs, make healthcare more affordable, protect our planet, defend our reproductive freedoms, and ensure the best possible future for generations of Oregonians to come.

No matter what, I promise I’ll never lose focus on fighting for the issues that matter most. You have my word on that.

**But that’s exactly why Republicans want me out of office.** They know I’ll never bend to their political games and extremist interests that don’t benefit Oregon.

[**So that’s why I need your help. National Republicans are fighting harder than ever to defeat me, so I need to know if I can count on you to have my back here. Will you make a donation to my campaign to help ensure I can stay in office, fighting for you?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73253690/437893293/809151987?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.12_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmNiNmYxNC1hZjgxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0V1XBe7tZbnH_4T-lIzmuwrf1MSTmMkGtAGyeVnVTug=)

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: This is what my mother taught me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | |
---
Peter, I’m running to be Florida’s next U.S. Senator – and I hope you’ll give me a moment to share why.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73253966/437894348/431579148?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1258-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmZhNjllNi1hZjgxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vOikcrRu5nObZaYPWlQ4mri4ld4psmJRbIxtBSHhsvo=)
_My husband and three children._
I was born in Ecuador, and when I was 14, my mother brought my sisters and me to America in search of a better life.

We made a new home in a small, one room apartment in America. My mother worked double shifts as a home health care provider and at night, she took classes to learn English. When I was 15, I started picking up shifts at the local doughnut shop to help us make ends meet.

My mother’s hard work, incredible sacrifices, and relentlessly fierce hope made it possible for me to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress. **She taught me that a better education, a better home, and a better future is always possible if we never give up. This is the promise of America.

_And that’s why I’m running for Senate. Because Florida deserves better, and we’ve got to fight for it._**

Right now, our state is being pushed backward by far-right extremists like my opponent, Sen. Rick Scott. He’s targeting the most vulnerable amongst us, dividing our communities, and threatening the American dream. It’s no wonder why a mere 40% of Floridians view him favorably.

With experts saying Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024, I know that we can defeat him and restore the promise of America — but not without all hands on deck.

**[So please, will you join the fight for a better future by splitting a donation of $5 between Letitia James and my campaign? If we win in Florida, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend our Senate majority. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73253967/437894349/431579148?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1258-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmZhNjllNi1hZjgxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vOikcrRu5nObZaYPWlQ4mri4ld4psmJRbIxtBSHhsvo=)**

clean_body: We’ve spent this year building the strongest analytics, organizing, and mobilization programs that will lead Democrats to victory – as a member, you can help fuel this vital work. | | | | | Here are three reasons why you should become an Official 2024 DLCC Member → 1\. Grassroots support has carried Democrats to victory, helping us win 31 special elections this year, defend our majorities in Pennsylvania and Virginia, and close in on Republicans’ majority in the New Hampshire House. If we want to expand on these wins in 2024 and beyond, we need you on our team. 2\. Over 98% of our donations come from grassroots donors like you. name: Katie Porter
subject: Here’s what I have written on my whiteboard:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Our team has a full-court strategy planned
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=33027%2E3422442%2En06QZV)
Derek, our primary election is coming up _fast_.
Here’s what I have written on my whiteboard:
You know that our team has a full-court strategy planned — from TV and digital ads to mailers, phone calls, texts, and good old-fashioned door-knocking — **but we need the resources to put that strategy into action.**
And as the only Democrat in this race who has _never_ taken a penny from corporate PACs, I’m **100%** counting on supporters like you to get those resources.
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation._
**[With time running short, I’m once again asking: can you chip in $5 today? In a race this close your gift really could help make the difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231112?recurring=yes&refcode=EMAN23_1_WBD_20231112_V1_F&refcode2=33027_3422442_n06QZV&akid=33027%2E3422442%2En06QZV)**
[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231112?recurring=yes&refcode=EMAN23_1_WBD_20231112_V1_F&refcode2=33027_3422442_n06QZV&akid=33027%2E3422442%2En06QZV)
Thank you!
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAN23_1_WBD_20231112_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=33027_3422442_n06QZV&akid=33027%2E3422442%2En06QZV)**
